John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42375956/332750958/-1406512299?refcode=ea.735fd489-f298-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.735fd489-f298-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzVmZDQ4OS1mMjk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z0_lqe258d9muwAHGar2toa5YC8dGrTc658oi8ZnvKY=)

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Tonight at midnight...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
Hi team, it’s Alessandra. My team reached out earlier this week to let you know that we are hoping for as many contributions as possible before our deadline tonight at midnight.
As you know, this is the very first End-of-Month deadline of our campaign, so we will need as many contributions as possible to show the strength of our movement.
Any amount you can give will truly go a long way, [**so if you’re able to pitch in, you can do that here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-feb/?refcode=em220228-2-15&refcode2=526_59515_q3tQY6&akid=526%2E59515%2Eq3tQY6) Thank you for reading, and thank you as always for your support! It means a lot to me, and to our whole team. - AB

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=526%2E59515%2Eq3tQY6).

name: Drew Thompson
subject: Join Ohio's Current and Future U.S. Senators this Friday!
body:
RSVP NOW | SPACE WILL BE LIMITED [](https://) Peter, Our list is filling up for this Friday's events with Senator Rob Portman and Jane Timken! Make sure you reserve your spot by clicking the RSVP button below. This is a free event but we expect to run out of room later in the week! Grab your spot now to join Rob as he passes the torch to Jane to lead the great state of Ohio! Registration closes soon. **Jane Timken & Sen. Portman**
Friday, March 4th
Hamilton County GOP - 12:45 p.m.
Montgomery County GOP - 2:15 pm.
Jane Timken Columbus HQ - 4:15 p.m. [**RSVP**](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=e178c176b2b3492d95c7475343b625dd&_e=hIyj03p6gLfkyP5Fr4pEyCYTuwVn9eum_3N3NOyll9oOgP7PPIFZ0g0q4dAgNd8Wa4WyzlAGwkijuAH5e0LOXbFtMsc3y7II0LHDPmD7r6FaGAIvj7x4Mlr5WDls4RM5Atb_Zu_NDrWAdrcQa002GQPWVZwpmj32fgyn1HbLEFM1SWpBCZ1nxt2ya4Iyy34DtCep-A-KWmfiPxL7-XHrYwGLH-yhQM1jtR1dSD0dGK8FzwKoK5HMmELFyQno-BVlWRpYt0pezX5AXYpoEZA8Vi2acOzCRkeMlu_P6MJ4UNLDjM5Mh_lITKP4wTfg7VdsriXKx4S4sjLRkdag9aA4OZSNm72IdJW9Md3ax3Hv-rg%3D) See you Friday! -Jane Timken for Ohio

body:
America must be a steadfast ally to all people fighting for freedom. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42376607/332755355/823540626?refcode=ea.77663cb4-f398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.77663cb4-f398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzY2M2NiNC1mMzk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXd4UyfGGN89SC118YFQVl8f7WLg5zsl2fD3jDp5fbg=&emci=cc337d7c-e898-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=77663cb4-f398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Our nation was forged by a people rising up to fight for freedom and the promise of democracy. We know the value of our freedom, and America must be a steadfast ally to those who are fighting for theirs now. **I strongly condemn Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, a peaceful, independent nation. This war is unwarranted and unjust, and it will cost untold innocent lives.** Russia’s leader is a tyrant who deserves the isolation his actions have brought. Today I signed Executive Order 251, directing state government agencies and departments to review all existing contracts and operations and to terminate any agreements or operations that directly benefit Russian entities. With the threat of cyber attacks on businesses and government agencies heightened, I met with my Joint Cybersecurity Task Force and instructed them to increase outreach and assistance across our state. **North Carolina stands with the Ukrainians who are so courageously defending their homeland, and we stand with the brave Russian citizens who are risking their own safety under an oppressive regime to protest the war crimes of their own government.** May God bless all those in harm’s way, Roy Cooper [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42376608/332755356/823540626?refcode=ea.77663cb4-f398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.77663cb4-f398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzY2M2NiNC1mMzk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXd4UyfGGN89SC118YFQVl8f7WLg5zsl2fD3jDp5fbg=&emci=cc337d7c-e898-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=77663cb4-f398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
| **Send donations via check to:**
Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Thank you!
---
* * *
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42376609/332755357/2039383177?refcode=ea.77663cb4-f398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.77663cb4-f398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzY2M2NiNC1mMzk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXd4UyfGGN89SC118YFQVl8f7WLg5zsl2fD3jDp5fbg=&emci=cc337d7c-e898-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=77663cb4-f398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Jessica, Greg, tomorrow 7 a.m.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Polls open at 7 a.m. tomorrow for our first 2022 primaries.

Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar are taking on the political
establishment. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96503?refcode=em20220228-22203&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22203%2E1203867%2ElwhXZY ]Chip in now to help us elect Jessica, Greg, and our
full slate of Justice Democrats »

Peter,

Years have been building towards tomorrow. The years that Jessica Cisneros
has been building her campaign for Congress alongside Justice Democrats.
The years Greg Casar has been serving the people of Austin as a
progressive fighter on the city council. The years that Justice Democrats
have worked to recruit and elect candidates to Congress like Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman.

Tomorrow is primary election day for Jessica and Greg, and it will decide
how this year starts and whether or not the progressive movement has
momentum in 2022.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96503?refcode=em20220228-22203&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22203%2E1203867%2ElwhXZY ]Can you help us build our momentum and have the resources to elect our
full slate of 6 progressive primary challengers this year? We need to
raise $7,409 before midnight in order to fully fund our efforts to
re-elect and expand the Squad. Chip in $3, or anything at
all, now »

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96503?refcode=em20220228-22203&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22203%2E1203867%2ElwhXZY ]Contribute $3

The only way we’re able to win our primaries is by hitting our fundraising
goals. The Democratic establishment and its corporate candidates have
nearly unlimited resources from Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Oil, health
insurance executives, and corporate PACs. Justice Democrats run grassroots
campaign without a cent of corporate PAC money, because we’re fighting for
the people, not corporate interests.

The Squad are in Congress fighting to deliver for the people every day. We
can rely on them, even when corporate Democrats fail to deliver. So we
must elect more Justice Democrats to join the Squad in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96503?refcode=em20220228-22203&t=1023&akid=22203%2E1203867%2ElwhXZY ]Can you help us close our fundraising gap in the last few hours of
February? Our average donation this year is just $18.13, so each
contribution makes a huge difference.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=22203%2E1203867%2ElwhXZY ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=22203%2E1203867%2ElwhXZY ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220228-22203-footer&t=1026&refcode2=22203_1203867_lwhXZY&akid=22203%2E1203867%2ElwhXZY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=22203%2E1203867%2ElwhXZY

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team AOC
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
If you’re not in the headspace to read this email, we understand and that’s okay.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220228-2829-header&t=1&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn)
We’re just one day away from our February fundraising deadline.
There’s _a lot_ going on in the world and we’re living through extremely difficult times of violence and war. **If you’re not in the headspace to read this email, we understand and that’s okay.**
With Alexandria’s primary in just four months, we wanted to share some of February’s numbers behind our grassroots movement to show you how our volunteers and donors like you have powered incredible progress this month:
📅 Team AOC is hosting **8 in person canvases to collect the 1,250 signatures needed by April 7 in order to secure Alexandria’s place on the ballot this year.** We’re training hundreds of volunteers in person and virtually to not only gather signatures, but also help us reach new voters who will be voting as part of NY-14 for the first time following the state’s redistricting. 🙌 We **raised $30,000 to help elect two progressive champions to Congress from Texas: Greg Casar and Jess Cisneros.** This is money that wouldn’t have made it into the hands of these historic campaigns without Team AOC and grassroots donors like you. ✍️ **Over 5,000 people signed our petition** in support of banning members of Congress from trading stocks. Through this public pressure and Alexandria’s pressure in Congress, the _Ban Conflicted Trading Act_ gained major momentum in Washington D.C. 💰 More than **20,000+ generous supporters have donated this month** to re-elect AOC. Our average donation this month is $13.76!
---
Our movement wouldn’t be possible without the thousands of volunteers who’ve attended our events, and the hundreds of thousands who’ve donated to AOC or our movement partners. That’s why we’re emailing you personally to see if you can take your involvement one step further and make your first donation before our February fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. What do you think?
[**Can you make your first $3 donation to re-elect Alexandria before we hit our February fundraising deadline tonight? Even if you can only give a little bit, it adds up along with the thousands of other small-dollar donations we receive each day to make an incredible impact.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220228-2?refcode=em20220228-2829-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2829_2526796_aj9dGn&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn)
**[Make your contribution](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220228-2?refcode=em20220228-2829-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2829_2526796_aj9dGn&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn)**
We wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t so important. But the truth is that our Republican opponents have already started raising against us in anticipation of Alexandria’s election.
That’s why we need to get back on track on the final day of the month – because right now we’re still short of meeting our goal.
[**Add your $3 donation today. Your contribution could be the one that puts us over the line in a very critical month for our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220228-2?refcode=em20220228-2829-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2829_2526796_aj9dGn&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn)
Together, we’re showing what a big grassroots movement for progressive change can do.
Thanks for being in this fight with us.
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220228-2?refcode=em20220228-2829-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=23&refcode2=2829_2526796_aj9dGn&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220228-2829-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=24&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2829%2E2526796%2Eaj9dGn)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: Here’s where we stand before midnight. | | | Peter, We’ll get right to it: We’re just hours away from our February end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re still 43 contributions behind our 1,000 contribution goal. Ever since the GOP released its gerrymandered congressional map of Middle Tennessee, we’ve had to make tough calls about this campaign. We’ll face even tougher decisions if we fail to meet this goal. Right now, we need to show that no matter what, this movement is ready to fight to shake up the status quo. That will only be possible if we have a strong fundraising month, and to do it, we need your help. Together, we’ll get Odessa to Congress and win a seat at the table for working class Tennesseeans. body:
Each donation proves that we have what it takes to stand up to the powerful, corporate interests of our Republican opponents.
#

I know you’re busy, so I’ll be quick. I just got off a call with our finance team, and thanks to a massive outpouring of support from folks today, **we’re _just_ shy of our February fundraising goal.**
You might have heard Cheri say, “your donation itself is just as important as the amount.” And that’s 100% true.
You see, our fundraising numbers aren’t just about the amount of money we raise – though that’s important, of course. They’re also our chance to prove to the DC pundits and naysayers that Cheri has what it takes to win.
**Because each donation is a testament to the grassroots strength of our movement. Each donation proves that we have what it takes to stand up to the powerful, corporate interests of our Republican opponents. And each donation is a commitment to flipping North Carolina blue on Election Day.**
[**So before we close the books, I wanted to reach out once myself and ask if you could contribute $5, $10, or even $1 to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal. If you can, you might just be the one to push us over the top.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220228-2-t1&refcode2=479.357359.z6HNut&noskip=true&t=1&akid=479%2E357359%2Ez6HNut)

| | Peter, February has flown by, and Team Levin is only getting stronger as the countdown to November continues. Andy’s working hard for the progressive agenda in Congress — but with such a slim majority in the House, there’s a chance all of our progress could be lost. The stakes couldn’t be higher this election year, Peter — from workers’ rights and climate change, to health care and voting rights, the hallmarks of our movement depend on Democratic control of the House. And, if Republicans gain power, the future of our democracy will be on the line. [_**Peter, our crucial end-of-month deadline is tonight at midnight, and we’re short of where we need to be to keep a progressive voice like Andy’s fighting for us in Congress. Can you help us close the gap right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42377843/332765382/882283677?refcode=em_20220228_f_t_eom4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTM1YzNiOC1mNjk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0HL24vrbXvIaUTNcUHrzGqxgBCV3_TnHVKki9GzOGs=) Hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal is imperative to our success. As a team, these contributions fuel our campaign and allow Andy to be in the best possible position to win Michigan’s new Eleventh District. Team Levin knows he is the best candidate to serve in this seat, but our campaign needs the extra push from people like you so the world can see it, too. That’s why we are asking for your help today, Peter — our campaign’s strength comes from dedicated grassroots supporters like you chipping in, sharing our message, and fighting for working families in Michigan and beyond. [_**Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is just hours away, Peter — can you chip in right now to prove our movement’s strength and keep our campaign in a solid position ahead of November?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42377844/332765383/882283677?refcode=em_20220228_f_t_eom4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTM1YzNiOC1mNjk4LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t0HL24vrbXvIaUTNcUHrzGqxgBCV3_TnHVKki9GzOGs=) Let’s go! Team Levin

clean_body: We need this team to step up ahead of our crucial midnight deadline. | | | | | Peter, February has flown by, and Team Levin is only getting stronger as the countdown to November continues. Andy’s working hard for the progressive agenda in Congress — but with such a slim majority in the House, there’s a chance all of our progress could be lost. The stakes couldn’t be higher this election year, Peter — from workers’ rights and climate change, to health care and voting rights, the hallmarks of our movement depend on Democratic control of the House. And, if Republicans gain power, the future of our democracy will be on the line. = Hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal is imperative to our success. As a team, these contributions fuel our campaign and allow Andy to be in the best possible position to win Michigan’s new Eleventh District. Team Levin knows he is the best candidate to serve in this seat, but our campaign needs the extra push from people like you so the world can see it, too. That’s why we are asking for your help today, Peter — our campaign’s strength comes from dedicated grassroots supporters like you chipping in, sharing our message, and fighting for working families in Michigan and beyond. = Let’s go! Team Levin | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: HOLY COW!!!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Honestly, we woke up this morning and thought there was NO CHANCE we were going to reach our February fundraising goals.
#

Friends —
Honestly, we woke up this morning and thought there was NO CHANCE we were going to reach our February fundraising goals. Getting there would mean receiving more donations today alone than on any day of the campaign so far.
We were all set to sit down tomorrow and figure out what we had to pull out of the budget.
But...wow. So many people are answering our call and stepping up to help re-elect Mark before our midnight deadline.
Now we actually have a CHANCE of getting there. But it will only happen if lots and lots of people keep giving what they can.
Can you add a donation before it’s too late? Use this link:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/February-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220228-3-7&t=1&refcode2=2229_6688874_OJwMIL&akid=2229%2E6688874%2EOJwMIL)
Just look at the chart of donations we’ve received in the last hour. HOLY COW!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220228-3-7&t=2&refcode2=2229_6688874_OJwMIL&akid=2229%2E6688874%2EOJwMIL)
Every single dot on that chart is a person who has Mark’s back and is chipping in to help us reach our goals, and keep Mark in office.
Now, they’re desperately hoping YOU will do the same before we reach midnight. What do you say?
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to help Mark Kelly reach his goals before our February fundraising drive ends at midnight TONIGHT?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220228-3-7&t=3&refcode2=2229_6688874_OJwMIL&akid=2229%2E6688874%2EOJwMIL)

subject: “Angry” “Dumber than AOC”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We cannot allow this type of harmful rhetoric to continue to take hold in our halls of power.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220228-730-footer-ak&t=2&akid=730%2E90090%2EPC7z3D)
ICYMI — here’s a clip from Morgan’s explosive debate with her Republican opponent Josh Mandel:
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/28038?refcode=em20220228-730&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=730%2E90090%2EPC7z3D)
In this clip, you’ll hear the kind of discriminatory and degrading rhetoric Morgan — as well as all Black women in this nation — is up against every day. From calling Morgan “angry,” to “dumber than AOC,” Josh Mandel is an example of the pro-Trump, right-wing extremist base that we cannot let win in Ohio or across the country. [Click here to rush a contribution now to help Morgan fight back.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/28038?refcode=em20220228-730&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=730%2E90090%2EPC7z3D)
That’s why this Senate election is so important. We cannot allow this type of harmful rhetoric to continue to take hold in our halls of power.
**And that’s why we’re counting on you right now.** [With just hours left before our February fundraising deadline, we’re still short of hitting our digital goal. It’s critical we hit this and every fundraising target we set ahead of our primary election in just two short months. Can we count on you to make a $5 contribution to get us across the finish line and power our movement to elect Morgan Harper?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/28038?refcode=em20220228-730&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=730%2E90090%2EPC7z3D)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/28038?refcode=em20220228-730&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=730%2E90090%2EPC7z3D)**
**We have an incredible opportunity to flip a Senate seat and send the first Black woman from Ohio to the United States Senate.** But we cannot do it without your help right now.
[Please, if you can afford to, make a $5 contribution now to help us close our fundraising gap and elect Morgan Harper.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/28038?refcode=em20220228-730&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=730%2E90090%2EPC7z3D)
Thank you,
Team Morganize
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220228-730-footer&t=26&refcode2=730_90090_PC7z3D&akid=730%2E90090%2EPC7z3D)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=730%2E90090%2EPC7z3D)

subject: Unite for Ukraine: A Candlelight Vigil
body:
Tuesday, March 1st at 6:00 p.m. | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a98b89a7c1&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| **Unite for Ukraine: A Candlelight Vigil**

---
|
Hi Friend,

Right now Ukrainians are fighting for the same freedom and democracy we enjoy here in the United States. Families are being separated as many bravely pick up weapons to defend the land they love while others flee for safety.
Fr. Bohdan Barytskyy of the Epiphany of Our Lord Catholic Church is offering us all a chance to show solidarity with Ukraine. I hope you'll join me tomorrow night as we gather on the grounds of the Church for a candlelight vigil.
ALL are invited to attend, to be in solidarity with the Ukrainian people.
I hope to see you there.

**Tuesday, March 1st
6 p.m.**
[Epiphany of Our Lord
Ukrainian Catholic Church
434 90th Ave N
St. Petersburg, FL 33702](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=ed3beb40dd&e=c2296cffff)

Amanda Makki

body:
Tomorrow, voters head to the polls...
| Friend – this is it. Tomorrow voters will head to the polls to decide the fate of Texas’ brand-new congressional seat – 1 of the 5 seats needed to FLIP the House.
---
_And tonight at 11:59 P.M. marks our FINAL end-of-month deadline before election day._
---
Generous Texans have given us one last matching opportunity Friend, and I know there’s no better time to use it than now, because every dollar of our Election Day Goal is another voter we can get out to the polls tomorrow.
---
You’ve fought by my side every step of the way in this race. That’s why I’m asking you, **_with just $8,110 to go to meet our Election Day Goal_** , to lend your support one last time and take advantage of this match.

I just got out of our Monday morning meeting with Tom and the campaign team. This biggest topic of our meeting was the progress to our February grassroots fundraising goal. As it turns out, we need to raise $1,884 before midnight.

**So I’m going to get straight to the point: Can you rush a donation at this secure, personal link to help us reach this critical goal?**

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/20210225-wfm-eom?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x9CPkL9sJQqk_rjly8_08wifA3oSdDYoJGsn7ncVJ0OmM0F_SAZG5QNQHFxEmSWmtkWcTiC7Xq1wd0o84psTMvX4RAMnOyn4NBKuCPt1uMgn2e6ugveWHbuz_RbWDDAXGo9V_DwuQ_687Tkw2O2UJuBPICj-eevkJ47UDGR3uKSmzPHTmbuPHZioBDVD_9Za2kwlAFCPnHxoeKX1tLskVctFuaCRPrGmQoKEJaHUn3R3-uxi3ylSZ5NZp3Gp8LsubSxPZFrhHcjpG7o41iRguUm4awal1qKJQiLviz-n50mWUlybInDbx4avjyoL85nKoRpSn9c2vcOCzJqxC6ZdVXtCfwmOlbkvV1MqBpBBFCLg/3jz/nyTgdGsNRGuITk9mSTITsQ/h2/3hM79ksHLPDnm0XRyWobqNCiAVGNRN1IT2h4ipIN2X8)

Let me explain a bit more about why reaching this goal is so important. We’ve been talking a LOT about how Ryan Zinke has folks like Kevin McCarthy and Donald Trump in his ear, influencing his campaign strategy.

**But Zinke *also* has their friends lining his pockets and filling his campaign war chest.**

That’s not us. From picking up donations for local unhoused folks here in Missoula, to participating in community meetings across the district, to volunteering his time at charity events, and everything in between; Tom is building this campaign and this movement one voter at a time.

**We don’t have the same connections to the types of powerful political figures — we are building our campaign the old-fashioned way, with people talking to people, one grassroots donation at a time from folks like you who truly believe that we can restore faith in our democracy again.**

Our campaign has been gaining traction — and every time voters hear our message, it resonates. We just have to be able to communicate our message of hope and stability to as many voters as possible.

_**[So let’s do it! Chip in $5 to help us reach our $10,000 February fundraising goal!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x9CPkL9sJQqk_rjly8_08wifA3oSdDYoJGsn7ncVJ0OmM0F_SAZG5QNQHFxEmSWmtkWcTiC7Xq1wd0o84psTMv1msZubPVwvV8FmlKIbfvELEkVQi0zRdw1h1XurMB3t4kTARBXKTMXJbQnLTe4oRbP-wv1p0jOTHCcC42q0xtZ6_8ucirsBtroxCE312c9VOShLWC88UUBjoECqRdNS0MSWi0Su_k-XilqGfIvJ7LGUEDxxQB4lLYJVRuAKERVx0J7V_joWMrzpap-dzpqAucGE1UmkTTZXE0pBu6USSlIaUB2nGePSbpDcQIsvJ4A75rbqRoYN73sfDSjOWaS74mP-oko3tCk75VAk-8W_vHpg/3jz/nyTgdGsNRGuITk9mSTITsQ/h3/JqHWv2R3RFmvldd7x01iJ6K19uQoqmb_vmRMuVUf8IE)
**_
So much has been happening in our race for Montana’s brand new congressional district. As one of our top supporters, I wanted you to hear directly from me some of the most important updates as we make the final push to reach this goal.

Thank you,
Blake PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Huge Surplus - They Owe You $4k
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=huge_surplus&n=1)
---
## MN Budget Shows Record $12 Billion Surplus; They Owe You $4,000!
### Monday, February 28th, 2022
Friend, The Minnesota Management and Budget Forecast was released this afternoon and it shows a record $12 Billion in Surplus Funds. While the Political Class and the Corporate Media will lead you to believe the amount is only $9.3 Billion, the government is holding onto another $2.6 Billion of your cash as well in a “Reserves account”. Our state government is projected to be [overcharging Minnesotans by nearly $12 Billion](https://www.action4liberty.com/minnesota_budget_shows_record_12_billion?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=huge_surplus&n=2) in total. **All of it should be Given Back to Taxpayers IMMEDIATELY!** [****](https://www.action4liberty.com/minnesota_budget_shows_record_12_billion?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=huge_surplus&n=3) A budget surplus means that our government overtaxed us because the spending and revenues of the government should balance out. Similar to when you are overcharged at a store, the money should be immediately returned to you. Walz and the Democrats have offered peanuts to the people, proposing to give $175 to individuals and $350 for couples - most likely allowing some people to get a check even if they didn’t pay in. This is our money and we’ve been overtaxed! This measly offer is an insult to the taxpayers who have contributed to our oversized, tyrannical government. The Senate Republicans are proposing long term tax breaks, targeting the social security tax and with an income tax reduction on the lowest tax bracket only. We agree that those taxes should be cut, but this is like the store overcharging you, and then slowly giving you your money back over the next decade. **Republicans should be unified in DEMANDING an immediate return of the entire budget surplus of $12 Billion. With 2.5 Million taxpayers statewide, you should be receiving a check of up to $4,000 if you paid in. Some people should get even more if they paid a higher tax bill.** Action 4 Liberty is calling for the State House, Senate, and Governor to return the entire surplus, including the budget reserves, to the taxpayers. When we are overtaxed we are owed the money IMMEDIATELY.
## **[SIGN THE GIVE IT BACK PETITION](https://www.action4liberty.com/give_it_back?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=huge_surplus&n=4)**
**Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=huge_surplus&n=5 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=huge_surplus&n=5)
---
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=huge_surplus&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=huge_surplus&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=huge_surplus&n=8), software for leaders.

clean_body: | | | Hey, it's Amy T here. Did you see Liz G's note earlier? We are just $2,772 from meeting our goal for February, and there are only a few hours left. = Andy has such a tough fight ahead, we need to make progress every day, every week, every month. One of his opponents is a super-wealthy owner of a yacht-building company who likely has the ability to pour millions of dollars of his own money into this election. Do we really want a democracy where seats in Congress can be bought by the highest bidder? Of course not. That's why Andy is counting on people power to help us close the gap. = Amy T Forwarded Message Hi, Liz G here. Sometimes you start a new job and you have plenty of time to get started, learn the ropes, and so on. Well, that's not how things are working out here at Team Kim. I just introduced myself to you on Saturday, and already, I have to share some tough news with you. One of Andy's opponents, the wealthy owner of a yacht-building company, has just been named as one of the Republican Party's highest-priority candidates for 2022. He was added to the "On the Radar" list of candidates. It's insider language, but here's what it means – they're targeting Andy with everything they've got. doesn't take corporate PAC money so we're counting on folks like you to be there for him. When he made the announcement, Republican leader Kevin McCarthy said, "Republicans are completely united in our goal of taking back the House." If that happens? All our Democratic priorities go out the window — defending voting rights, fighting the climate crisis, reducing the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more. = Liz G. |

Sorry for bothering you, but my team just told me that **_we only need 19 more donors to surpass our end-of-the-month goal of 300 donors!_**

**We're so close!** [**Can you pitch in a small donation of $1, $3, or $5 to help me hit that goal?**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=a835d16e88554b21b3e2554c8bcb1689&_e=4QEeHx3rC3X0iZ8deZ_pFM0PKqubjGuUFlg5ELySq3iIztNLqQgHIrsUoaQYL15aTXjZF4WpXgHH9B7fW_5RHFCUFUj3yfUssILuPyYV5qQp4E7sOcvpwuDxeUugp5rI2VSl0eQoLj-yEBJEwcnNJsw0ehHl6G1DUbXQ1UzlTlpdcYrqeCvz4BbYffbdIsrscOSQcxF9Fx9zZAwOGrqm6cDRkOZadXNREhVTVeGsm0CTnBPv7XgNf4EbnQKbldsCGSy6uF0q9m6NUwPG2o7Bfdv6py0J6ihT1bz_QaATI30w9_BUcAzP-cpg_6MDM7sG5Vzb9xU2lgkrJBkWr1oP5FPsSlRmsooabvPj5hGeQ4ohMxjSw0OSSvjels4hCOAeYJDBlnOyhjvnRiW_DQcUgml4Vl4FHsl6UA28g1kUSEQ%3D)

I know it doesn't seem like much but even just $1 can reach a handful of voters with digital ads, $3 is enough for multiple mail pieces to undecided voters. [**No support is too small when it comes to this campaign.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=a835d16e88554b21b3e2554c8bcb1689&_e=4QEeHx3rC3X0iZ8deZ_pFM0PKqubjGuUFlg5ELySq3iIztNLqQgHIrsUoaQYL15aTXjZF4WpXgHH9B7fW_5RHFCUFUj3yfUssILuPyYV5qQp4E7sOcvpwuDxeUugp5rI2VSl0eQoLj-yEBJEwcnNJsw0ehHl6G1DUbXQ1UzlTlpdcYrqeCvz4BbYffbdIsrscOSQcxF9Fx9zZAwOGrqm6Y1BORbIN_AZxZmlYk0AO5bsAe38rMfgQgy3dH83GlNxqfb80RPwc7L-LwGUNyQzYxePHrgMUjhWyCAXwsLOxhpuPyyDFn9qr-Vvuu1UNkPdHXve4ID5vCw0xl9_Irzvpvc_yL1GKx-dPzNCo36VwSv7NTh_kFttFR64MTqlA_sPv5ZVuVYgs942MIs7E8A7SFAI5ZgWOpYG5No7Myyin-I%3D)

Help me take back my community and fight for a conservative local government that we all deserve.

Thank you,
**Joe Arpaio**

The GOP is unhinged >>>

Don’t wait, sign NOW to stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/FIGHT_FOR_DEMOCRACY/?source=VPP_20220228_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1386%2E878179%2EYF_aO3) | [_15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED:_ SHOW YOUR SUPPORT FOR LIZ CHENEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/FIGHT_FOR_DEMOCRACY/?source=VPP_20220228_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1386%2E878179%2EYF_aO3)
---
**Team** , Republicans are using every last dirty trick in the book to intimidate Liz Cheney into backing down from her attempts to hold Donald Trump accountable!
❌ _They stripped her of committee assignments!_
❌ _Booted her out of the Wyoming Republican party!_
❌ _Now, the RNC has officially CENSURED her!_
**And while we may not agree with Liz Cheney on just about anything... we _MUST_ stand with Liz Cheney in her quest to SAVE our democracy!**
[For the sake of our democracy, we must stand against the GOP’s attempts to replace honorable Republicans like Liz Cheney with their most despicable MAGA maniacs. Add your name and show the corrupt GOP that we won’t let Liz Cheney fight alone! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/FIGHT_FOR_DEMOCRACY/?source=VPP_20220228_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=1386%2E878179%2EYF_aO3)

_VPP_

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1386%2E878179%2EYF_aO3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1386%2E878179%2EYF_aO3).**

body:
3 hours now and we're $3,500 short of our February end of month goal. Won't you consider helping with a gift today? I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=16d86b0100c6420abec231708c3a4e82&_e=2Ho7eV3tpEVO1y8RJ9NoooTAS9-Zjm6in01TABmrzUyxuAD9wKhiyW0dE6OWfoRKYnbtpV1em7j8hdPZLll1CpPsiU8p7PzGHEl4s7Pos0OHVHKFitZfM2CDMaRMES2wm0cUOIwgWSAh6GIxduSlFC29WZrgoV3ZseQG-yWB3EwHkOYX5L-sJqRHRkjetQpL5JwJ2XX442cOp87RJO2kqKwsvGMUhWJCou1_wxFkM8TTkq4jvc7vgA8TtPz2M7hVD7_t-g0UtHfxmzhS7l0K4vcER3Ysr2E9LiEEobNpR7_xQnY4NnDPt0rq2T5rhdeycSenuFHoBJLErNlX385LLmMlzjyvpi363ojtoTRXVKPsvR-nVjQbcimfvwWnequTjPyLQs6AyBzCxAuxpHtfXV5P2YAGXbJWbuFMIqjfO0JQk78hTbO5SBBxrARDD_ZJ)

Peter,

Often when we write to you it probably seems like we’re having a bit of a panic. It’s because we are.

Election Day is creeping up on us little by little, and soon it’s going to be here. Yes, I know you’re probably thinking “it’s just March.” Yes, but doesn’t it feel like it was just New Year’s Eve?

Yep. 3 months goes by very quickly in the campaign finance world – and you probably guessed that we’re running behind where we need to be at the moment and we’ve only just about **12 hours** to raise the $3,500 we need to hit our monthly online digital goal of $40,000.

[Would you do me a personal favor and chip in $4 if you can right now?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=16d86b0100c6420abec231708c3a4e82&_e=2Ho7eV3tpEVO1y8RJ9NoooTAS9-Zjm6in01TABmrzUyxuAD9wKhiyW0dE6OWfoRKYnbtpV1em7j8hdPZLll1CpPsiU8p7PzGHEl4s7Pos0OHVHKFitZfM2CDMaRMES2wm0cUOIwgWSAh6GIxduSlFC29WZrgoV3ZseQG-yWB3EwHkOYX5L-sJqRHRkjetQpL5JwJ2XX442cOp87RJO2kqK-QBl2MIh3sTISYlin4priskhYu1Y3HP5L0any9biVk-lROdWg6oLbGrbt5q58diEls-_Ic-De9nr3WX_uTx-rKjoi5R_p7L4sryyU1Pcmo2PnNFGUa8txZqgbcAzmOcupkaU1iUf-nd6JTcAMdOSxRuRC_4i2akoc2SugNMWeUhg2dLhPf-qu9EbJjCjt4T56Q6oIhz7lBbTNU-w3F77n4pPuBtqs0Qntaq_L39IBFUD7bV4qESGzDablvZKEKSQd69ZqGvrAV3Uwg39vGc-0w6CxM2OoElvRFvrDKLl01) It would be such a travesty to take allocated money from our TV ad budget and use it pay our campaign staff because we fell short of our fundraising goals.

clean_body: 3 hours now and we're $3,500 short of our February end of month goal. Won't you consider helping with a gift today? I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Often when we write to you it probably seems like we’re having a bit of a panic. It’s because we are. Election Day is creeping up on us little by little, and soon it’s going to be here. Yes, I know you’re probably thinking “it’s just March.” Yes, but doesn’t it feel like it was just New Year’s Eve? Yep. 3 months goes by very quickly in the campaign finance world – and you probably guessed that we’re running behind where we need to be at the moment and we’ve only just about 12 hours to raise the $3,500 we need to hit our monthly online digital goal of $40,000. It would be such a travesty to take allocated money from our TV ad budget and use it pay our campaign staff because we fell short of our fundraising goals. - Whether you donate because you know this is the race that will put Republicans in the House majority, or because you’re a part of the 69% of Americans who think the country is on the wrong track,thank you. I appreciate YOU. Alek Skarlatos - | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Erica Smith
subject: This is your last chance to make an impact on our February fundraising
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

It's Erica.
I promise to keep this short:

We’re just hours away from our February fundraising deadline, but we’re
still $745 short.

Our district lines have just been finalized and we’re *less* than 90 days
away from our primary election. Closing our fundraising gap is essential
to ensuring we have the resources needed to kick off the next phase of our
campaign. If we don’t, we’ll have to cut back on our voter outreach plans.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/41740?refcode=em20220228-938&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=938%2E3698%2EjSN5dX ]Will you please make your
first donation of any amount to our campaign before
midnight? We must hit our $7,000 goal in order to move into the next phase
of our campaign on March 1. This is your last chance to make an impact on
reaching this ambitious goal.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/41740?refcode=em20220228-938&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=938%2E3698%2EjSN5dX ]Donate $5

THANK YOU for all your support so far. I *know* that our team has what it
takes to close the gap and finish February strong.

Let's do this!

Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for Congress

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/41740?refcode=em20220228-938&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=938%2E3698%2EjSN5dX ][IMG]

Our hearts are still with the Ukraine and all of our team is sending their
prayers and support to the people of Ukraine and those affected by the
current conflict. We hope for the safety and wellbeing of all in the
region. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/42261?t=1022&akid=938%2E3698%2EjSN5dX ]Here’s an article on 7 ways you can help Ukraine today. 💙

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220228-938-footer&t=1023&refcode2=938_3698_jSN5dX&akid=938%2E3698%2EjSN5dX

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=938%2E3698%2EjSN5dX

Some of my opponents have said Arizona CAN’T declare the cartels as the terrorists they are and we CAN’T build the wall because Joe Biden won’t let us. My response to them: grow a spine and make him stop us. If the federal government won’t do their job, Arizona has to stand up and LEAD the nation on border security. Thanks for your support, Tiffany Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: Did you see Beto's note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Our
people-powered movement to elect Beto needs to step up today.

Our February end-of-month deadline is at midnight, and we're still
projected to fall 7% short of our must-hit fundraising goal. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220228-2-178331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=178331%2E444211%2ETdNbCJ ]Will you
chip in before
tonight's deadline to help defeat Greg Abbott?

Millions of Texas voters will go to the polls tomorrow and see Beto
O'Rourke and Greg Abbott on their primary election ballots. What we raise
before midnight tonight will directly impact the last-minute investments
we can make to ensure a huge turnout for Beto.

The pressure is on — the media, our supporters, and our opponents will be
looking to see if we fall short of expectations. We've exceeded
expectations before, and I know we can do it
again tomorrow.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220228-2-178331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=178331%2E444211%2ETdNbCJ ]This is so important that Beto took the time between campaign stops to
email you earlier. Please take a moment to read Beto's email, and then
chip in $3 or any amount you can before midnight tonight.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220228-2-178331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=178331%2E444211%2ETdNbCJ ]Contribute $3

Thank you,

Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Beto O'Rourke
Date: Monday, February 28, 2022
Subject: We've begun to close the gap

I’ve been on the road every day this month making the case and pressing
our advantage.

Whether it’s prosecuting Abbott for his corruption and incompetence that
killed hundreds and raised electricity rates for every Texas household
(the “Abbott Tax”) during his grid failure, or sharing our vision for
Texas (great jobs, world-class schools, affordable health care), we are
making the case to the voters of this state.

From the Rio Grande Valley and South Texas where we were just rallying
voters during the only weekend of primary early voting to every other
region of the state, big city and small town alike, we are out there
connecting with the people who have the power to win this race with us.

And it’s not just me out there. More than 49,000 people have signed up to
volunteer for this campaign and we are putting them to work.

Over the month of February alone we’ve called, texted, and knocked on the
doors of more than 3 million Texas voters. And without spending a dime yet
on TV advertising, we’ve begun to close the gap with Abbott in major
public polls.

We’ve also received more than 200,000 contributions to the campaign,
keeping us close to even with the incumbent on our rate of fundraising
even though we have a much lower average contribution.

This is a great position for us to be in with eight months to go. As we
demonstrate success in volunteer sign-ups, donations, and turnout at our
events, we are giving people hope and showing that we can win. That
encourages even more people to sign up, donate, and turn out.

But it’s about to get a lot tougher.

We are going to be hit hard by Abbott as he attempts to slow our momentum
now that we’re entering the general election fight. There will be a
barrage of the same disinformation and lies (about socialism and open
borders for example) that you’ve heard before, only with a lot more money
behind the attacks.

I just need to be able to fight back so that I can keep connecting with
the people who are going to provide the margin of victory in this
election. They need to hear how Abbott has failed them and how I will
deliver for them.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220228-2-178331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=178331%2E444211%2ETdNbCJ ]I hope you will help me with a contribution to ensure I have the
resources to mount the best defense during this campaign: a strong offense
that keeps Abbott on the ropes every day in every part of Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53565?refcode=ema20220228-2-178331&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=178331%2E444211%2ETdNbCJ ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your help and support. I promise you that I will make the
most of it.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=178331%2E444211%2ETdNbCJ

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: this will only take a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
It's Chuck. I know it's late (and you've heard from me a lot this week), but I needed to get this last email out to you before signing off for the evening.
I know it feels like every year is a critical election year for Democrats, but I assure you: This really is a big one, and what we do right now _does_ matter. [**(If you are already all in to protect our razor-thin Senate majority, click here right now to rush a donation before tonight’s public FEC deadline.)**](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220228-ChuckSchumer-jtk2029-pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220228-ChuckSchumer-jtk2029-pros-sl1&akid=3175%2E9716520%2E7biOjs)
If we miss critical fundraising goals heading into this election, like tonight’s $250,000 end-of-month goal, we're signaling to Mitch McConnell, Trump, and all their buddies that we don't have what it takes to win critical Senate races and hold our majority. We're saying, "Here, take the majority -- we're in no shape to fight for it."
**That's not a message I'm ever willing to send --_because it simply isn't true_ _._ Democrats don't give up. We never have. We fight for what we believe in and what's right.**
And here's the other thing: **We've already seen what happens when Mitch McConnell is in control.** Critical bills that would make a meaningful difference for Americans are blocked before even reaching the Senate floor and compromise is thrown right out the window.
**Our country can't go through another time like that.** So we have to hit this fundraising goal, right now, and show everybody watching that we have what it takes to defend our majority and pass the Biden-Harris agenda. We have a lot of work in front of us, but we can't give up now. So please:
[**Will you step up right now, when Democrats and democracy need you most? Donate $5 or more to help us hit our goal by midnight and defend our Senate majority:**](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220228-ChuckSchumer-jtk2029-pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220228-ChuckSchumer-jtk2029-pros-sl1&akid=3175%2E9716520%2E7biOjs)
| [Donate $5 Now](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220228-ChuckSchumer-jtk2029-pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220228-ChuckSchumer-jtk2029-pros-sl1&akid=3175%2E9716520%2E7biOjs)
---
Thanks for everything,

Chuck
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220228-ChuckSchumer-jtk2029-pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220228-ChuckSchumer-jtk2029-pros-sl1&akid=3175%2E9716520%2E7biOjs)
| |

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=3175_9716520_7biOjs&akid=3175%2E9716520%2E7biOjs)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=3175%2E9716520%2E7biOjs)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=3175%2E9716520%2E7biOjs)** to unsubscribe.

body:

---
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fd22dccc29d04510ab36887dee10083b&_e=VwHQWUNdlNhRFvf4vV0-_xLmdjpiCeg_mGzGXRy413JUjvwwwhX22-z6R4YDaJOpGNs-cVVAbczYpqOofR29LAAh8IwQPNIwJb6l4gaP-3vYgHWNlRzENwSBqikPnub6I5cXlRMuJfWPnPoKemjUX2Jqnsk1LJ-uOfhsq1rDSfyRPHQeiGUapal5OlntPOVAHRvtBSBHoltnFwcafhRMyYKAPhp1rICl1ZYCbRTzpS9nWCnnglKea4H_PrdxKQZwN4JUPwRAuAiAOe4yPkqta8PaKs9tSNaSrN0sN13mcwhp0ppkImxxEU_J-uE5EudRVm8qilupNJrwWYSt5zylFUXc2d-TtXPw3BaKIWoMqlRc9wkueWvq7FG-SgBSCOwEl7O67iDKGrtZSMXpxEpCH6biqKBDStZtFljrwTeVnFkmX-u8wHkU5ktx0QmNx2ZV)

[** No, I like how Joe Biden and the Democrats are running this country! **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fd22dccc29d04510ab36887dee10083b&_e=VwHQWUNdlNhRFvf4vV0-_xLmdjpiCeg_mGzGXRy413JUjvwwwhX22-z6R4YDaJOpGNs-cVVAbczYpqOofR29LAAh8IwQPNIwJb6l4gaP-3vYgHWNlRzENwSBqikPnub6I5cXlRMuJfWPnPoKemjUX2Jqnsk1LJ-uOfhsq1rDSfyRPHQeiGUapal5OlntPOVAHRvtBSBHoltnFwcafhRMyYKAPhp1rICl1ZYCbRTzpS8pdPB4zZ3AiVpkw_odp7VSwV2bU02zhkGSPjRz42RwivnHqfLCbaWf0irWAPFIvAdweEiU5Lb5fKgjW-1msuN73HXN43bluQO0UuiaphVLaCZmPZJvQ6gYWoFB-AXVvyBOQfrPeOypSu6T7vbFJfPaThCvS_htBOAFHIcHAlTRVDtgRXchSXJq4rnml7FcFKitSO-6NVY6iVHOKtuHJimL)

We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_t=fEaCP06KMJsQ-NF5Oy2Fobb-rvJHxVoxWdxHFg74nJ7U72a697HIHvy6ddZQSFG3jbWZumNHSnQumEEMC2XrV7OavGRCbvByR83ft0clqjSMwCXq27QcUJmDOZEzvhezn5fzCcnIG1airjCcBlX_NMrUVgt0VrqqQKvV379mwYM%3D)

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4ByOIZLxYG29y8UpiYRUPSEDyHGwkHVTKrRugC-SzPZ8SMxHQIUHkoKB9HHgvRszSmaQJVrzxo5-4E44I3HPWH27CXJ2_9sY7L_So6oo7J2chdRxYMEVvL9Br6H8F0MLRWusqnz7ebTUrxbx471hGwy1Oh2t1qt2Onx3VOACQ1KBc2qtIxR70WTls38RXQfrX19V_Ap3nwa5qA60wKRA4aWdg%3D%3D)

**FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION:** A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4ByCHTZb9c_M8sQbnzKQB2OKHbCHvXg9biPbbPGQHun7rd4xAQHgBP45Gfqj3iraYdiRYK8mg_Sje56DioLn1WreNuqiq3jPH1I8ETaZShSuikUHaM8YUFpjVsWLjbNZ9FneLWTSOV208zPsqjWTbdDZYZqaQ6C0efq0_JdsrbVzJj7wCnFxWsgd3UeqsUvtqL7o4WyBO377vPZF1YCZ_1hSw%3D%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress in November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

**[We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4Bygk3JlNxo3swQloIvU1XFE0A1ZsTSKG1sbDPNET3pVC5ik4rBAT7tq9QYrQXmz7dd7JdqmjTaKIbWt8tvNNm-MVOuVzCRjgAjzPGF8Vtpz1o6uBooTHYlVJiH29oiD-a5eNAx7_KwE13l3dWbUIfO2hJeW3qsilfdKA63phHQxJn5hn1cLjPlJew9znu21Oo4FhjUcIQ_FNdbqwz3E-_rNA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4ByutxU75bvy_72XNpW1wO2FA-VOuGuaB2zTyfrm7pwut4tGXmci0dhwzTFxI9EC_tUePFkLU1e2IoUxwcqLMKuygQmaEQ8BNrBacRrWEutMYa3xa2ttvOPTvxq0nfrie_e8dty91RJ4erdaRlHN4GfoYrccqBY9rE0bHNE1P1UEfaEy8qd6bQRGb0y6JXiPxrT6eTEKyWqkO3uP7B-zGa5tw%3D%3D)
Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4ByEpShbJjtGw6-iOLtxBS_D19np37e4yEbYiBZxFhan8pnDt0o4oUzTEIgcOazp0CmbWTvVBA48_WGgdiEcrj5Qg1tIvSYIqQlZ7ivh-bJs2bHeq_F7L41DrLrWFERRaSRSA-5Id3TS7htxCuX-caSN9ON7O8LsihDeUvuPkqpM-mkra6p9dHz3P3sx3IFtedGQ-iVxYPqEI3Ge1c8VCdlgA%3D%3D)
That’s a mistake.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4Byo4gXTEeEXlbIRuiEXgCFYAJTunHGavOCFtJ1d80iYdbIxFO-ppJYdPiZb45iHK6uekj3Roh8Akh8pKxZmlA5g8M9iqMqGnfXVpCHR2yD6rpWY-EDqK9OxC83BAsVJlOmuUjWYZV03_EhDl8kB97KpvhQxD4MckEa6qdU5FU_r71B50T8JJL6FbZn_huP8srI38LuWF8AbqlZ3xH5Mp5cMQ%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month – **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4ByMhYdRc4IlLAMO86cPEmE6ayP_B4b8aubPTLfW0OcMLFUzMG6o1TEqwQxurq1J8fsYXscMRdk52LoyniCU5siGRCP6cXRMQVsKM-lAdmJimcmfVqGwGdHZG7G9XnQSWHhS1hlG-5b_uR3nLZcpQW9B4LjEmDlGsGw2c_KhMr1DFveCacv8Dy7g4LzPxkVY9shYZ8NgUiHpKMPxN84hvibFw%3D%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress this November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st**.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4ByIBjD2z-eaQxpbF8xRNKAAJcedvHYBu1LJ1j2lvkVAtZWtmVeeytp1hDGJCWm1p7jdCjDH5Do1BYb-jJE9u_7qJ7ufGdReaXMM9HVyH79seIYoiQHT36WmfuMN6I5bhYrgTK7t9TcogO12O0BBQyNV2K1wnFY4LeMIDGPmD-C7P8ajgRzR5gtnrdHtvViheEZNME8nWG2MQKkhm6--qTexg%3D%3D)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We’re counting on you to join our cause.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4BygyhObpKjm0cAKsxflKSy2IISdnChnNCZYKfXdtvYtyN914n_1uZqXL5T1TVv34kfvm2g4CGsHHhbEa7A7kA4vgLdixN-wFv8N-qM8D0rEnNnELlE3fcdFSp0gPYcCZavk5JUACEX3W7qbziWIdtfAjHNjol33L-24hmCeDB_TH4zF9Q8w5STg1LAEySC0Zf9mDRszZM9gDx9UWiYyL5aZw%3D%3D)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in the November 2020 election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ec5c73fb01ae4a74bf957f9e2c8dc0e4&_e=CSLTNq8IaIfeK1xEkVqmd2LiTp5_y6AlBeNIKn__rK37ZGcTXMtocuMtPAfPoaw1VVRg5AWTbzPmz90WmDvHh4vB_EpTb85u2S3GvLPP0Lhnhp7a7pMxHr5UIDBVT7GUg3NvINglooZKYBhnKop-i1J31fGl2gjlvPpezk3-36NP3pI-UpQHfPM-CiLvw-RtU6yp5BzW6AlCxhs7Q2Z0eAxA_r6Ljlv2LPd852NRiHvbONLC1iBqqd_RUyPabE_HXAD2jSBYyYIUu5an2jO6VfVOZJcEfhrA9jVrETsstzMFtUf4hG-NxuMq-mAPm4ByfK6cjTXkJ4-ZhopBJ0if2iJoeGZB1xON4T9GzWWveifonvkjATvVFXvvyxo1u1mYqj37eeysX77Bpq6hMnIyIH-HmQH8KUjSHt66tAvwAKuHxZo89tSVXfuMHEqtol4r7RNueTTS5RSrgwsMXJxa8-PgoZZlbeVSUe5w98NDZHT1yJffa_IEmLVsnoy0OX1svmPJu8iOGHkwJlhhqDszXg%3D%3D)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

clean_body: We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd. Don't want to receive our emails? | FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION: A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress in November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures. Peter, The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go. That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo. Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority. Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority. Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans. That’s a mistake. I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. . While the election may not be this month – we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY. A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress this November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures. We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st. Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline. The American people made it clear in the November 2020 election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. . We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House. Thank you for your support. For freedom, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

**Washington County Election Event**
On this year’s spring primary election night, a Germantown School Board candidate moved forward to the April election!
**Monroe County Caucus**

At their meeting in Trempealeau, area Republicans were joined by local and state candidates!

name: Jena Tarantin
subject: True Story - Russian War
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
|
---
My Dear Fellow American,

My name is Jena Tarantin, you’ve probably heard from my husband, [**James, who is running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=219cda861a72435e95429e86514cbd81&_e=QXGxJvhWucKB2V4vvAHGIGCVh4pz6lQELyJ0JT5rRh6WY3MMc_0FmjXUEb5XG04G6oS0lglDGGSw3Nq3jVZqbmM3qwYJac_dtXfiKkkvfTrKSXSc_rQGyhjc64C1w5iAs4mUCGN7aO4phbwPBfo5NgQ4nzWTdRZ6eU1uf4dwDTsfbgMkc1irkI5np7VoulI_OJ8BmtDFRevIFhwXxLDHyH7ws1HCJHXOlAGVgzrShzJhSpaFvAKleRe5H5iuhNgC-Eks9kM7NXwKrCg0-BsbOfH3aVoon5tVxh1zNmh3WW0x3EPndFwYwU8IOH7HjJqH6BuEFsNkF7TQZTWLPLlDxj2TpD9OuXp1Grj-aUqdB4pA7bi4xdTo0Hvf3w9AwGZ2IVrbGk0WldkXk1lAz6QGbIf9qsxfgzgKL2WPvbH1L66jpDCWPv8MtIDTfN9kzuw5yYi9UrY3F9VzogllVqxQgreyZ1kz2CJyKWzdcTYOZo0%3D)

I know you’re busy, but I wanted to reach out because as a mother and a U.S. citizen, I am worried about what we’re seeing in our nation.

My parents and I lived during the dark times of the communist Soviet Union. I remember all the restrictions that were imposed on my family and all the liberties that were taken away from us.

Despite being so young, I remember those days, and I remember when my parents decided to take me and my sister to America – **the land of opportunity.**

My parents’ brave decision to leave everything behind and pursue the American Dream, allowed me to become a nurse and a mother of two wonderful boys in the land of the free.

However, I am truly worried that the dark times my parents escaped from, is the same thing that is slowly coming back again!

**As Ronald Reagan once said,** __**“If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on Earth.”**__

**He wasn’t wrong,** that’s why so much of what we’re seeing these days has me worried.

I am worried that career politicians want power and not our best interest.

I am worried that many cities support crime as it benefits them politically.

I am worried that some cities and states are allowing illegal immigrants to vote.

I am worried that inflation is robbing our savings.

I am worried that people and their livelihoods are being replaced by robots.

I am worried that Iran will gain nuclear weapons and threaten us all.

I am worried that politicians want to control our children’s education.

I am worried that our children are being mandated to get vaccines.

I am worried that our traditional values are vanishing!

_**I am worried that we are experiencing the death of the American Dream.**_

**The land of the free is only as free as we the people allow it to be.** Without that, there is no America Dream, and there is no shining city on the hill.

[**We need solutions, not worries.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=219cda861a72435e95429e86514cbd81&_e=QXGxJvhWucKB2V4vvAHGIGCVh4pz6lQELyJ0JT5rRh6WY3MMc_0FmjXUEb5XG04G6oS0lglDGGSw3Nq3jVZqbmM3qwYJac_dtXfiKkkvfTrKSXSc_rQGyhjc64C1w5iAs4mUCGN7aO4phbwPBfo5NgQ4nzWTdRZ6eU1uf4dwDTsfbgMkc1irkI5np7VoulI_OJ8BmtDFRevIFhwXxLDHyH7ws1HCJHXOlAGVgzrShzJhSpaFvAKleRe5H5iuhNgC-Eks9kM7NXwKrCg0-BsbOZOlADOiLoBh67xhT0-SonI5QiJz1uFq823JeVxIucLMBPoc1XAlsU0N1r7pUtdSH8iQvT91PQWqjLvYJzWBlclI7OiDr73fkYFP__-a8t6vInhukgL_907mFf0KM9KAAxokszq5wah8Nkcjlg_K_mSqcMWjA1nuh1cAQS-BB7ddDqQ244fBvTFOZaPdDKG6mQSMNuWjvX5ADyMaE9M2pWc%3D) That’s why my husband, James Tarantin, is running to make history by being the first Israeli-Born Senator in the history of our country.

James is a wonderful father, a loving husband, a man of faith, an honorable fighter for traditional values and a successful businessman who legally immigrated to America with no money, no family, and no connections but was still able to build a successful life here.

Our family, along with families like yours, truly represent the American Dream. So if you are worried like I am about what we’re seeing in American, [**then please hear my voice and support my husband for the United States Senate.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=219cda861a72435e95429e86514cbd81&_e=QXGxJvhWucKB2V4vvAHGIGCVh4pz6lQELyJ0JT5rRh6WY3MMc_0FmjXUEb5XG04G6oS0lglDGGSw3Nq3jVZqbmM3qwYJac_dtXfiKkkvfTrKSXSc_rQGyhjc64C1w5iAs4mUCGN7aO4phbwPBfo5NgQ4nzWTdRZ6eU1uf4dwDTsfbgMkc1irkI5np7VoulI_OJ8BmtDFRevIFhwXxLDHyH7ws1HCJHXOlAGVgzrShzJhSpaFvAKleRe5H5iuhNgC-Eks9kM7NXwKrCg0-BsbOZyZVg6ZBee57pUe3XaO6TVztFKHspLdrJ54p_NGDR4HravBmWlbAEPJgbanJ7wwRtLk8K0c2ALkwAcVotx-Q-2YULUS1nI405qEY20H40HcZIR7UiOILrZLujTEgMCrHZ0yFOFZTKX-Ry07os-2T8PqrKNH5HRMBH4XMj1GGhk6JwkMJ-QwuK-RzwxsxZBNzSPaw7bP3kqWzEKYL8tKZkE%3D)

[**We must be a United Front.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=219cda861a72435e95429e86514cbd81&_e=QXGxJvhWucKB2V4vvAHGIGCVh4pz6lQELyJ0JT5rRh6WY3MMc_0FmjXUEb5XG04G6oS0lglDGGSw3Nq3jVZqbmM3qwYJac_dtXfiKkkvfTrKSXSc_rQGyhjc64C1w5iAs4mUCGN7aO4phbwPBfo5NgQ4nzWTdRZ6eU1uf4dwDTsfbgMkc1irkI5np7VoulI_OJ8BmtDFRevIFhwXxLDHyH7ws1HCJHXOlAGVgzrShzJhSpaFvAKleRe5H5iuhNgC-Eks9kM7NXwKrCg0-BsbOXw7oCevNZrSw1Pe27q3X0gnbv34IaiN3raKbZAbKcWNwYOc9pb-OeRg892eb2xE1Oyo0sGAt-N2pY18z9MBEH8Md2JDWyviml6pYCuV-nc8wk_PQmL3FubUaWny_EfgzMVh4lSsOr_hxzOHf6UcRJpL8MIC9uraznu9A6LgBPCDTOCZzkkOSvWvC8zt8fDDExufbYjIXszmk5NxyOvxtD4%3D) Please... if not for me, then for the love of God and our Country.

James is not a career politician. [**He is You. Our story is an America story.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=219cda861a72435e95429e86514cbd81&_e=QXGxJvhWucKB2V4vvAHGIGCVh4pz6lQELyJ0JT5rRh6WY3MMc_0FmjXUEb5XG04G6oS0lglDGGSw3Nq3jVZqbmM3qwYJac_dtXfiKkkvfTrKSXSc_rQGyhjc64C1w5iAs4mUCGN7aO4phbwPBfo5NgQ4nzWTdRZ6eU1uf4dwDTsfbgMkc1irkI5np7VoulI_OJ8BmtDFRevIFhwXxLDHyH7ws1HCJHXOlAGVgzrShzJhSpaFvAKleRe5H5iuhNgC-Eks9kM7NXwKrCg0-BsbOe-S8MdnXXdcN7aF10eDDGvx5EdPjBZ95rdHfpKacmOBZn91a7ilkqAIKiyHreTriPkwpRVBiXWIZlSxywg6ezWdklwcCeiYZjmvNmshxVEygjZ233xmAIalpjpAuPAHuYiC8cub2c_1tU8rneHbP817vw-PEY7qz0ZDNKl2g4huQzbD80ScD-L3BUJwqJBwLc3ViZpiOwPrM_I-uRqmXEk%3D)

America’s future is up to us, let’s work together and leave it better than we found it.

Thank you,

**Jena Tarantin**

P.S. I wish to share with you a note my grandfather left for me before he passed away in the Soviet Union:

May the American People be with you down every road you roam.
And may its compassion surround you when you're far from my wooden home.
And may you grow to be conservative, kind and true.
And do unto others as you'd have done to you.
Be brave my dear child as the fighters in World War Two.
And in my heart you'll always stay bright as the Light that comes America’s shores.

America Forever
America Forever

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=219cda861a72435e95429e86514cbd81&_e=QXGxJvhWucKB2V4vvAHGIGCVh4pz6lQELyJ0JT5rRh6WY3MMc_0FmjXUEb5XG04G6oS0lglDGGSw3Nq3jVZqbmM3qwYJac_dtXfiKkkvfTrKSXSc_rQGyhjc64C1w5iAs4mUCGN7aO4phbwPBfo5NgQ4nzWTdRZ6eU1uf4dwDTsfbgMkc1irkI5np7VoulI_OJ8BmtDFRevIFhwXxLDHyH7ws1HCJHXOlAGVgzrShzJhSpaFvAKleRe5H5iuhNgC-Eks9kM7NXwKrCg0-BsbObTaVmtZ2674XgiboYLyI1u64FBZP7-bUCyUwTbcjtFThMa9ERPRNlPrclmXvDIkeSg6RYybrxdMEYJCL94MmxmW6DcfAJ1Dz8YbhUSb0jouXv8W4aFZYhXgWzPaAcWXGJD8o5Min9Va7VkxJ7Ib5VPbUBs6hXc_VC7bY-3fi8YZcZ7CqSMDjq99X_s3fBr8UOIu-J2QO7eWDg55sK2Uf2w%3D)

| | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
---

Be brave my dear child as the fighters in World War Two. And in my heart you'll always stay bright as the Light that comes America’s shores. America Forever America Forever | | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
| | | I don't have a moment to spare - so please read every word I'm about to write:

**There are just 150 minutes left before my critical End of Month Deadline - and before time runs out, I'd be so grateful for your $3 to defend our Democratic House Majority:**

**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccfeb2022](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Look: Grassroots supporters like you have never been more important to me or to our Democratic Trifecta.

The most important election year of our lives is getting into full swing.

And at this critical moment, early 2022 donors will have an outsized influence on defending our democracy and keeping the dangerous GOP out of power.

That's why I'm personally IMPLORING committed Democrats like you to rise to the occasion with $3 to help my House Democrats meet my can't-miss End of Month goal.

| This is the last time you’ll hear from me or my team this month.
