body:
I apologize for being so blunt, but I just read a text from my finance director:
| | |
---
Friend, I apologize for being so blunt, but I just read a text from my finance director with awful news: I fell just $9,561 short of my most crucial End of Month fundraising goal.
When I miss my important goals, I risk my chance of winning in Florida – particularly since Marco Rubio and the GOP are raising millions to defeat me.
So here’s what I’m seeing, friend: Marco Rubio and the Republican establishment are going to keep raising huge sums of money. They're already attacking me, and they'll keep attacking me. **That's why I cannot lose any ground – not when Florida's last Senate race was decided by only 10,033 votes. So I asked my team to pull your supporter record, and here's what I saw:**
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**

Every dollar goes directly to defending our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42414196/332871141/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2542-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDEyNGYyNC03Yzk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qZD6C2gLvEcVe5Qc8vCh529SZlV4MD7tBxfISGGOjvk=)

With Marco Rubio having a record fundraising quarter while we're falling short of our grassroots goals, I'm worried we'll have to make some difficult decisions like pulling back ads or our voter registration efforts. I know engaged supporters like you don't want to see that happen.

name: Hunt for Congress
subject: Today is Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Election Day is finally here and if you haven't done so already, we encourage you to head to the polls and vote! We have the opportunity to elect Wesley to Texas' new 38th Congressional district who will fight to secure our southern border, for the lives of the unborn, and for our 2nd Amendment! But, in order to do so, we need you to cast your vote.

[Find a polling location near you](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=908784c990454c068ed91940e71d86f0&_e=_f7AhR4HbixAgDVgw22zgX6diwPuyThRJAfLqehcfvmgBJqnE25WCNWJy8qzrIasAMRFY3PWJ6kyyb_fxXAju7hvKwxO-hOz9gfj-XgJN3sgLMCNQqH3ycVNoIKaw2adERUbz0oydSBEe7qW1eVMUt3Yx3m_afL37Tn_NWLXSYpq9us9TJTUuVqjMvsULwm0BSjCtQ-CQPfDOwQimqQukPdpvEb7zgu65eaQRh6sZGc7T66GEK-Rf-KiBOMlSRb6eV-e6nubqsEq6uw5KZoc621RXN1EVT7U7mvt__WpRcY%3D) and go vote! This year, Houston's energy jobs, the safety of our communities, and fixing hyper-inflation are all on the ballot.

Your vote has never mattered more - vote for Wesley Hunt today!

[Find your polling location here!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=908784c990454c068ed91940e71d86f0&_e=_f7AhR4HbixAgDVgw22zgX6diwPuyThRJAfLqehcfvmgBJqnE25WCNWJy8qzrIasqhSJfeZ6mZYZNBZHuRvu7iK-NGnNansUxyvX1iG0efGpcg3zxiQeExRXS0vpPXusOB0-VudIZZCAybl80NiYC1YpA0cDtZefR5V7nYqn3xUSTrPNHkOj05Wb6Z4kTS_zzEvIMaQoTiyBzvlJbxguFCYs5IxqjMt407tG0VPHrimJji4QRd_4YT_sDy2SJbgNHIt9Oli_zSkjeLEr210DvLQr5zDutOVg9Op2OPifZH4%3D)
Sincerely,
Team Hunt

subject: Biden’s State of the Union Address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
It'll be a total Snoozefest

Friend,

You are always someone I can count on to tell me the truth. You've never failed me when I needed you the most.

I urgently need your input on a critical survey that my team just launched: our _**[Official State of the Nation Survey.>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59726653:WN_RTBHNA:m:1:2532013465:AA512009687BFCE45002B3077A2AC577:r)**_

Thank you,

name: Team Reeves
subject: Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement By Pete Snyder
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Reeves for Congress
body:
Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement By Pete Snyder
| | |
---
| | [](https://ltf91f0r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100017f4571cc8b-7bd41873-4ed2-4531-a252-0c09c2711701-000000/be_4fsSHbfkBkHMuBziY1rIToaY=260)
---
|
---
| Bryce Reeves Announces Endorsement By Conservative Leader Pete Snyder
---
|
---
| I'm both honored and excited to announce that our campaign has received the endorsement of Pete Snyder, in the race for the 7th Congressional District! For those of you who may not know Pete, he is the CEO of Disruptor Capital, one of the Co-Founders of the VA 30 Day Fund, and a major conservative leader (and outlaw) in Virginia! I've worked with Pete on countless conservative initiatives for over a decade. Pete knows how important it is for our leaders to sign the front of checks - not just the back. _As a business owner in Stafford county, I know how hard it can be for folks struggling under relentless government regulation to make payroll._ I've always fought for our businesses - I want our entrepreneurs to hire more people and grow, not bear a giant bureaucratic burden.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| As a highly successful businessman and the founder of a charity that saved countless businesses across Virginia, Pete knows real leadership when he sees it. I take it as an honor to have his endorsement and support in this race. Unlike Abigail Spanberger, **I'm ready to bring real leadership to this district** \- and I'm ready to bring it on _Day One_. [Will you join our team too?](https://ltf91f0r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.brycereeves.com%2Fvolunteer%2F/1/0100017f4571cc8b-7bd41873-4ed2-4531-a252-0c09c2711701-000000/NFhvc849Cbt1kusH9j2pUhAgbmI=260) Sincerely,Bryce Reeves

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: The fight to protect abortion rights continues
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We are not going to let the extreme conservatives succeed.
#
Peter,
Like you, I’m frustrated by the failed vote in the Senate to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and codify Roe v. Wade into law. The GOP’s obstruction means that patients in states like Texas and others across the country will continue to have unconstitutional barriers to getting the reproductive health care they need.
But I’ve been in this fight for my whole career, and I am certainly not about to give up now. We are _**not**_ going to let Mitch McConnell and extreme conservatives succeed in rolling back the right to abortion and reproductive health care.
Republicans haven’t just been working to ban abortions, they’ve also been undermining birth control, family planning programs, and so much more. Their cruel efforts from every angle mean that there is a lot we can and must do to protect all aspects of reproductive health care–including expanding our Democratic majority in the Senate with progressive, pro-choice champions.
I’m committed to doing everything in my power to advance legislation that protects reproductive rights for patients, not only in Washington state but in every corner of the United States.
And I’m so grateful to have people like you in this fight to defend the right to abortion and reproductive health care. Especially at a time like this when Roe v. Wade is on the line at the Supreme Court, we need to stand up and make our voices heard.
Thank you as always,
Senator Patty Murray

** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42418097/332886221/373903613?refcode=pm_em_220301_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmE0ZDgyNS04Njk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3yQGnwBR0cfTeMfFnAqJKsGRrODQuoUld0ZW5DTezQE=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *

clean_body: We are not going to let the extreme conservatives succeed. Peter, Like you, I’m frustrated by the failed vote in the Senate to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and codify Roe v. Wade into law. The GOP’s obstruction means that patients in states like Texas and others across the country will continue to have unconstitutional barriers to getting the reproductive health care they need. But I’ve been in this fight for my whole career, and I am certainly not about to give up now. We are not going to let Mitch McConnell and extreme conservatives succeed in rolling back the right to abortion and reproductive health care. Republicans haven’t just been working to ban abortions, they’ve also been undermining birth control, family planning programs, and so much more. Their cruel efforts from every angle mean that there is a lot we can and must do to protect all aspects of reproductive health care–including expanding our Democratic majority in the Senate with progressive, pro-choice champions. I’m committed to doing everything in my power to advance legislation that protects reproductive rights for patients, not only in Washington state but in every corner of the United States. And I’m so grateful to have people like you in this fight to defend the right to abortion and reproductive health care. Especially at a time like this when Roe v. Wade is on the line at the Supreme Court, we need to stand up and make our voices heard. Thank you as always, Senator Patty Murray **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

| | Dear Peter, If you’re following the news in Florida right now, you probably know that things don’t look good. Costs are skyrocketing, and instead of helping, Republicans are attacking women, LGBTQ+ people, and nearly anyone who isn’t on board with Ron DeSantis’ radical agenda. **It’s time to stop the bleeding, shift our focus, and take action. We need to take bold action to address Florida’s skyrocketing cost of living. That means building more affordable housing, helping Floridians buy homes, lowering property insurance rates, and raising wages. ** [**That’s why today, I’m announcing my run for Chief Financial Officer, one of only four statewide elected offices in Florida. Click here to become a founding donor to my campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42418554/332887924/1900529357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDU0NjkyOS04ODk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3EQYusLX8VWnITvU0y3qzYR-jZxfINQGpMLNr8o1OI=&emci=ba5cae7a-8699-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=d4546929-8899-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=6767893)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42418555/332887926/1900529357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDU0NjkyOS04ODk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3EQYusLX8VWnITvU0y3qzYR-jZxfINQGpMLNr8o1OI=&emci=ba5cae7a-8699-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=d4546929-8899-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=6767893)
---
When I joined the U.S. Navy 22 years ago, I never imagined that serving my country would mean seeking elected office. After winning Florida’s most competitive State House race in 2018, I even wrote a book called _Accidental Politician. _ **Now, I see the challenges we’re facing. Our state has one of the highest uninsured rates in the country. Fewer and fewer Floridians can afford to buy a home. And we’re not protecting our infrastructure from the threat of climate change. ** We need to do better, and that’s why I’m running for CFO. In the coming weeks, we’ll dive deeper into what this office actually does and how I’ll tangibly improve the lives of Floridians as a cabinet member. [**Here’s the bottom line: I’m a Democrat running to end more than two decades of one-party rule in Tallahassee and deliver results for you and your family. If you’re with me, click here to become a founding donor today. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42418556/332887929/1900529357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDU0NjkyOS04ODk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3EQYusLX8VWnITvU0y3qzYR-jZxfINQGpMLNr8o1OI=&emci=ba5cae7a-8699-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=d4546929-8899-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=6767893)

**[Become a Founding Donor](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42418557/332887932/1900529357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDU0NjkyOS04ODk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3EQYusLX8VWnITvU0y3qzYR-jZxfINQGpMLNr8o1OI=&emci=ba5cae7a-8699-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=d4546929-8899-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=6767893)**

name: Rick Scott
subject: Children need families.
body:
Peter,
The nuclear family is crucial to civilization.

It is God’s design for humanity, and it must be protected and celebrated.

_But the fanatical left seeks to devalue and redefine the traditional family, as they undermine parents and attempt to replace them with government programs._

__We will not allow Socialism to place the needs of the state ahead of the family_._

**I put together an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA, and protecting the family is a CRITICAL point of our plan.**

I want to show the world that America won’t give up on the nuclear family, so I put together a survey to show YOUR support for the most important unit in America.

[**Please take our “Family First” survey TODAY to let us know if YOU think we should be doing more to support the nuclear family.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=26121c73e54f44fa8572a46f50011d8f&_e=aYrcxYUTYhYBp5a7bAMAl8nu4WBUZ79Gd52UPeglJqv7fFbKgXEuRQN8Xgsc2SCJnrY60BbZNuCvizIRg6NFIX0HSAgbtjmjfCIaRBQ0la5uQT-TZPDxtkphfDjF6o4AsifdL5c7MlwZsFme2DX81gYSUxba4DuAf00-09SLneOetJ4az2eMUay931CO1TNkhsW3VZpipSNqGU3MHGP8MHbTQJUg_BhgmDC6JZbZmSBMqvCPVyCbqArwvy_X3BQ-F3G4k7Pz1TLsS4T7el41lC7aNifnbklpFHJUATplQ_-dkFuPHm7Ux-Oofrz_IbZaNFhRiGZihzTCtuF72ZTi_CqC0GnKRQOKrcj07yzVWD-10LZCh442-5wEbpcDBT_lD9ERsAJp7XXSWmSv61N-38ZUkwFwOPxXw5TJL3NS5QY%3D)

name: Paxton's Patriots
subject: Vote For Ken Paxton to Keep Defending Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update March 1, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update March 1, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Texans deserve an Attorney General who shares their conservative values & will fight Joe Biden & his radical policies at every turn. Vote for Ken Paxton so he can continue his work to defend our state & the Constitution every single day.

**Link: **[https://www.votetexas.gov/faq/where-to-vote.html](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=c722dd905aa8473095fd72157e276a73&_e=24OK5Ceu7nMkQe9HLJxYzzIs3-TFfwDNspwQnX19KU9qJ8H2-aCOhFiHBMnlW2ZfuNuCFCPwvX_jc-xhCWiNsHATgPBDnEvaaK3LUU5wSpGxWsbuDY7jyDIK0lXUyJNXvTFqjUffF7BkrbrY-8f7lng92nOQnutM5kUrTeXv9JKSNsv4_n4Sy4Ve8Bzvuazv9NEOQuc4RkLJ_7ZOB_WhRJlzVLKewAxTOVZXx67BxHRpzEnxkh3r215Xjq-Rksx4ZD6oxsrUMIG-zKcr-26ROM1NtV_j1QnePx7g_NWYn-U%3D)

**Theme of the Day: Vote For Ken Paxton to Keep Defending Texas**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable for their refusal to enforce our immigration laws, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. He'll never stop fighting for you. ~ Ken Paxton is endorsed by the National Rifle Association, CPAC, Texas Alliance for Life, Texas Homeschool Coalition, Hispanics Against Socialism, Collin County Conservative Republicans, BIZPAC, United Republicans, Asian Republican Club of North Texas, Dallas Police Association, Collin County Deputies Association, and the Houston Police Officer’s Union Political Action Committee.

~ Ken Paxton has a proven record of success against the Biden administration, specifically on the border and immigration-related cases. That's why he's the most effective and best candidate to continue as AG. His record of effectiveness and success against this reckless and liberal administration and their efforts to take away Texans’ fundamental freedoms speaks for itself.

~ Ken Paxton is deeply devoted to America’s founding values and the conservative values Texans hold dear. Ken Paxton has a deep passion and respect for our U.S. Constitution that he's shown through his previous service in the Texas House, Senate, and now as Attorney General.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=c722dd905aa8473095fd72157e276a73&_e=24OK5Ceu7nMkQe9HLJxYz-GrEq1zVnXz0Dq8rwdnV5VLwCyvEAADy-kQmbrGPJkSpNnE6WL1UHj6nIymxDi6yL6lfQa6FWUoHgkLZLsrQMZe642FitMkYbCRk2z-jYzUD4trQPt4SQYvrj-iFNOgR4g8Mf2_wj2oYUd5GuNxSKrXcHEkNLvqN9JJCHGJCLIEv1EYimtAwqE_iqTKmG4mw2ttt4u6KICR4w7-WJdp_vFF3ewmpJkGQwmQ9KON-VmP7oAqsGaIXhGJsG_K2vqvGw%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=c722dd905aa8473095fd72157e276a73&_e=24OK5Ceu7nMkQe9HLJxYz-GrEq1zVnXz0Dq8rwdnV5VLwCyvEAADy-kQmbrGPJkS4av4FBu_2eJQBIptqEWZMmsUgGqUlggXSw0aBcNDquKpjxKyWhtu07F6yT-C2_2snDllue-8dCpytpCld_EHoBVh2t7vbfhlSq6-9UU71pxwzznRLbU00SFgOOjlBcNvHe8US2A8choRTl_LadwEoIcWc2HKrXTDZE7Oh2AJ1mJyWzGNSjYKE542OiZNaBl0wXlTH0QrXkw50KMo1-QDZg%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=c722dd905aa8473095fd72157e276a73&_e=24OK5Ceu7nMkQe9HLJxYz-GrEq1zVnXz0Dq8rwdnV5VLwCyvEAADy-kQmbrGPJkSOKTr_6z5NT9d_4vH86_MoPVQKVeainpNwYZeLhXoOrpFXOMdprNNHNSsjgkGm5OQuFF3jhHY571vTpamcnOK96PD2NDCLBm040SPaZz3r5Wnml26v0E8anE0PZbcuUd_oguELBDJsY2efxrtSpwoiAtdwi8WPNzDjtbKnX_l0x0Qb40Xw_5f0F5TyI5Xl2fsud4_Sy8H9EaaWWyPrZcTMw%3D%3D)

**[Paxton's Patriots](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=c722dd905aa8473095fd72157e276a73&_e=24OK5Ceu7nMkQe9HLJxYz-GrEq1zVnXz0Dq8rwdnV5VLwCyvEAADy-kQmbrGPJkSqER8bdsuiiSflyqwHbMyb3gLe_pesKw-T3XxUD4vMgFs-TfZkey3RmFxGX4h8VRNie_cWuPG8dw7ZmTA7c3WqFFbouMA9tftB3BRp4oY_dmlJyxfCn_Ocy1HFNmrfzhALGGhlPRAnr6o5G4i91kmykiGJkU66Xg-pcRtB-9A20LnWDGFUY8E_XwzZ4bnEq-AFTFl_eJnKB354qPQx6Ku9w%3D%3D)** | [**DONATE** ](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=c722dd905aa8473095fd72157e276a73&_e=24OK5Ceu7nMkQe9HLJxYz09UB7uUmLVCXuMlBBEWbxO6Ebu1W7kPQfYCFQqQgNzlQtzeZrkcdgtLNAUULxmgETefqeTSw-JnYtUjJ17xrFGrpNSx81wtCZWH39kgWnkl2NRcbqhzQT7CcfB9O_N3uAMpLhzKzfaPpzVXb8PTTL5Sc7p4K2_AnCTzYhC0TNROgfMNT1a8Ub0SRU134p8WvPrTWGPA4Z8Tn8-pup52oDhVROwU2tnCtvS2LG19IGajdY0mTarEeB8rhf-DcfcHkG6ClduFaAGCj9m_KShkxQa4l01HYQ8MDv-JbAS0O7wKs0QsEoVtczFwoBH5bpLDMgPQqbq0ADO9OPWQEVORssLnqoK2vfgc7VV2EuxBDQc65PfigLLojMtVyQwfwLoqUQStrz6SCXGL2HmPoBFF_ZObdtGk9kFHOfbIeEA2-BPL5jOX2igdfZS921jv8fTdKYunLByJGIKnbVd8ezeth5tvmDUt-RIs05QGGOfovG-7eHInjkigBDUzW42dPa3Xmr7LO5O6HyNylyyUc33Md6Q%3D)

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: President Biden's SCOTUS nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Last week, President Biden nominated an outstanding, capable, and historic judge to serve on the Supreme Court.

If confirmed, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson would be the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court and would carry on Justice Stephen Breyer's legacy of fighting for equality and justice.

Our institutions should look like the people they represent, and I applaud President Biden for getting us one step closer to the Supreme Court reflecting America's diversity.

Now that President Biden has done his job and nominated a highly qualified Supreme Court justice, it's time for the Senate to do their job and confirm her. [**Before President Biden 's SOTU address, add your name if you agree that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson deserves a fair and speedy confirmation process in the Senate >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UEdr-5sOBBBgJ06i97-Igyh2x2gPiY6zdORRfIyrV4c=/_MNKNMhjq_n0Puy2D_jA5N04jYk3JglQe6VULLrLaA8=?ms=em22_220301_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_220301_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_220301_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220301_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/UEdr-5sOBBBgJ06i97-Igyh2x2gPiY6zdORRfIyrV4c=/RDsuNJmGPv62RembC7Nunikt4SOQE3QaYnEj7-e2geA=?refcode=em22_220301_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220301_SCOTUS_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

body:
| |

# **Campaign Updates
**
---
|
---
**Help Get John on the Ballot!** Thank you to those who came out last week and are now collecting signatures to ensure that John Gibbs is on the ballot. This is the only way to ensure that voters have another choice and a chance to **_fire meijer_**. We have a goal of collecting 2,000 ballot petition signatures by April. We will need volunteers to work a table with us at the**Grand Rapids Gun & Knife the weekend of March 5-6 and the Ultimate Sports Show March 10-13** to help get signatures. Please sign up below for a time slot. The Volunteer that collects the most signatures for John will be invited as a guest to attend John's fundraiser at**Mar-a-Lago on March 30th with President Trump** giving remarks and Dr. Ben Carson as a special guest. __ _(Travel and lodging not included)_
---
|
---
**Grand Rapids Gun & Knife Show** Please [**Click Here**](https://signup.zone/bcDKzDpP65RgEQSnK) to sign up for a time slot. **Date:** 03/05/22 & 03/06/22 **Location:** 4 Mile Showplace 1025 Four Mile Rd NW
Grand Rapids, MI 49544
---
|
---
**Ultimate Sports Show - Grand Rapids** Please [**Click Here**](https://signup.zone/9TjNdQqfWYfneMLpD) to sign up for a time slot **Date:** 03/10/22 - 03/13/22 **Location:** DeVos Place
303 Monroe Ave NW
Grand Rapids, MI 49503
---
|
---
_***** If you have not received your picture from the Dr. Carson event on February 7, please reply to this email with your name and whether you attended the VIP Founder or Patriot event.**_
---
Please check out our website!
---
[ **VoteJohnGibbs.com** ](https://www.votejohngibbs.com)
---
[ Paid for by John Gibbs for Congress ]()

|

[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgehcmm7itf9nrqelpo3c66icir4d1ipj9o1lcng_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chim9ob2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onle2qj6s9h6dq30s34m4o61c5ks5ie0pr7mhpj8pj763ib8orj6kpb8tdhmdoe1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dj662qbbd77m8p6cc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

Friend,

This week, I made it official...and filed the paperwork to be on the ballot as a candidate for the governor of Arkansas! It was an incredible moment and was made more special by having my family by my side.

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3raaaemhl27gm5eiqvlikt1o7vst08476pto210_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chim9ob2cph2bs)
I am running for governor because I love our state and care about our people. Arkansas is home, and I want our kids to grow to love our state just as much as we do. This means enacting bold, conservative reforms that unleash our full potential and standing up to the Radical Left in the fight for freedom. I am thankful for the overwhelming support we have received so far from tens of thousands of supporters across the state and country.

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z463j30m2rqqjojjcq29i7gseh57atpakgpafffo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chim9ob2cph2bs)
|
---
[**Will you continue to stand with me and chip-in right now to our Victory Fund?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr7up2vufnvb97omhld9mvg7mg1qbtpbo5r1d35o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chim9ob2cph2bs) We know the far-left is going to attack me at every turn, and we need to be prepared to fight back and win.
[**YES: CHIP IN $35**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zi3g4blm4v479aimpdbrq0brlbaof4oggs8uc0c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chim9ob2cph2bs)
[**YES: CHIP IN $45**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zal1d33c3304h488br01e8poiagkd31s3ubrt7bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chim9ob2cph2bs)
[**YES: CHIP IN $55**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5tgs9lq784ugs55ndv65kn2vpfogkd290d0jq58_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chim9ob2cph2bs)
[**YES: CHIP IN $65**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2lnk61rb76g553nlro8mcbelf1ogph8a7qvpp1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chim9ob2cph2bs)
Thank you for everything you do in the fight for freedom,

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

**[P.S. Any amount you can donate to our Victory Fund will go a long way to helping us win in 2022. Click here to make a donation.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z32h54o1eroqru36oe977n635jmgh63eo9jdh7a0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chim9ob2cph2bs)**

| | Team, As I reflect on another month on the campaign trail, I wanted to take a moment to thank you. It’s because of hundreds of supporters like you who joined us to power this grassroots movement that we had such a successful February. We organized and elected hundreds of delegates to the Democratic convention at caucuses across the state. We expanded our coalition: earning the endorsements of twenty racial justice leaders across the Commonwealth and Progressive Mass, an organization that has taken on tough fights with me for years. And we met with voters and community leaders all across the state to talk about the bold, transformational change we can win together. Campaigns are long and hard. But I see the momentum we’re building every day, thanks to your support. And I know that we can win — together. Thanks for being a part of this movement. Saludos,

Sonia P.S. March is going to be one of our most important fundraising months, and we need to make sure we start it off on the right foot. name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Check it out. It's the Weekly roundup.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I received the endorsement of Sheriff Scott Hodshire and got some positive press after one of my opponents criticized the police as “weak-kneed.” | | | |
---
| | |
# Another Great Week
---
|
---
| Dear Peter:

I had another great week of campaigning throughout our state last week. Not only did I pick up the [**endorsement of Hillsdale County Sheriff Scott Hodshire**](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=ee6c5a4e04&e=0636b97700), but I received some positive press after one of my opponents had the audacity to criticize the Michigan State Police as “weak-kneed” in a desperate fundraising letter. **[You can read about it here](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=e66e9b94aa&e=0636b97700).**

I spent a wonderful evening in **Mount Pleasant** with citizens from Isabella and Gratiot counties. I appreciate the **Isabella County GOP** for hosting the event. It was great to see so many candidates for state representative willing to step up and serve the citizens, and I thoroughly enjoyed discussing issues with local residents.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| It’s very important to travel the state listening to voters concerns about the direction of the state, and I’ll continue to campaign in every corner of Michigan. That’s the only way we’re going to defeat Governor Whitmer in November.
---
| |
---
Also during the week, I visited **Secret Garden At The Harbor** to hear from parents about their concerns with education in Michigan. Over and over parents tell me they feel cut out of the education process by school bureaucrats while radical ideas like critical race theory make their way into the classroom. As a parent myself, I understand these concerns.

Parents must have a say in what their kids are being taught in schools. I’m for full transparency and accountability in our schools.
---
| I’m also a strong advocate for giving parents as many options as possible for their children – whether that means private schools, charter schools, home schooling or other options.

In **Hale** , I started the day of campaigning with a great breakfast at **Big Bob's Breakfast & Lunch**. It was pleasure meeting the owner Bob Grove. He’s been in business 40 plus years and survived Whitmer’s shutdowns with great community support.
---
|
---
---
| I then had an eye-opening tour of **Darton Archery**. Darton Archery employees close to 30 people, and also subcontracts with other Michigan manufacturers for parts. They personally make 90% of the products or parts that go into manufacturing their top-of-the-line archery equipment.

I even got to assemble my own Maverick XT compound bow.
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| Yes that was a real shot from 20 yards.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=8e929b8492&e=0636b97700)
---
| I was happy to spend some time talking with folks at Beckley's M65 Bait Shop. They had a lot of great questions, and I was pleased I could share my vision for how we Fix Michigan. Of course, it starts by getting rid of Gretchen Whitmer.
---
|
---
| Finally, a trip to Hale would not be complete without a stop at **Alward's Market Makin' Bacon** for some bacon. They sold over 22,000 pounds last year.
---
|
---
| I understand rural Michigan and the challenges the residents face. As Governor, I’ll prioritize roads and infrastructure, including working to make broadband internet more available to small businesses, and development of broader educational opportunities for our rural communities.

It's one thing to visit rural America, but it's another thing to know it. I'm a country kid at heart having grown up in rural Michigan.

If you haven't signed up to help, please do so today. Volunteer, donate, endorse – anything and everything helps.

See you on the campaign trail!

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor

---
| [VISIT OUR WEBSITE TO VOLUNTEER OR ENDORSE](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=6aa9462c90&e=0636b97700 "VISIT OUR WEBSITE TO VOLUNTEER OR ENDORSE")
---

---

You won’t want to miss it, folks. He’ll be covering major issues facing the U.S. and proposals to address them – most notably the Russian war in Ukraine and the ongoing Covid-19 pandemic. Elaine will be in attendance and is hoping President Biden will also address his Supreme Court nominee, Ketanji Brown Jackson, and Democrats’ path to victory in the midterm elections. name: Mark Kelly
subject: you deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42422397/332903301/1927938479?refcode=20220301_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTFmODgxNC05Mjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yf7u2V-F-D6setq3e2mY-Mbm3y4rIrcWsqo8Kq70C-I=)
Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a contribution to help me defend this Senate seat. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here’s the truth: We may not know who our Republican opponent will be, but they sure know who they’re up against: Us. So, while we wait, dark money groups and corporate special interests are running millions of dollars in attack ads against us. While we wait, Donald Trump is rallying his supporters by saying: “Taking back America starts with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate." We may have to wait to know who our opponent will be, but we cannot wait to raise the money we need to win. And with our deadline just a few weeks away, I have to ask: [**Can you please split a contribution of $25 or whatever you can afford between my campaign and Seth Moulton, today? name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Appreciation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=logo]
Folks, I'm happy to share that late last night we met the biggest grassroots fundraising goal yet of our campaign to win this critical open seat.
Thank you to everyone who chipped in to help us get there! And thank you to everyone who signed my digital birthday card -- the outpouring of support and encouragement means so much.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=body_image [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=body_image]It was great to be joined on my birthday by so many fired-up campaign volunteers for our first Day of Action. Our team is knocking on doors across Prince George’s, talking with voters about the things that matter most, and organizing for victory.
We can't afford to wait years or decades for progress we can make today. Democrats have got to band together to elect as many progressive voices up and down the ballot as we can, including right here in Maryland’s Fourth Congressional District. If we can stay the course and put in the hard work, we can connect with enough voters by our June 28 Democratic Primary to make it happen.
I'm ready to deliver on criminal justice reform, health care, economic equity, and so much more as an effective, unabashedly progressive voice for our families in Congress. I know by continuing to work together, we can and will win this seat for the people.
With deep appreciation,
Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_february?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: The abortion industry’s latest horror
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqvrind78r9l0arrk9iq0mcu7p6mgmil6duva0do_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqeed9gcio76d76murb4t1gecojcthlc5pbcd5k66rr2pb3cqq34olimsojadjgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lgbbc77m9omcd776diefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5hm8or4c9g69oh5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuoi6csgvufitk7sguuldqjg609jr8rr2pggba00_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj0cjh2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American,
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme six years ago.
But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act.
**Far from it! **
While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._**
[**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4unj6nef18iqaqu7bhrle4agih9mqtr0a2f7b30_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj0cjh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zes6s57sbqu64amuokhhs2rtrs38q9tdsubvvfkg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj0cjh2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways.
They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation.
On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time.
My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters.
[**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdpn6rjoa5k0duorjh999a1o4u30b3u1f8dkhv38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj0cjh2bs)
Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**.
While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._
[**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zre6mr1bk921l84iprkr0jl95g6msmjlr1qtb8ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj0cjh2bs)
That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood.
[**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbcti1fcnf7kv7urun47s93pgjl5h90bhf4qmq98_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj0cjh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0pp3l7qcf91bivvkg7ubshqe82oql2nrb8opv60_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj0cjh2bs) Thank you for your support, God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278
---

name: State of the Union 2022 (via Unite the Country)
subject: We’re just hours away!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:
Tune in at 9 pm EST. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42422751/332905613/1582314273?refcode=utc_em_logoT_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkYTIwYjU3LTk0OTktZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4MGVkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7R2f582G2mtSXnyRg7g20GQAVN0Or770oKDfG8KB1ck=) | **🔴 Tune into President Biden’s FIRST-EVER State of the Union Address tonight at 9 pm EST! 🔴** **[We’re counting on 500 supporters to rush $25 before his historic address to support Democrats and President Biden’s ambitious agenda>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42422752/332905614/-859158021?refcode=em_UTC_FR_StateoftheUnionAddress_030122_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkYTIwYjU3LTk0OTktZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4MGVkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7R2f582G2mtSXnyRg7g20GQAVN0Or770oKDfG8KB1ck=)**
---
Peter, thanks to the president’s bold leadership, our unemployment numbers are down, wages are rising, and disposable income is up. President Biden is doing everything he can to move our country forward.
But the stakes couldn’t be higher — from protecting voting rights, economic relief, and investing in the middle class — we still have a long road ahead, and Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to derail the president’s agenda.
**That’s why we must stand united with President Biden ahead of his big speech tonight.**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8kpciodt9aid72c2pbl65pt6r8ai28e3tqm5vh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj3c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2ob363hr9dhgssojcptnmuqn6cbncphr0or0m3gn6cj1edq62obiehq72db6c3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6cc5gmmoefclmcoqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp5b0er3tqu62pkafqh8anae5h9ft2idajuckvog_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj3c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrap960ddnvhsp95iuso4c5o0q2mv1fkhjs6qhrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj3c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8shoct4lc3k3jhh8p4qqihmfuuvbovir7a5e240_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj3c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zvodr17pmobdvkc519u9b3gg2ialfe23sj4eh3ro).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm4apm7f68nq2vlgb47s85fm8bhsdrrmq2st9vdg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cdi66p32cdh649fg)

name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: The abortion industry’s latest horror
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z735jt1ifbvev6u4t2jmui01phpt9mbksal0m7k0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onnm8ojbdpim9hb8c70s4r31ornm2onedb0s6qmcopimarj0tjlcsojdchgehq30puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dj662obbc77maomccbgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdjdl3m3hnuqmmiq5b6d4moh2ot93nhddn1tdf7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj4cth2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme six years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z84l7h7sn91qf7sii9ljgarjd8ehkbbbaudctld8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj4cth2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb5tcdvgi91sd4u7tikfk6vctpb5rbl0kmql3ji8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj4cth2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3b0119brprva2mu5rcr1nq9a9nfg0tpv60hlll8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj4cth2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze62am2n9cossilj4l7417odp6hlbitnb1cctfqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj4cth2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsu99h2imuc43cghnqluprit0qin9frtmd79kh28_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj4cth2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcjcab6tllehst5jl61epv52kdcc13p46569fpc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm8oj4cth2bs) God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. While Joe Biden may call Pennsylvania “home”, he doesn’t know anything about being a TRUE Pennsylvanian. Thanks, Team Barletta P.S. name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: My Interview with Team Rayceen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Earlier this month, I did an interview with Team Rayceen [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7eguT7V2JZs] , a DC based digital media company which aims to entertain, inform, educate, and inspire local communities in the DMV area. In the interview, I shared my experiences growing up in Virginia’s 8th to immigrant parents, attending Stanford University on scholarship, and my work experience in the technology sector.
I also highlighted my top 3 issues that I believe are affecting Virginia’s 8th. Click below to hear where I stand on the following issues:
*
New
leadership
for
the
new
economy
(4:40
mark)
*
Affordable
housing
(5:54
mark)
*
Climate
change
(6:32
mark)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7eguT7V2JZs [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7eguT7V2JZs]
I am grateful for the opportunity to highlight the issues and provide our ideas and solutions, but I am more than ready to start putting action behind it. For too long, Congress has been stagnant with policies that benefit the people. If elected, I will fight to bring these issues to light and ensure that the district has a strong voice in Congress. Will you make a contribution to my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=rayceen]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=rayceen_10] $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=rayceen_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=rayceen_50] $75 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=rayceen_75]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=rayceen_100] OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane_other=true&refcode=rayceen_other]
Your support means everything. Thank you!
Victoria
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_headshot [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_headshot]
EXPRESS DONATE to Victoria Virasingh for Congress
If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BEL&refcode2=EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BEL&refcode2=EL25&express_lane=true&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BEL&refcode2=EL50&express_lane=true&amount=50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BEL&refcode2=EL100&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]

name: Karen Bass
subject: Thank you in advance for this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Reaching out again about the extended deadline.
Team —

We are facing once-in-a-generation crises, and Angelenos deserve a mayor who will work tirelessly to heal our city. I entered this race because I saw my city was bleeding, and I asked myself: "How can I not do everything I can to help?"

There are no simple solutions, and I know I am ready to do the work. But first, I need your help.

We had an important end-of-month deadline last night, and we just barely missed our goal. This was our first deadline since I officially filed to run, and to be honest, we can't afford to come up even a dollar short. To make up for it, we extended our end-of-month deadline to midnight tonight to close the gap.

**Your support now is critical to the success of our movement for social and economic justice — click here to chip in if you can before our new deadline >> [https://act.karenbass.com/a/2022-1?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424141/332912591/-1030957994?ms=em22_220301_exdl_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220301_exdl_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220301_exdl_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220301_exdl_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=J28jnzrdDebLFqjfWasmZfAe6sE6kzSC%2FxlW9UGfrEWZPWC0lXbgR0Q%2F8omoSGqcRYV1CHxve9qG5VW5vbdhpjAIn6GGkyWOWeGFkGYFgbi%2BUkHPWJSINKwKOCXfehb7GG96njap%2FFLmxssfP0Be0g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjgwMjkyYy05YTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3w-L8RLh6NNKUw3ul3ogPTqoH2i-pTpBZ2i_508fThM=&emci=68c7d524-e098-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=9f80292c-9a99-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=2429742)**

There's too much at stake in this election. The future of affordable housing, the economy, social justice, and more hang in the balance. All eyes are on our campaign to see if our grassroots team has what it takes to make history.

We are so close to hitting our $50,000 goal. But close won't cut it when falling short means we won't have the resources we need to make our shared vision for L.A. a reality.

**I'm humbly asking you to add a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford ahead of tonight's extended deadline. Anything you can give will go a long way, because this campaign is built by grassroots donors like you. Will you chip in? >> [https://act.karenbass.com/a/2022-1?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424142/332912592/-1030957994?ms=em22_220301_exdl_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&refcode=em22_220301_exdl_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&source=em22_220301_exdl_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220301_exdl_fndd_gq_act___kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=J28jnzrdDebLFqjfWasmZfAe6sE6kzSC%2FxlW9UGfrEWZPWC0lXbgR0Q%2F8omoSGqcRYV1CHxve9qG5VW5vbdhpjAIn6GGkyWOWeGFkGYFgbi%2BUkHPWJSINKwKOCXfehb7GG96njap%2FFLmxssfP0Be0g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjgwMjkyYy05YTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3w-L8RLh6NNKUw3ul3ogPTqoH2i-pTpBZ2i_508fThM=&emci=68c7d524-e098-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=9f80292c-9a99-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=2429742)**

Grateful to have you with us,

Karen

clean_body: Reaching out again about the extended deadline. Team — We are facing once-in-a-generation crises, and Angelenos deserve a mayor who will work tirelessly to heal our city. I entered this race because I saw my city was bleeding, and I asked myself: "How can I not do everything I can to help?" There are no simple solutions, and I know I am ready to do the work. But first, I need your help. We had an important end-of-month deadline last night, and we just barely missed our goal. This was our first deadline since I officially filed to run, and to be honest, we can't afford to come up even a dollar short. To make up for it, we extended our end-of-month deadline to midnight tonight to close the gap. Your support now is critical to the success of our movement for social and economic justice — click here to chip in if you can before our new deadline >> There's too much at stake in this election. The future of affordable housing, the economy, social justice, and more hang in the balance. All eyes are on our campaign to see if our grassroots team has what it takes to make history. We are so close to hitting our $50,000 goal. But close won't cut it when falling short means we won't have the resources we need to make our shared vision for L.A. a reality. I'm humbly asking you to add a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford ahead of tonight's extended deadline. Anything you can give will go a long way, because this campaign is built by grassroots donors like you. Will you chip in? >> Grateful to have you with us, Karen Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328) Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at . | | ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please .

Peter,

Last night, we faced our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline. With February being the shortest month of the year, we had to work even harder to reach our fundraising goal before midnight last night.

Well, this grassroots team once again stepped up in a huge way. **Thanks to your support, we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal!**

I can't thank you enough, Peter. This is going to be one of the most competitive – and expensive – races in the entire country. Your support in helping us reach every goal we set puts us in a better position to defend my seat and our Democratic House majority.

We might have our toughest race yet ahead of us, but I know that if we continue working together, we can take on any challenge that comes our way and keep WA-08 blue in November.

Thank you,

Kim

Tonight, President Biden will address the nation. The President’s State of the Union address is an opportunity to reflect on what we have accomplished so far—and what we are doing now to lower costs for families and grow our economy.

Democrats in Congress have delivered. We passed the _Bipartisan Infrastructure Law_ to rebuild roads, repair bridges, remove lead pipes and expand access to high-speed broadband internet. And we passed the _American Rescue Plan_ to support small businesses and reopen our schools, so we can get back to normal.

But I know there is more work to do. President Biden and Democrats in Congress are focused on lowering everyday costs for Michigan families and seniors. In the House, we recently passed the _America COMPETES Act_ to fix our broken supply chains and fight inflation by bringing manufacturing back to the United States, especially critical components like semiconductors. And I’ve recently introduced legislation to _[lower prescription drug costs](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424222/332912923/181931703?fbclid=IwAR3vAYgERdrqEq6DPWX9uU7NlFvnd-GcgQ2r2AveEgEtyverML9Om5sfDCY&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220301_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWE3YmI0Ni05YTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXfKFvLrcVRWIcmWZn2IAdhQevG6mzkzGqmu_d1Sauc=&emci=43b24bd2-c398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=45a7bb46-9a99-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=31479900)_ and _[cut taxes to save families money at the gas pump](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424227/332912924/1534168718?refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220301_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWE3YmI0Ni05YTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXfKFvLrcVRWIcmWZn2IAdhQevG6mzkzGqmu_d1Sauc=&emci=43b24bd2-c398-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=45a7bb46-9a99-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=31479900)_.

Before President Biden walks up to the podium tonight, will you chip in $15 to support our campaign? If we are going to make progress on any of these important issues, we must hold our slim Democratic majority in Congress.

I’m now running in a competitive “toss-up” district that could go either way in November, so I need your support. **_[If you can, please chip in $15 now to support our campaign→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424228/332912941/-409930011?amount=15&contactdata=SdRItABhrr8FJYEXR3nAJlZ14EwbpfRgtR%2BYRo5HsJ6Wb5jpsgUciG2Cavl0eT18uzr3EC3jYFweHMCePgvayw4Rnbt2q3k7d%2B5nqstsbnE4FkkHKwcgUH7u3Amxt1NvhPVGbACgx6Z9hH9zv4HwbQ%3D%3D&refcode2=45a7bb46-9a99-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_20220301_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWE3YmI0Ni05YTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXfKFvLrcVRWIcmWZn2IAdhQevG6mzkzGqmu_d1Sauc=)_**

clean_body: | | = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly = Tonight, President Biden will address the nation. The President’s State of the Union address is an opportunity to reflect on what we have accomplished so far—and what we are doing now to lower costs for families and grow our economy. Democrats in Congress have delivered. We passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law to rebuild roads, repair bridges, remove lead pipes and expand access to high-speed broadband internet. And we passed the American Rescue Plan to support small businesses and reopen our schools, so we can get back to normal. But I know there is more work to do. President Biden and Democrats in Congress are focused on lowering everyday costs for Michigan families and seniors. In the House, we recently passed the America COMPETES Act to fix our broken supply chains and fight inflation by bringing manufacturing back to the United States, especially critical components like semiconductors. And I’ve recently introduced legislation to and . Before President Biden walks up to the podium tonight, will you chip in $15 to support our campaign? If we are going to make progress on any of these important issues, we must hold our slim Democratic majority in Congress. I’m now running in a competitive “toss-up” district that could go either way in November, so I need your support. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly = = = = =** Thank you for your support. I hope you’ll join me as I keep working with Republicans and Democrats in Congress to get real results for mid-Michigan. = Thanks, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. subject: RSVP: Election Night Watch Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Hey, Peter.
There’s only a few hours until polls close in Texas. So as one of our top supporters, we wanted to invite you to join us tonight in East Austin at our Election Night Watch Party [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-election-night-march-2022] !
Make sure you cast your ballot, then join us to watch as results roll in. The event is free, but RSVP is required for entry.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-election-night-march-2022 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-election-night-march-2022]
RSVP >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress-election-night-march-2022]
Election Night Watch Party
Tuesday, March 1st
Doors open at 6:30 PM CT
Event begins at 7:00 PM CT
Location provided upon RSVP
Can't make it tonight? You can still pitch in to support our campaign in this final stretch. [https://bit.ly/Casar-GOTV]
Hope to see you there!
-Laura
Laura Hernandez Holmes, Campaign Manager

subject: You’re invited!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Congresswoman Jackie Speier and I want to invite you to a special campaign fundraiser at the Colma Community Center on Friday, March 11th, at 5pm | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

**Congresswoman** **Jackie Speier and I want to invite you to a special campaign fundraiser at the Colma Community Center on Friday, March 11th, at 5pm to support my campaign for Congress.**

_[Will you join us?](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=a514594b01&e=292fde286a)_
---
| [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=3d564d3123&e=292fde286a)
---
| Congresswoman Jackie Speier endorsed me for U.S. Congress because she knows I will deliver for our future. I am honored by her support, and I would be grateful for yours too!

[_Click here to contribute today!_](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=be8f28b37b&e=292fde286a)

I am running for Congress to defend our democracy, protect voting rights, and create an economy that works for all of us. And I will help ensure the rest of America follows California’s lead to aggressively tackle climate change and leave a cleaner planet for the next generation.

We are running a campaign built on people power, not special interests. Our grassroots campaign is growing and we can win with your help!

Thank you for your support, Peter! I look forward to seeing you [_March 11th!_](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=1bf60b4e7e&e=292fde286a)

Sincerely,
**Kevin Mullin**
---

body:
a tale of two campaigns |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424818/332916656/-1815902417?refcode=20220301_f_1_nd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzcxZjM5MS05Yjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hud3QXZzM5EIsgPtyy_RdiodBcYab1HBdMqLfZUhX9k=)

Friends,

_Thank you so much_ to everyone who contributed to my campaign last month. Your generosity means the world to me, so I wanted you to be the first to hear this: We hit our February fundraising goal.

We couldn't have done this without grassroots supporters just like you. God bless you all.

Now, I'd like to tell you a tale of two campaigns: mine and Gov. DeSantis's.
* My campaign is powered by everyday _Floridians_ , and I spend every day talking to folks, listening to their concerns, and traveling across the state to meet with them in their communities.

* Gov. DeSantis's campaign is funded by far-right _billionaires_. Ron's not very friendly, but when he does talk to people, it's only the rich donors he needs to run for President in 2024 (and hint, most aren't Floridians either).

**What's the moral of this story? Ron DeSantis has never — and will never — put Florida first. He'll happily throw Floridians under the bus to advance his hyper-partisan agenda to fuel his political ambitions.[So if you want a governor who actually governs, will you make a contribution to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424819/332916657/1828375930?refcode=20220301_f_4_ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzcxZjM5MS05Yjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hud3QXZzM5EIsgPtyy_RdiodBcYab1HBdMqLfZUhX9k=)**

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: Women's History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I can't help but think about the women who raised me.
| | |
---
It's the first day of Women's History Month, friend, and I can't help but think about the women who raised me.
Growing up, some of my fondest memories were visiting my grandmother, who lived just down the street. She couldn't read or write, so I remember sitting at the kitchen table writing for her as she dictated letters to her sister. She could have never imagined that I would become a congresswoman and one day run for Senate.
I stand on the shoulders of generations of women like my grandmother – women who didn't have the opportunities I do today, but hoped and prayed that one day I would make it.

And today I’m reflecting on my career as a social worker, law enforcement officer, Orlando’s first woman chief of police and now a U.S. congresswoman running for the U.S. Senate.
Black women before me have won countless battles and pushed us closer to the promise of equity for all – but now, unfortunately the GOP is trying to bring us back to a time when women didn't have the freedom to make choices about their own bodies and when women like my grandmother couldn't exercise their right to vote.
The truth is, we're at a crossroads: Americans can either sit back and let the Supreme Court reverse _Roe v. Wade_ and take back progress on crucial issues like voting rights, or we can give every ounce of energy we have to expanding our Democratic Senate majority.
**[This Women's History Month, we're at a critical turning point, and so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 today to power my grassroots movement, elect another woman to the Senate, and expand our Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424746/332915999/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2502-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWMwOGFlMC05YTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mTOBS2t28PjBCOipYs4wtHFh_tWSAu_OVzSQon9Mb3o=)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It's election day in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

It’s election day in Texas,
Peter, and there is a lot on the
line.

Justice Democrats are backing Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar, two
progressive champions running for Congress in Texas. They’ve campaigned
proudly on our agenda to secure Medicare for All, win a Green New Deal,
and cancel student loan debt. They will always represent the people’s
interest in Congress.

The establishment is watching these elections closely. They say that
progressives can’t win over Democratic voters in the South while
campaigning on progressive issues. Let’s prove them wrong.

We have a great shot at electing Greg and Jessica today, but we’re
counting on a last-minute grassroots surge to power our work in these
final hours. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96511?refcode=em20220301-22205&t=1020&akid=22205%2E1203867%2EhRM2RY ]Will you make a $20.22 contribution to help Justice
Democrats secure our first victories of 2022?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96511?refcode=em20220301-22205&t=1021&akid=22205%2E1203867%2EhRM2RY ]Contribute $20.22

In just the last year, Texans have faced draconian abortion restrictions,
an assault on trans rights, devastating infrastructure failures, and have
been represented by leaders who are more concerned with serving their
corporate donors than their constituents.

Jessica and Greg are running grassroots, people-powered campaigns against
establishment Democrats backed by special interest groups and
corporations. But going up against the establishment and special interests
has been anything but easy.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/96511?refcode=em20220301-22205&t=1022&akid=22205%2E1203867%2EhRM2RY ]If you're in this fight all the way, and if you can make a donation
before polls close tonight in our big Texas primaries, please chip in
$3 or whatever amount makes sense for you.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=22205%2E1203867%2EhRM2RY ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=22205%2E1203867%2EhRM2RY ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220301-22205-footer&t=1025&refcode2=22205_1203867_hRM2RY&akid=22205%2E1203867%2EhRM2RY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=22205%2E1203867%2EhRM2RY

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
