name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfke7gnhlrbjdfgge1d2890i0apeoql5i68kf9s0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onm6hq32cj6mjib0olhm4om4c73carjbc9k6uob7d1kc9qb8odm62r34pr4mhpjeduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dj662obbcj7mtimcd70m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o75c9h2bs)

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjchrea8027dr6e2ccn7jubovi33j7ef5h7vm5tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o75c9h2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _" Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product. "_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za33pjd9qocfe32tlj1cph6rlg7f0gcpqvr0maro_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o75c9h2bs)**
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpknknkjauuvii70k4ldlu3pu6p4biqnh3v1g0oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o75c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424995/332917431/1002998528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2Y1MGVhZi05Yzk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZGjUqITYBYdfoqKpaufgdIYWVrW-z-LvCnG4cCkRi4=&emci=3cad6929-8199-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=dcf50eaf-9c99-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=12740612) | Team, The last few years, we’ve seen workers across the country face many obstacles. Whether it be the COVID-19 pandemic, inflation, supply chain issues, or unlivable wages– the people and working class have been left behind by politicians with corporate interests. **Tennesseans deserve a governor who fights for the worker– not those exploiting them.** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42424996/332917432/744188451?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2Y1MGVhZi05Yzk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZGjUqITYBYdfoqKpaufgdIYWVrW-z-LvCnG4cCkRi4=) The minimum wage in Tennessee hasn’t been updated in over a decade. While the price of living has increased, pay hasn’t– and workers have been left behind to play catch up while being exploited and underpaid. **It’s time we pay workers a liveable wage and ensure that our communities are fairly compensated for their labor.** American workers are the backbone of our country and it’s crucial we support them in our policy and leadership. clean_body: | | Team, The last few years, we’ve seen workers across the country face many obstacles. Whether it be the COVID-19 pandemic, inflation, supply chain issues, or unlivable wages– the people and working class have been left behind by politicians with corporate interests. Tennesseans deserve a governor who fights for the worker– not those exploiting them. = The minimum wage in Tennessee hasn’t been updated in over a decade. While the price of living has increased, pay hasn’t– and workers have been left behind to play catch up while being exploited and underpaid. It’s time we pay workers a liveable wage and ensure that our communities are fairly compensated for their labor. American workers are the backbone of our country and it’s crucial we support them in our policy and leadership. That is why I’m running for Governor of Tennessee– because workers deserve a governor in office that fights for them– not for corporations. Will you join me in fighting for the workers of Tennessee? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = It’s time we value our workers and show them that we’ve got their back. -JB Smiley Democrat JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. _**Election Day is here, Peter!**_ All of the hard work we have put into electing a true working class progressive in Texas 30th comes down to this moment.

Despite all the odds stacked against Jessica, we have made it this far. We are so proud that Barrier to Entry PAC has played such a significant role in breaking socioeconomic barriers that have allowed Jessica to run a viable and effective grassroots people-first movement.

Your donations have helped us provide Jessica’s campaign with funds to cover transportation costs, printed materials, volunteer recruitment, and more. We even sent some of our BTE staff down to Dallas to canvass and work the polling locations today!

And it’s not too late to have an impact on electing a true progressive working-class candidate and the first Black woman veteran to Congress. clean_body: you can find us at the polls! = Election Day is here, Peter! All of the hard work we have put into electing a true working class progressive in Texas 30th comes down to this moment. Despite all the odds stacked against Jessica, we have made it this far. We are so proud that Barrier to Entry PAC has played such a significant role in breaking socioeconomic barriers that have allowed Jessica to run a viable and effective grassroots people-first movement. Your donations have helped us provide Jessica’s campaign with funds to cover transportation costs, printed materials, volunteer recruitment, and more. We even sent some of our BTE staff down to Dallas to canvass and work the polling locations today! And it’s not too late to have an impact on electing a true progressive working-class candidate and the first Black woman veteran to Congress. Jessica’s campaign still has bills to pay, and we need to support her until the very end regardless of what happens at the polls today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through instantly: ********************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** ---|--- ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** = Let's do this! \-- Barrier To Entry PAC ** EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier To Entry PAC: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= ""****************** ---|---|---|--- Barrier To Entry PAC PO 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States **

name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zma31ckip5nrkvjesh0hcesqeqsg4685oop0rksg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o71c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcthlc3i69ohmmprmcd72clhnao3i62pr4tjncpon8t32ceqbas3k68rr9p35m1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6cc5gmmp6fdr4coq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn3fp3e3a205q91nd76mmksfmobo6d0cnb42kn30_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o71c1h2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme six years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zin1ju44ugnqiho99fnlhgj4q2gv1ijb0li8ikq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o71c1h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zclmdgltmd56a8v4t3e9gkn827eu2e5n74j5k65o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o71c1h2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztldkcilmgd1hrdeqbi2es3lsrsrpm3mobh52gl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o71c1h2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqc1rp6q8povk76h3sv69t713uedmcnnqcr97dg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o71c1h2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr7h9s5n1t8lqcvd49et97v8m3j3ig8scke2nr28_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o71c1h2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zettcedf2m6vnfmf82k3be1vtq4mhnng13pkk6ko_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chhm2o71c1h2bs) God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278 ****
---

subject: The Petition CHALLENGE!! Can YOU do it?
body:
50 Patriots --- 50 Petitions Each --- Are YOU up for the Challenge?

** Dear Patriots,
------------------------------------------------------------
The Martz Campaign has initiated a CHALLENGE. We are asking 50 people to commit to getting 50 Candidate Petition Forms signed by March 26th. This will help us reach the goal of 2600 signatures.

The forms must be turned in to the Campaign by March 26th. On March 27th we will have a celebration gathering where gifts will be given to participants.

The form can be printed from the Campaign website under the heading "Form". The forms can be mailed to the Campaign or they can be picked up my a member of the Campaign.

Please reply to this email if you are accepting the *Challenge!*

Thank you in advance for you help.

Stay Free,

Melissa Martz Campaign

| | My team and I are hard at work everyday reaching out to voters and learning about the issues that affect them the most. I am dedicated to doing everything I can to address these issues in the Halls of the House of Representatives. For far too long, Washington’s 3rd Congressional District has not had its voice heard because our Representative refuses to listen. As your Representative, I will make sure that your voice is heard; I will make myself as accessible as possible TO YOU! We CANNOT let our district be ignored for another two years by an absent representative. I will win and I will be your voice! But I cannot win this election without you - I need your support. [Can you donate today to help us start March off Strong?](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/44Nz1JRN3/c?w=1ERY_czeq_dUqZ9swhQlHlovKtL4dH4mQxFPmSqyElY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPTFNQVImYW1vdW50PTIyIiwiciI6Ijg0OTg0OGZiLTcwOTItNDVhNS0xZWRmLWQ2ZjZjZWZlZjYyZCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| |
---
| I want to represent WA-03 to:
* Defend your rights as [working people](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/44Nz1JRN3/c?w=YFR5wLFV8xHLO3vrrhQlsPGiQgXJX3ifsNDd20-Hb_k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzk4Tmt1NWM4Zj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiZzdGF0dXM9RHJhZnQmY2lkPTAwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMCMvbWFpbiIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) and families.
* Aim for the [healthcare we all deserve](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/44Nz1JRN3/c?w=K3ShaT9ShrKA-_rTBWUn9ztll915b_iWbG1TP5YHG3M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vaGVhbHRoY2FyZSIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), written into law.
* Protect a [woman's bodily autonomy](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/44Nz1JRN3/c?w=1u21_SjVATmiKXj4pT-PvRxADskRzcwv9KRW8Rmqo6c.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDMiLCJyIjoiM2ZmNDY0NzAtMWFlZi00ZmVkLTI2YTktMzU0NDRiZTdkOTAyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0) with protected reproductive care, written into law.
* Securing our [education system with the teaching](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/44Nz1JRN3/c?w=keQ3U1xxNrlSnVu77VZqeoq54oE126O067mera3kr6w.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vZWR1Y2F0aW9uIiwiciI6IjNmZjQ2NDcwLTFhZWYtNGZlZC0yNmE5LTM1NDQ0YmU3ZDkwMiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9) of facts, good or bad.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42425534/332919737/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.03.01_b1_ty_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTk1MWU1YS05ZTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TpvKsnUGeJtJxUTkjQSAxZp7NTJ0zpZqXv0tO-vr5PU=)

Friends,

With all of the outside money funding Derrick Van Orden’s campaign, it’s absolutely critical we keep pace in this race.

We entered yesterday worried that we weren’t going to hit our February goal, but my team just told me that our supporters stepped up and **crushed our end-of-month goal!**

I don’t like sending fundraising emails, but I’m more than happy to write these thank-you emails. Our campaign’s supporters are always there for us, and I’m so grateful to count on folks like you.

**[I’d be honored if you made your support official. If you haven’t already, click below to add your name to our growing list of endorsements.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42425535/332919738/56829198?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2022.03.01_b1_TY_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.03.01_b1_ty_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTk1MWU1YS05ZTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TpvKsnUGeJtJxUTkjQSAxZp7NTJ0zpZqXv0tO-vr5PU=&emci=c2629601-8399-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=b9951e5a-9e99-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=3200050)** | [ADD MY NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42425536/332919739/56829198?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2022.03.01_b1_TY_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.03.01_b1_ty_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTk1MWU1YS05ZTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TpvKsnUGeJtJxUTkjQSAxZp7NTJ0zpZqXv0tO-vr5PU=&emci=c2629601-8399-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=b9951e5a-9e99-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=3200050)

name: Christie
subject: I selected you to represent Pennsylvania -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220301-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220301-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=3184%2E9716520%2EQ4yf3Y)
---
Hi Friend -- I'm Christie Roberts and I'm the Executive Director of the DSCC. **That means it's my job to develop the Democratic Party's strategy to protect and expand our Senate majority.**

As you know, our majority is perilously thin and we can't afford to make _any_ mistakes. So I am inviting a few trusted Democrats from each state to join my personal Focus Group to help _perfect_ our strategy **\-- and I chose you specifically!**

[**I'm standing by to review your responses, so please click here to enter my focus group immediately >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220301-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220301-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=3184%2E9716520%2EQ4yf3Y)

_*Note: I need to review your responses by tomorrow morning, so please don't wait!_

I helped guide Raphael Warnock's campaign and I cannot overstate how crucial this community's support and input were to our victories in Georgia. That's why I chose you for this exclusive opportunity -- I'm _100%_ confident your insights will drastically improve our strategy.

[**So please, will you accept this invitation to join my personal focus group before tonight's deadline?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220301-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220301-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=3184%2E9716520%2EQ4yf3Y)

| **DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM**
**Focus Group Status: OPEN**
---

Thanks for all you do! I am eagerly awaiting your responses.

Christie Roberts
Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=3184_9716520_Q4yf3Y&akid=3184%2E9716520%2EQ4yf3Y)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=3184%2E9716520%2EQ4yf3Y)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=3184%2E9716520%2EQ4yf3Y)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

body:
Quick update for you, Peter.

| [ ](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9sk7wV77SBRX3hlZCRQDfWokJl3LAZWDBrQibJC76NGL4mR6dbesWq8DGpzlQH2oVV7wZGegHocZIhHC2VP8_POt1LrJgVxbqelnjYqHW2smXgN1_ED0jjbuyLmHCgV6PxgRdy5-PoG9dPurVL5wkTv1fRaf4Ezs1TbSh0fohubj7YzZ-MGj-H9n0fbg3T3k--fZj8znJqjlUum6MwEKiQU2y3vk4U1lEMYFQV494REM3jsVIV8F9S5kXKXrH9DQzwlctznEMhvSqNeWuo71dOgueIPYbTyjhmzszNrPegpNuf29eKCzA0VCaAJRLC6bneWGChhSxB40cJScDQKMmNQ&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=827202915027361958&n=1) Hey, Peter -- It‘s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I just wanted to check in with you real quick before tonight’s State of the Union speech. Joe Biden is going to lie to you tonight. He’s going to tell you the nation is _“strong”_ when it‘s clear to anyone paying attention that it’s not. And it’s Joe Biden’s fault. | | [Stop Joe Biden](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9sk7wV77SBRX3hlZCRQDfWokJl3LAZWDBrQibJC76NGK5ZVc2Tw4lmeuQ1g1IIruGkxG5AwWg8NnjCUFfNDmk85kCjIH1Ae_97c7__HP5Fc_YIu8gCWjg8i9Ok8PzqvciwvxK798omM0gu33jKjNBMEw3p_i8pkNmk-34BqymwwJG-K6573LJStBxC0DybBtLUmIButMbJDWrGBsYl7RVFCHMc0SemT3FxBe8o9To17BCAShmlm6FDeIpMHikDeWskCnxV_403MCYGpgpbRgQbfznoH4ZK11Y5YfKME5nFRNJe997HkvLepMO2o43ozdGE_C9SOr_DPg3h3RJgByF6Q&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=827202915027361958&n=2)
---
Fortunately, we have strong Republican leaders fighting every day to save America and make our nation great again. That includes Republican Governor Kim Reynolds, who’ll be delivering the **Official Republican Response** to Joe Biden’s speech tonight.
Starting tomorrow, Biden’s going to be spending millions of dollars to promote his fake news all over the country -- and we need to be prepared to fight back.

clean_body: Quick update for you, Peter. | Hey, Peter -- It‘s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I just wanted to check in with you real quick before tonight’s State of the Union speech. Joe Biden is going to lie to you tonight. He’s going to tell you the nation is “strong” when it‘s clear to anyone paying attention that it’s not. And it’s Joe Biden’s fault. | | Fortunately, we have strong Republican leaders fighting every day to save America and make our nation great again. That includes Republican Governor Kim Reynolds, who’ll be delivering the Official Republican Response to Joe Biden’s speech tonight. Starting tomorrow, Biden’s going to be spending millions of dollars to promote his fake news all over the country -- and we need to be prepared to fight back. That’s why I’m emailing you today to urge you to chip in $1 or more to our official 2022 State of the Union Fund before tonight’s speech. | | | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for whatever you can do, Peter. I’m counting on you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: we came up short. By a considerable amount. Not great.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This isn’t the message that we were hoping to share this morning...
#

Friends —
This isn’t the message that we were hoping to share this morning, but we came up short on our February fundraising goals.
No lie. No exaggeration. We came up short, and not by a small amount.
And the problem is, we just can’t afford to miss these goals. Not while National Republicans are spending big to beat us. Not when we started advertising on television this early in the year.
Now, we need to make it up. This month. ESPECIALLY because it’s an FEC fundraising deadline month and when it ends we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers for the world to see.
We know we send a lot of these emails, but we need to start this year off strong. And we have one day to make up a lot of ground. One day to give it all we have. So PLEASE. Today:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign to help us catch up on the goals we missed during last month’s fundraising deadline?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220301-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2240_6688874_N8ECea&akid=2240%2E6688874%2EN8ECea)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220301-1-7&t=20&refcode2=2240_6688874_N8ECea&akid=2240%2E6688874%2EN8ECea)**

Team Kelly

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=2240%2E6688874%2EN8ECea).

name: Mike Thompson
subject: The State of the Union address
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Hi Peter,

In just a few short hours, President Biden will deliver this year’s State of the Union address.

Since President Biden took office last year, we’ve launched our nation on a path towards progress, but there is still a long road ahead of us. From having access to affordable health care to creating a more fair and just nation, these are all things we are working hard to achieve in Congress.

[**_Knowing all we’ve accomplished in the past year and how much we still need to do for our nation, I want to know what priorities you hope President Biden will focus on in his speech. We cannot achieve progress unless we work together!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42426972/332924854/215886979?refcode=MT_EM_EN_WL_220301_1_1&refcode2=539dabb1-a299-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzlkYWJiMS1hMjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b00vpj7T647sARtIStoFhaTzNBHvOPOA33t9QaZ6ElM=&emci=fe0509fd-a099-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=539dabb1-a299-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=2678920)
**[Let us Know](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42426974/332924856/215886979?refcode=MT_EM_EN_WL_220301_1_1&refcode2=539dabb1-a299-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzlkYWJiMS1hMjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b00vpj7T647sARtIStoFhaTzNBHvOPOA33t9QaZ6ElM=&emci=fe0509fd-a099-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=539dabb1-a299-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=2678920)**
I hope you’re as excited as I am to hear President Biden’s State of the Union address tonight. We must have hope during these hard times, and I am more determined than ever to continue fighting for our rights in Congress.

Thank you for standing with us,

Mike Thompson

name: Great America Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6725%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=9cxJdPt%2byf%2fjnLL1UXQtQg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69269%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a%2bOlWGZzj%2bYqwp127dfs2g&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69260%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kEiQQaQtW6B3wIZi1L9xyQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69260%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kEiQQaQtW6B3wIZi1L9xyQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle. name: Rick Scott
subject: While America watches SOTU...
body:
Peter, Just in time for sleepy Joe Biden’s State of the Union, I received amazing news...

_**Our end of month deadline has been extended.**_

While Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi stand in front of America and try to explain away their failures, we need you to step up and help Republicans WIN BIG in 2022.

Don’t be fooled - even though Democrats have nearly _destroyed _America, they’ll still be using tonight’s speech as a way to raise _millions _from their high dollar donors in Silicon Valley and Hollywood.

It’s up to hardworking patriots like you to help us keep up - and with our new, extended deadline, I know we can meet our goal and WIN BIG this November.

name: Fred Guttenberg
subject: I've had enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I thought of how I lost my daughter, Jaime
| | |
---
Friend,

With President Biden's first official State of the Union on the horizon, I can't help but think back to when I attended Donald Trump's State of the Union speech in 2020 – and was promptly escorted out.

The very next day, after having been impeached by the House months before, Trump was acquitted by the Senate when a majority of Republicans decided he was above he law.
It was an emotional night for me. I had been invited to attend by Speaker Pelosi, but after Donald Trump said gun rights were "under siege all across our country," I thought of how I lost my daughter, Jaime, and absolutely couldn't stomach his lies.
I've listened to too many politicians tell lies about the Second Amendment while ignoring the realities of gun violence. Donald Trump, Marco Rubio – they're all one and the same. Cowards. Shills for the gun lobby. We may have defeated Trump, but Marco Rubio and pro-NRA sellouts like him remain.
Thinking back on that moment, I'm more resolved than ever to stand up against those who get in the way of commonsense gun safety reform. **That's why I'm doing whatever I can to defeat Marco Rubio and elect Val Demings as Florida's next U.S. senator.[Will you join me by donating $5 or more to Val Demings' campaign so she can win in Florida and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42427247/332926089/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2026-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzRkNTk0My1hMzk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzqM0XdOhI7q09-aPaDl3JKyRu1TmVF5rfVsYVWBWQc=)**
Val Demings and I have something in common: We've stood up to both Donald Trump _and_ Marco Rubio – calling them out for their lies, dangerous rhetoric and blind allegiance to the gun lobby.

I know Congresswoman Demings isn't just all talk (unlike far too many in Washington). She's actually _passed_ lifesaving reforms like expanded background checks. In fact, she's been one of survivors' strongest allies in Congress when it comes to making progress on gun safety reform. This is probably because – as someone who served in law enforcement – Congresswoman Demings saw the scourge of gun violence up close and personal.
In 2019, 2020 and 2021, I watched time and again as we passed legislation to curb gun violence in the House, only to have it not even come to a debate in the Senate thanks to people like Marco Rubio. I've had _enough_. **It's time to stop with thoughts and prayers. It's time to elect more gun safety champions to the Senate and expand our majority so we can pass lifesaving measures into law. Val Demings is exactly the champion we need to do it.**
But month after month, Marco Rubio keeps hauling in millions of dollars for his reelection campaign. The GOP has already funneled more than $10 million into Florida and is running a blitz of attack ads to defeat Val Demings, and McConnell's aligned super PAC has millions more to defend Rubio. That's why Val Demings and I need _you_. **[Please, donate $5 or whatever you can spare today to ensure Val Demings can defeat Marco Rubio and pass gun safety legislation through the Senate!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42427249/332926090/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2026-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzRkNTk0My1hMzk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzqM0XdOhI7q09-aPaDl3JKyRu1TmVF5rfVsYVWBWQc=)**
Nothing will bring Jaime back, but helping changemakers like Val Demings – a leader who has passed lifesaving gun safety legislation – gives me the purpose I've needed since my daughter's murder. Thank you for doing your part to help.

Fred Guttenberg
Gun Violence Survivor
Jaime and Jesse's dad
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42427250/332926091/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2026-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzRkNTk0My1hMzk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wzqM0XdOhI7q09-aPaDl3JKyRu1TmVF5rfVsYVWBWQc=)

| We predict the Democrats will use this opportunity to try and pull the wool over our nation's eyes and pretend the Biden Administration has been anything but an absolute disaster...

_**...But we know the truth, **__**.**_ Under the Democrats' so-called "leadership," the American people have been exploited, lied to, and left behind:

🚨 We're facing an unprecedented crisis at our Southern Border that weakens our national security and puts American families at risk.

🚨 Inflation is higher than it's been in 40 years, hitting our paychecks and making life harder for all Americans.

🚨 Federal government power grabs and unconstitutional mandates have stifled our liberty and made a mockery of the rule of law.

🚨 Socialists have infiltrated our schools and are pushing their radical agenda.

🚨 Weak leadership has led to catastrophe abroad, emboldening America's enemies.

🚨 Extreme Green New Deal policies have put American Energy last, killing jobs and hiking the price of gas.

What do you think, ? _Which issues should Joe Biden address at tonight's State of the Union? _
_**Let us know ASAP -- > [Take Our Survey](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=5b835ba707&e=edf8a4d16d)**_

## New post on **Theresa Coates Ellis for Congress**
|
---|---
| | [](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1) |
## [March is Red Cross Month proclamation presented by Councilwoman Ellis](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2022/03/01/march-is-red-cross-month-proclamation-presented-by-councilwoman-ellis/)
by [theresacoatesellis](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1)
---|---
MARCH IS RED CROSS MONTH. As Chairperson to local American Red Cross of Loudoun and Prince William Biomedical Committee, I was proud to prepare and present, with Red Cross leadership, a proclamation last night as a Councilwoman.
We honored our 1881 founder Clara Barton, volunteers, Blood program leaders, Greater Manassas Volunteer Rescue Squad, City of Manassas Fire Rescue Department, our churches, congregations, faith leaders, businesses and staff who have been responsible for supplying blood during the pandemic when small location drives where shut down and larger spaces were necessary for social distancing.
Thank you to all who keep our community, our country, and the world resilient in time of suffering.
We have a severe blood shortage. Learn more about what how you can help, and what we are doing to assist in the Ukraine conflict by visiting <https://www.RedCross.org> today to help save lives.
#
**[theresacoatesellis](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?author=1)** | March 1, 2022 at 4:12 pm | Categories: [Community](https://theresacoatesellis.com/?taxonomy=category&term=community) | URL: <https://wp.me/p5STuJ-2lm>

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9532%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bUcT%2b8RXbMEVqU8cZZQ5Bg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14471%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1RDLE77gXC9RL1I%2bK6YMbQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14472%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sovp3bgY3Ab9jCtDkLYmFQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14473%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uuFXrdwzcRRpwRlxJ3hENg&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9532%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bUcT%2b8RXbMEVqU8cZZQ5Bg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9532%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=bUcT%2b8RXbMEVqU8cZZQ5Bg&sysid=1)

The Democratic candidate for Colorado's 7th Congressional District cannot possibly articulate sound policy on military action and the situation with Russia and Ukraine like Erik Aadland can. Erik is smart, insightful, and will ensure our country acts in the best interest of Americans, then the world.

Listen to his discussion today with [George Brauchler](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016lNaLFvs35r-HgIjSPctE_N8OlDYpei892ohVDiaVp4aXVlEsXzUbwW_pUxS28wqlafXj9vwPv0vsk1WkVSi245LDLjttUJTEL4-9qbDoW9DswgTvm-rWAqXfU2Ui2jdL00CsT7qYOC-FsQ4pJVOB6tU9riTjaK95reUIvxi1mA2Lc-vz2WxMtxGg4frRPaL&c=Bo3kbqyVsAsyldVUdQnKYDpqYykGIIijHuaQFmugBLHsvFxgYLmmag==&ch=FYYjzqQGE-B163YRtrHbYWSs3ZD7HJHO6DoqTFyVaJmkElF2j-RKfQ==) and see why he is the best person to represent the 7th CD in Congress!

clean_body: | | | Peter, first I want to thank you. Thank you for being a part of our movement to bring positive change to Texas’ 28th district. I am so proud of what we have accomplished together in this primary campaign. It’s so important that we’re able to get voters to the polls today because we’re facing voter suppression from Republican Governor Greg Abbott. Voting rights in Texas have been under attack for months and we can’t let that voter suppression be the difference between victory or defeat. Our campaign is rooted in hope for the future and faith that we can create a more just and equitable future where everyone can thrive. Thank you so much for your support, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: WEDNESDAY - Speaker Pelosi’s Weekly Grassroots Volunteer Update, Kicking Off Women’s History Month on March 2nd at 4 PM PT / 7 PM ET
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,
As we kick off Women’s History Month, I am deeply thankful to each and every one of you who help elect and inspire women to run for office. Thanks to your support, I have the honor to be the first woman Speaker of the House, serving with the most diverse congressional caucus in history. Every day, House Democrats are building back better with women to make America a more perfect union.
Tonight we will hear from President Joe Biden as he delivers his first State of the Union address and sets forth his agenda to strengthen our Democracy at home and abroad.
Tomorrow, I invite you to discuss his speech and our work together. Please join me Wednesday, March 2nd at 7:00 PM ET / 4:00 PM PT for my Weekly Grassroots Volunteer Update as we discuss how Democrats continue to deliver for America’s women and their families.
Join Speaker Pelosi [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_PBEFJqqITyeYah8g7LFuUA]
Register here to join us: https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_PBEFJqqITyeYah8g7LFuUA [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_PBEFJqqITyeYah8g7LFuUA]
Thank you for all you do.
Warmest regards,
NANCY
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/83718e0a-a399-ec11-a507-281878b80eda/7334062a-a599-ec11-a507-281878b80eda?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzM0MDYyYS1hNTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8V4fCaKmXppXyCtWCL-ZnsgfI5dQ-K7_--JI5Koz5o=&id=117907000 .
Nancy Pelosi for Congress
700 13TH STREET NW
Suite 800
Washington, DC 20005
United States
Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

name: Alvin Williams
subject: ELECTION ALERT!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
Texas is holding the nation’s first primaries today!
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?info=2022EU0401&recruiter_id=62268&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0401&n=1)

---
Are you with me, Peter,
I need to know IMMEDIATELY because Texas is holding the nation’s first primaries today, and we have two Black Conservatives - _and veterans_ \- on the ballot who need your support:
[](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?info=2022EU0401&recruiter_id=62268&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0401&n=3)
---
**Wesley Hunt** is uniquely qualified to represent Texas in the House of Representatives. A West Point graduate and Apache helicopter pilot, Capt. Hunt served a combat deployment to Iraq and two in Saudi Arabia where he served as a Diplomatic Liaison Officer.
He’s a lifelong conservative who’ll help flip control of the House of Representatives back to the Republicans!
**Lt. Col. Allen West** is no stranger to the conservative movement.
As a combat veteran who served in the U.S. House of Representatives, Lt. Col. West brings with him the kind of leadership Texas needs to keep the state Red.
**BOTH of these men represent the TRUTH that the Republican Party is NOT the party of racists, like the Democrats would have you believe.**
**[Please chip in what you can to help Black America’s Pac Action Fund support Black Conservatives across the country during this crucial election year.](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?info=2022EU0401&recruiter_id=62268&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0401&n=4)**
| [](https://www.bampac.org/bafdonate?info=2022EU0401&recruiter_id=62268&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022eu0401&n=5)
---
To Victory! |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund

name: Primary Sinema Project
subject: Tonight's speech could have been different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
There'd be much more to discuss if Sinema wasn't obstructing. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwO2J3NqEW3yt1m7xeEvl0ko4Y80V3ic3UHr56035pWBfGKnpMDT9VyeCEVOwRfQhLIivp1G5TQtvr9u2dcJP5SB8o-BcPlHDSoVpUyBkLpaTvzKi1hqSkapnwPxIhgwpgpq631lnrJZKq_t_YFXpPfZRhaWq5aAOjPUPHH1U8KCaXv8CBXJLO4w_Z0bzaTtG8TR_JLHDW3WxYHemj5I1BSvUP3ATDJhaJHNDhRiVJPL4/3jz/W8-KVhWSR06mW5xSRS14-A/h0/-vCQS4c3dAXh4AHTfikClPhqSdHGzq_fz-iTKs5LY_M)
Peter, Tonight, President Biden will be giving his first-ever State of the Union address. While we don't exactly know what President Biden will say tonight, Peter, we do know one thing for sure: **the State of Our Union would be stronger if not for Kyrsten Sinema.** In an alternate universe where Sinema (and Joe Manchin) didn't obstruct President Biden's first year at every turn, he'd be able to take credit tonight for so many milestone achievements: paid family leave, lower drug prices, expanded health care, universal preschool, affordable child care, lower taxes for working families, clean energy investment, a larger infrastructure package, and voting rights legislation. It's a long list. And Sinema blocked all of it. **[We can't afford to let Kyrsten Sinema continue sabotaging President Biden's agenda. Can you please chip in $5 and help continue funding grassroots efforts on the ground to oust Sinema?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSQmeJKR_-ynoikQ_x9Xml4kLKI4KV9xbLvODF8t5kvxaPg6iFOCrbyMru58MqzbhMcPCQbHPDzA9W4sec26wZ6OYgDWlKOqQVWkc8nJWO6MF-E3gnEg4lHRqJUtEuoQtaxMlCZwM0jEh6c5gGxEhJG1orjtaAlz-nxV4CL1gZaLQcsKiOlo8RNR6HKrA28m-D9X3l45jMhlXp8w5AJ7QIECgIMeDYotGId2lmIDfk1r88j1ywKO74iTMMSNjOmZI-IW0_arHdyP2xJf6vWZQo1D-oV3OrkLDYbkWMUIgxYMqsF83Fa5xjRO0tG9A6QMPY/3jz/W8-KVhWSR06mW5xSRS14-A/h1/8-M9ichLvhKoc03AQ8U7Wl7gk-v4J2Wf4Sai9TMZrkM)** **[Contribute $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSQmeJKR_-ynoikQ_x9Xml4kLKI4KV9xbLvODF8t5kvxY6ERZfvHAQmQzUQFdi6fCxBjafu-YRQ9ntXRKpoYKUptLkCxt_IJcUl-LQtt67fijMqTqAtmpkn1NcFtFgU4EicZXwCAQ-WNh43C1QzpGvqF06pV0Uztgi6zdZm3z8SiHJIfhXnq1ZgQn512V4SWQDJQlM6EbsqtjOlAdIUnwYgK2OZDc8X4OuAo75gBZ0tT7CgXsBEwh6hhdg7ykBh8axn8eJSTxfeLMQfvd2OjzwSBaWcSP5Uc-XVyETgz9yxsOa1au7dwNZn5WfIdJr7fZ4/3jz/W8-KVhWSR06mW5xSRS14-A/h2/rvCYiG9a6bUaZAqAgMjydpSaJTiXFI4mEwpKkoSWDvA)** Largely thanks to Sinema's obstruction, _Democrats are running out of time to pass the key components of Biden's agenda before the 2022 midterms._ And in part because of her obstruction, President Biden won't have much to say tonight when it comes to things like passing Build Back Better or voting rights legislation. If the Senate doesn't make progress, voters could punish vulnerable Senators at the ballot box — including Sinema's fellow Arizona Sen. Mark Kelly — and the GOP could even regain Senate control. The stakes couldn't be higher. Kyrsten Sinema needs to know that if she continues to obstruct Biden's agenda in favor of doing the bidding of Big Pharma and Big Oil mega-donors — it will cost her her job. **[Let's start this month off strong and send Sinema an unmistakable message: continue ignoring your constituents and obstructing President Biden's agenda, and we'll make sure you lose your job. clean_body: There'd be much more to discuss if Sinema wasn't obstructing. | | | Peter, Tonight, President Biden will be giving his first-ever State of the Union address. While we don't exactly know what President Biden will say tonight, Peter, we do know one thing for sure: the State of Our Union would be stronger if not for Kyrsten Sinema. In an alternate universe where Sinema (and Joe Manchin) didn't obstruct President Biden's first year at every turn, he'd be able to take credit tonight for so many milestone achievements: paid family leave, lower drug prices, expanded health care, universal preschool, affordable child care, lower taxes for working families, clean energy investment, a larger infrastructure package, and voting rights legislation. It's a long list. And Sinema blocked all of it. Largely thanks to Sinema's obstruction, Democrats are running out of time to pass the key components of Biden's agenda before the 2022 midterms. And in part because of her obstruction, President Biden won't have much to say tonight when it comes to things like passing Build Back Better or voting rights legislation. If the Senate doesn't make progress, voters could punish vulnerable Senators at the ballot box — including Sinema's fellow Arizona Sen. Mark Kelly — and the GOP could even regain Senate control. The stakes couldn't be higher. Kyrsten Sinema needs to know that if she continues to obstruct Biden's agenda in favor of doing the bidding of Big Pharma and Big Oil mega-donors — it will cost her her job. Thank you, Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. body:
This is a movement to take our country back
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3qppnc66ueg9ggj6dgppord72c00krcuur9eis0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tpi65i75clgetij4ttk6qrractl6qrj9pb4sipj4obnm5hm2d766ti6cd31c5jrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphgmaqr0ptimdj33c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
---
| | | | | | |
| | | | | | |
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp11ffh6v5kqhqurd933a69pclpeeqbt8oqog33g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs)
---
| | |
Fellow Patriot,

Tyranny has been creeping across our country for decades, but **_for the past two years it’s been sweeping_** ; lockdowns, forced masking, vaccine mandates, and many other restrictions.

**The same thing happened in Canada where our brave brothers and sisters _lit a spark that’s going to light a fire of freedom_ _in the hearts of every liberty loving man, woman, and child on earth._**

We intend to carry that torch from across the country to Washington, D.C.
**_[SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmho057cpi958ntcl6gvtp663fb341herqr9ta50_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY")_**
Since the lockdown politicians insisted we give up our liberties in exchange for safety, and one thing has become absolutely clear: **_no politician or government action can slow the spread of COVID-19, they can only accelerate the spread of authoritarianism_**.

That’s why we’re trucking across the country to Washington D.C., it’s time the government gives up their “emergency powers” and returns them to where they belong: the people.
**_[SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0n3t0t59a7aarq6dioqknfapd4n31eckhb5grfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "SUPPORT THE USA FREEDOM CONVOY")_**
**Free people don’t have to protest for Freedom.**

If we don’t act now, **_we’ll see the exact same authoritarian takeover our brothers and sisters in Canada are experiencing right here in the USA..._** and half of the country will go along with it because they are afraid of having their bank accounts frozen, human rights suspended, or worse.

Right now, thanks to the overwhelming support from patriots across the country, our convoy is growing larger and larger everyday with Truckers from Fresno, to Bismark, to Cleveland, to Baton Rouge signing up to join.

But, the cost of this convoy grows with every Trucker who signs on, and that’s why we’re reaching out today to ask you to sponsor a Trucker in what could be the largest peaceful protest in history.
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdtd4epb8mn7civlm3okfc81enloc06dkrqj3bg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt5tj7tkt4i6e6fps8voadno5f5kd8pg66s0ho68_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**
**_[$75 = 50 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z74097sggrk4nifk20ti0bjh7upb31ab827orbfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "$75 = 50 Miles")_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zth0t6n2ltdltcplafljju2lai9ebih5al2q0528_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfg60hvoic4q0aico0phijn9h4u5rct0e8hpmphg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn9ombj0e4pkdla84kg5j1jldb1naott8rbnffdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")_**
**_[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqfv804be1o56lbaro7snl67gnf6bptq2mntft3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
**_[$5,000 = FULL TRIP](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zntrgtfp63flgig1l1adeaugfrokuhv2k2jhi4m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "$5,000 = FULL TRIP")_**
The Freedom Convoy must be the movement heard around the world, and we’re asking for your most generous gift to make that a reality.

**[Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrbi34gfb7tfg6l62th52n04eud34b2g9aji6nng_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "Can you cover the cost of fuel for 50 miles for one of our Freedom Truckers?")**

The time is now to take patriotic, beautiful, peaceful action, or we may never regain the freedoms we once had. **_We’re not in the business of telling our children and their children what it was like when America was free,[but we can’t do it alone.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsnobqq4h7d0im58cpe8a112nsgo7oku5e631ltg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "but we can’t do it alone.")_**

**_[Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf29fu9abtn9aaoqop6933rajqbnj33nf903s7lo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm0oj6clh2bs "Help fuel our convoy as we take direct action to regain our freedoms and ensure we never lose our liberty again.")_**

Honk Honk,

American Truckers Freedom Fund

name: Tom Perez
subject: Supporters like you
body:
Thank you for believing in me, for joining Team Tom, and for investing in a better future for the state that we love.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42428393/332930625/1234338550?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220301-EOMThankYou-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY4MDRkYS1hODk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLoTy71f39w_abWwe1Mml5aO5t6u3GG_AhFNSchZ1C0=)
Team,

I wanted to take a moment to personally thank you for your support so far on this campaign. Thanks to folks like you, we're building a movement to fight for a Maryland where _everyone_ has access to a good-paying job, every child receives a world-class education, and justice is really equal for all.

I'm more determined than ever to make that future a reality for all Maryland families, but the road ahead of us includes more crucial deadlines and even greater challenges. **We can't afford to take our foot off the pedal now if we want to win this race.**

If you didn't have a chance to donate toward our February goal, **_[it would mean the world to me if you could chip in today to ensure we can keep building on our momentum.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42428394/332930626/1234338550?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220301-EOMThankYou-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGY4MDRkYS1hODk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLoTy71f39w_abWwe1Mml5aO5t6u3GG_AhFNSchZ1C0=)_**

Thank you for believing in me, for joining Team Tom, and for investing in a better future for the state that we love.

– Tom

Thanks to folks like you, we're building a movement to fight for a Maryland where everyone has access to a good-paying job, every child receives a world-class education, and justice is really equal for all. I'm more determined than ever to make that future a reality for all Maryland families, but the road ahead of us includes more crucial deadlines and even greater challenges. name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: My first State of the Union 17 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter, I still remember the first State of the Union I attended in person.
It was 2005. I was recovering at Walter Reed after being wounded in Iraq and Senator Dick Durbin invited me as his guest. It began a long friendship that continues to this day with both of us working hard for the people of Illinois.
And I want that partnership to continue. I’m running for re-election in November and one thing is for certain—we cannot take any seats for granted, including my own.
**[Can I count on you to split a $5 contribution to Senator Durbin and myself to help me win in Illinois and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42428458/332930781/-1095267648?refcode=dd_em_220301_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjIzNDg0Mi1hOTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JwFAL-I7NhvLnwXJnPRq54qWTrLr9bEjXCFim5pxTfQ=)**
I’m so proud of the work we have done in the Senate this past year. The American Rescue Plan kept people in their jobs and in their homes. It kept food on the table. As someone who grew up relying on food stamps, that means a lot to me.
The Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill is also a big win for Illinois and for the country. It is already creating jobs, improving our roads, expanding broadband access and bringing our state into the future.
It’s been one of the great honors of my life to represent Illinois. And I want to keep doing it. But there are no guarantees in politics. Just six years ago, I defeated an incumbent Republican to win this seat—and we need the resources to build a strong campaign again this year.
**[Help me defend my seat in the Senate so I can keep working hard for the people in Illinois, and around the country, who need help the most. Split $5 or anything you can to Senator Durbin and myself now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42428459/332930782/-1095267648?refcode=dd_em_220301_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjIzNDg0Mi1hOTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JwFAL-I7NhvLnwXJnPRq54qWTrLr9bEjXCFim5pxTfQ=)**
All my best,
Tammy Duckworth

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42428460/332930783/-1095267648?refcode=dd_em_220301_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjIzNDg0Mi1hOTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JwFAL-I7NhvLnwXJnPRq54qWTrLr9bEjXCFim5pxTfQ=)****

body:

# **Friend — Joe Biden’s State of the Union is tonight. Ahead of then, we’re reaching out to each of our supporters with a three-question poll.**

---
Do YOU approve of Biden? Do you think America is moving in the right direction? And if you believe America is heading in the wrong direction, do you think we need new leadership to change direction? _[**Take the poll NOW and let Gary know what you think!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2fd744c85f0cb97f/bb73ef3cb467fb6dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)_
---
[**BEGIN SURVEY »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2fd744c85f0cb97f/7e99def40ecfbd9cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black is exposing Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock’s failures every single day on the campaign trail. And he’s offering conservative solutions to save our country. **Just as we depend on your support to fuel our campaign, we also depend on your input to guide our strategy.[So please take this survey now, before Biden’s State of the Union.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/2fd744c85f0cb97f/79be98022a235eb2c3d6b838967d376c/37793) ** It will only take a few seconds. Team Gary

---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42428524/332931170/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzM1NDgzYi1hYTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQ3B0Wr2o5GlPMwvaVb1tQxNIqt4CYkNLLLjZNN6m1E=)

Friend,

After a short but busy month, I wanted to give you _great news_ on our February fundraising. We _exceeded_ our ambitious end-of-month goal, putting us on track to start off March on the right foot.

I would like to thank you and all the generous supporters who made last month a success. And I'd like to give a special shoutout to our volunteers helping to collect petition signatures to make sure my name will be on the ballot for the May 17 primary election. **I cannot express how much this extra help pushes our campaign forward and brings us closer to winning this election.**

Friend, there are a lot of things that are at stake in November – empowering our workers, saving our democracy, protecting the middle class, helping families, and so much more. I flipped a district that Trump won by 19 points, and then won in another Republican district — twice. This is the campaign that can win this election for the working families of Pennsylvania, and I'm so grateful for your support.

Thank you again,

Conor Lamb [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42428525/332931171/-993140480?refcode=em22_220301_eomty&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzM1NDgzYi1hYTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQ3B0Wr2o5GlPMwvaVb1tQxNIqt4CYkNLLLjZNN6m1E=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42428526/332931172/-993140480?refcode=em22_220301_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzM1NDgzYi1hYTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oQ3B0Wr2o5GlPMwvaVb1tQxNIqt4CYkNLLLjZNN6m1E=)

subject: Kevin McCarthy Endorses Scott Baugh For Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=fead452eb2&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,

We wanted you to be among the first to hear this exciting news! Republican Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy is endorsing Scott Baugh for Congress.
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=bf9977a011&e=8a657725d1)
---
| As you may know, Scott is running to defeat liberal activist and Progressive Caucus leader Katie Porter. Leader McCarthy is picking Scott because he is the best chance we have of defeating Porter.

Why is this race so important?

Just a handful of seats will be the difference between Leader McCarthy being in charge of what gets voted on or Nancy Pelosi staying in charge. If that happens, Pelosi and Porter will continue ramming their far-left agenda down all of our throats.

But this seat is one of the best pickup opportunities for Republicans in the entire country and could be the one that makes all the difference. That’s why Leader McCarthy is getting involved now, and we need your help.

Will you help us take back the House?
---
| [DONATE NOW TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=6631d4bed1&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE NOW TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE")
---
| Thank you,
Team Baugh

name: Roger Marshall
subject: Before Biden takes the stage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
96https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/biden-sotu-email-fr?utm
_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march1hf Friend —
Joe Biden takes the stage for his State of the Union in a few short
hours. Between now and then, we need to send him a message — will you
help?

Biden has barely been in office a year, and he’s been a total
disaster.

He’s flung open our borders, refused to support police,
and his big government policies have driven inflation to a 40-year
high.

He’s catered to the woke mob and the abortion lobby. He
imposed one tyrannical mandate after another and refused to hold Fauci
accountable for his dishonesty.

And Biden totally humiliated America
with his Afghanistan debacle. Now, he’s refusing to cut off our
dependence on Russian oil and he’s refusing to unleash America’s energy
independence.

I’m asking Kansans and Americans to join me in sending
Joe Biden a message — BEFORE he speaks tonight — that we’re going to
hold him accountable.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/biden-sotu-email-fr?utm_
source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march1hf Will you pitch in
whatever you can, right now?
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/biden-sotu-email-fr?utm_
source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march1hf HOLD BIDEN
ACCOUNTABLE » Biden is going to try to spin his record and convince you
that he’s had a successful first year in office. Don’t fall for it.
He’s failed, and the only way to hold him accountable is for
Republicans to take back the U.S. Senate in November.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/biden-sotu-email-fr?utm_
source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march1hf Your donation
will help make that happen. And it’ll send Biden an important message
that you aren’t falling for his political theater.

I hope you’ll act
now.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/biden-sotu-email-fr?utm_
source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march1hf Senator Roger
Marshall
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/biden-sotu-email-fr?utm_
source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march1hf HOLD BIDEN
ACCOUNTABLE »
 https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email-footer
?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march1hf Keep reading
for a personal message from Doc:

Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate
to defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith.
And that's exactly what I'm doing.

But I can't keep up the fight
without your help. We're facing an onslaught from the woke left, and
Democrats across the country are raising millions to keep their power.
I'm not about to back down, but I need you standing with me. If
you're able, I hope you'll chip in below. Taking back the Senate in
2022 depends on patriots like you standing with us.

-Senator Roger
Marshall
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email-footer?utm_so
urce=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march1hf DONATE NOW » We
know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is,
these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they
can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer
emails or unsubscribe,
http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=ae24902c6dcaf0eb7c94c760ea8
3e7c0&c=37973&jid=87b92b158ee2adb2&d=b5cb52a6f9bea080c3d6b838967d376c&u=
http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=
ae24902c6dcaf0eb7c94c760ea83e7c0&c=37973&jid=87b92b158ee2adb2 click
here.

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by:

Kansans for Marshall

PO
Box 1588

Great Bend, KS 67530

PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL

To unsubscribe visit: http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=d12155c7b96bd914
