| Friends, Tonight, President Biden is going to address the nation with his State of the Union Address. But what is the real state of our Union? **Thanks to the failed policies of the Biden Administration and the Democrats in Washington:**
* Inflation is the highest in 40 years
* Our national debt and deficit have exploded
* Groceries and gas prices are up and still rising
* Open borders and drugs flooding in from Central America

[> Help us fight back against the Biden Administration by chipping $5 to the NH Senate Republicans (secure link)](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODk2NTA3MzI1ODc5OTQ5Mjk3JmM9bDN4NyZlPTE5MjgmYj05Mjc5MzU2MDkmZD1mOHQ0dzhr.U486yuKavurkq5QWfJ77tj-4UOOAjHq3WOG0jTyO5ek) **Luckily, Our Republican Majority here in New Hampshire is producing real results and real opportunities -- and working to keep Washington's destructive policies OUT of New Hampshire:**
* A balanced, fiscally responsible budget that cuts taxes and provides property tax relief
* Higher than expected state revenues and budget surpluses
* Common sense, conservative reforms including protecting the 2nd Amendment and election integrity
* Recently named the #1 State for Economic Freedom

We need your help if we want to protect the Republican majority here in New Hampshire and keep Biden's failed agenda from destroying all that we have achieved in the Granite State! [Chip in $5, $15, or even $100 to the NH Senate Republicans!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODk2NTA3MzI1ODc5OTQ5Mjk3JmM9bDN4NyZlPTE5MjgmYj05Mjc5MzU2MTImZD1uOW0wdTF1.XbxXzmyshlx-T09jy-9cGngjeqmbK3v9I1hgpEVqe50)
God bless America and God bless New Hampshire. Thank you, The NH Senate Republicans

Thanks to the failed policies of the Biden Administration and the Democrats in Washington: Inflation is the highest in 40 years Our national debt and deficit have exploded Groceries and gas prices are up and still rising Open borders and drugs flooding in from Central America Luckily, Our Republican Majority here in New Hampshire is producing real results and real opportunities -- and working to keep Washington's destructive policies OUT of New Hampshire: A balanced, fiscally responsible budget that cuts taxes and provides property tax relief Higher than expected state revenues and budget surpluses Common sense, conservative reforms including protecting the 2nd Amendment and election integrity Recently named the #1 State for Economic Freedom We need your help if we want to protect the Republican majority here in New Hampshire and keep Biden's failed agenda from destroying all that we have achieved in the Granite State! | | Hey there, folks! I’m Rob Sand – Iowa State Auditor, a husband and father, and a proud Hawkeye. Some of you know me, some of you don't – but allow me to make sure the basics are clear for everyone. The question I get all the time is, _“what the heck is a State Auditor?”_ **My job is to identify and call out waste and abuse by public officials, regardless of party affiliation. I seek out and combat fraud and corruption** – _kind of like if Batman focused on tracking down those who abuse positions of power and trust in society. (Hush. I am like Batman. Let me have this.)_ My wife and two sons might cringe at the comparison, but there really is a crime-fighting aspect to my work, both now and then. During my previous job as Assistant Attorney General, I investigated and prosecuted the Iowa Film Office tax credit and “Hot Lotto” lottery-fixing scandals, for example. Since winning statewide office, I’ve uncovered several instances of the Governor misusing millions of dollars worth of pandemic relief, taken my own beloved University of Iowa to the Iowa Supreme Court and beat them in the name of transparency, and helped city and county governments find ways to save taxpayers money. _All in a day’s work, folks._ I love my job, and I could use your help winning re-election later this year – a big win would lay the foundation for more Democrats to win in Iowa down the line. **[I’d appreciate it if you helped me kick off my 2022 campaign! In 2020, we led all of Texas in voter turnout – and that’s how we are going to win statewide races in 2022. We need to make sure that we turn out voters in primaries, because that’s where we build grassroots support for policies that help working families.

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. Take a look at the poll here: = = Here’s the big takeaway: the primary is just weeks away, which means we’re running out of time to bring those undecided voters onboard Team Cranley-Fedor before they head to the polls. But this is good news, friend — our race is TIED, which means victory is well within grasp. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Cranley-Fedor = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = =_ | Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 545 EAST TOWN STREET COLUMBUS, OH 43215 United States Click here to

Founded by Bernie Sanders after his 2016 presidential campaign showed that working people everywhere are ready to fight and organize for change, Our Revolution is building a deep bench of progressives up and down the ballot in races all across the country.
And make no mistake, the revolution is happening right here in NY-03: A revolution for Medicare for All, for climate justice and a Green New Deal, for clean water, for criminal justice reform, for safe neighborhoods and safe schools without the threat of gun violence, for everything working families need not just to survive, but to thrive.
**Bold policies like these are at the heart of our campaign, because we know they’re rooted in deeply American values.**
Our political system is broken, with politicians catering again and again to corporations and special interests screwing over working families in the process. Our Revolution is supporting Melanie’s campaign to change that — but we need your help.
We’re not accepting a dime in corporate money, because we know that’s how you end up with corruption at every level of our politics.

clean_body: | | | | Big news, Peter Willis — Melanie has just been endorsed for Congress in NY-03 by Our Revolution! ** Founded by Bernie Sanders after his 2016 presidential campaign showed that working people everywhere are ready to fight and organize for change, Our Revolution is building a deep bench of progressives up and down the ballot in races all across the country. And make no mistake, the revolution is happening right here in NY-03: A revolution for Medicare for All, for climate justice and a Green New Deal, for clean water, for criminal justice reform, for safe neighborhoods and safe schools without the threat of gun violence, for everything working families need not just to survive, but to thrive. Bold policies like these are at the heart of our campaign, because we know they’re rooted in deeply American values. Our political system is broken, with politicians catering again and again to corporations and special interests screwing over working families in the process. Our Revolution is supporting Melanie’s campaign to change that — but we need your help. We’re not accepting a dime in corporate money, because we know that’s how you end up with corruption at every level of our politics. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Let's get to work! Team D'Arrigo Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. ** | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE D'ARRIGO Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. clean_body: | | Peter, We went into yesterday needing to raise $3,372, and we BARELY missed our February goal. But I just heard from Josh, and our February deadline has been extended by ONE DAY! We need to raise just $748 dollars, and anything you give TODAY will go towards our February goal!! I know with the extra day we can finish strong! God Bless, Tyler Team Hawley \-------Forwarded message------- From: Josh Hawley Subject: ⏳DEADLINE ALERT Date: February 28, 2022 | Peter, Our end-of-month deadline is TONIGHT at 11:59pm. We still haven’t met our monthly goal — we still need to raise $3,372 to stay ahead in the race to take back the Senate. We need our top American patriots on board and excited to make the Senate red and get our country back on the right track. Over the past year, the Biden Administration and leading Democrats have looked past increased crime, cost of living, and struggles of the American people. It’s time we put the American people first once again and put an end to the Left’s reckless and selfish agenda. Time is running out to meet this month’s deadline. Do your part to make a difference before it's too late. Pitch in TODAY before it’s too late. Help us take back the Senate!! In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

clean_body: It’s not too late to pre-register. Find out all of the details about your precinct! Eli Bremer Logo ( ) Are you registered for the GOP Caucus yet? If not, you can visit our website for all of the details: ( ) In Colorado, the GOP Caucus marks the beginning stages of nominating a candidate. That’s why your support has never been more important. image1-Mar-01-2022-09-14-08-10-PM ( ) We are getting closer to nominating a candidate to represent the Republican party against Michael Bennet. Eli’s common sense message will resonate through Colorado, giving us the best chance to flip Michael Bennet’s seat. It is time Colorado got the leader they deserve; a leader to go to work for us. As the race heats up, can we count on you for support? PRE-REGISTER NOW ( ) Let’s carry our momentum all the way to Washington. Signed, Team Bremer Paid For By Eli For Colorado Eli For Colorado, 13395 Voyager Parkway Ste 130-Box 3, Colorado Springs, CO 80921

Peter,
This past weekend, I flew down to Orlando, Florida for CPAC 2022. This conference hosts America’s top Conservatives who are committed to fighting for our freedoms, stopping radical-leftists, and bringing back America First values.

I had the amazing privilege of speaking in front of thousands of these patriots. But what I heard afterwards was empowering.

[_AMERICANS ARE READY FOR A CHANGE_ _

They are fed up with the Biden administration, they are sick of the radical Democrats, and they despise RINOs like Lisa Murkowski. This past year, not only have we had to deal with COVID shut downs, but we also dealt with supply chain issues, a border crisis, and the government shoving woke indoctrination onto our children in school.

The people want a fighter who will stand up and not back down on their principles. Someone who will fight for our jobs, ensure we have election security, stop Bideninflation, and close our borders to illegal immigrants.

[_I am that leader!_](https://u21094568.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=60-2BjHbupYa9XZQcRI8CzLQTHRSHTvCEL-2FeGb6c0RtFvErltmUBr3gOxf6eFjgDPT6yY9krgfcxn6G-2FHqbpR346uCg6v7NDtPmdSFSHd6j4xizLMo-2BypixZAda6iSYdbVekKbs-2FbfQbt9C3hsd0HHcfKzautM9VObwM4-2BJSYCmI4GBYrtnw79Z17P8Kzt5Cd-2Fg-2BVjEOHK8Q0W7vCecZCgzzd9Bx-2BL-2BkEMSuFVI6zG0sY-3DbX8R_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6WZUaxF-2BOoEnMSFa-2FBE17JPTPgFhlj8PZtpFXvWp0afQGwL7RWe6D8qyOarEhsSEOxh8g-2FmiSmyF52HTgbAOMzQnAQ7oZufYt7r-2B6lumEGSCHi62lBLr21ns3usIeSFZXURbExGmQjX-2By0Wme4zBOyUgnRxhJWZId1CTtqBi4mB9XG6a-2BzLd2bYpLrSAah0tqUsRWyLFntXn5j-2FZ04XMLfmjxNh5uB3LdFvsCdkSjZ4p38BmNQZjfP6PvSPmwIL08JcpDieAu6rCUhg4Jm2Ygkwtuqee9cMS54h3-2B0U-2F1bCs4HYsUuOk2YxaX3xQ9Q2EtUo8XxHLgVSfvuAQ5O4jQqQGB46SfHoSXkNQrad487hFVweQjXHe-2FaflEoUuo8zRo9BeM1vh-2FVwTt7zgEeLNQUMNnkpabUbehpUIzAnG8gBgsdf32kemp80yCJiFYaEQ9DUh3Vp33gYov1QtvKk4GJ7rHHTdL3LchxjViccgH26b4EUQNE9vMbETl4nI1ngnHmgAl6ZAmnViYdYYE6ep7M6ctXk1OEwmVNB01MYAqd1OYy9065zR3w-2FCbEzqS-2Bl2eqVF3iiLFylifsgMZT5wdJzhVXnWv-2FMSZ-2F8GpI61AZrVs0zfpVMsCbVq71By7QOOBhpXinsZzuFO2qE4a4YNJoxA-2FEmBT2Z8ojLMA0UXO5js0NsepG-2FPD38tzHsyea3uh4coqysowAWTnAYOdh8v1hp1tZGrWGhozS7nW-2FMn-2BsndJG5AKWkCiyuEF91ea5BI1-2FqMzW6SZESKp-2FGwLy-2BOs4mBzQgoPDLHAEO5MP2rMfBaKQFBuJnNgXUZ89NEYCpidQXCxSzyrSjdkEyF5sHrbKg-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | Murkowski and Biden have failed us. | Peter, This past weekend, I flew down to Orlando, Florida for CPAC 2022. This conference hosts America’s top Conservatives who are committed to fighting for our freedoms, stopping radical-leftists, and bringing back America First values. I had the amazing privilege of speaking in front of thousands of these patriots. But what I heard afterwards was empowering. They are fed up with the Biden administration, they are sick of the radical Democrats, and they despise RINOs like Lisa Murkowski. This past year, not only have we had to deal with COVID shut downs, but we also dealt with supply chain issues, a border crisis, and the government shoving woke indoctrination onto our children in school. The people want a fighter who will stand up and not back down on their principles. Someone who will fight for our jobs, ensure we have election security, stop Bideninflation, and close our borders to illegal immigrants. We can turn our Country around and bring back an America First & an Alaskan First mindset. Washington D.C. elites don’t care about you and I, which is why they are backing Liberal Lisa Murkowski. But I listened to the people in Alaska and heard so many at CPAC. We are ready for change! Thank you, Kelly Tshibaka Candidate for United States Senate FROM ALASKA. FOR ALASKA. ⭐️CONSERVATIVE⭐️PRO-LIFE⭐️PRO-2ND AMENDMENT | | | | ==

Joe Biden’s just nominated extreme radical Judge Kentaji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court.

Biden made it clear from the start that character and qualifications would NOT be a priority when selecting a nominee.

**_He just wanted to check a diversity quota, and this choice says a LOT about the future Democrats want for our country._**

Throughout her career, Judge Jackson has consistently disregarded our Constitution by opposing religious liberty and acting more like a Planned Parenthood activist than an impartial judge.

**Nobody like this should ever be allowed on the Supreme Court.**

We must defend religious freedom, the right for unborn Americans to live, and every other freedom guaranteed under our Constitution. [**That’s why I’m urging you to stand with me against Biden’s nominee.**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=c58ddb97217241fda5f49973fb7ad620&_e=NKk1cSRr4VLYRg3Ir0SNwZhsoNVNDhcd3rjNSroQpEP6yGMpM2URzopcMkSDgF4eAwCazidhrC3yVgPuU-4h8i7xZOJ-HXMg1y5M1MuGQvxSdtK4kYVfz3fmef2dkKtxEmXwgofrLc4wApeMW4jLiMEr2s77_JrWHmoA7EmpzwdltnKjkFtj3co_0vtLQzJxFbNsVmdl-hdt1uHxdeLSyjqX3VuUC7J0VaCKbOl-Pyli0SlJ1V7inHSZT19ZDteQcLr5arS2VzuWjrs8vMlPnUaSQz_JWYr3EPaC2-jwqWNd7lcTUepA700vNT0BG1ajIW1MS1f--oAjEl1JP0-C9j4HKZszGkdM3UnE0sdyuTSed7VfsaiTsbCRyXNqwEI2a78pVuv5wuVlpSCtmo26hT297n7toRQY4ETOERJYXQrtP4cRD1OLojGOt9YOORw3IFg9qT7dLiuyTI-miz--cZux7pOe77Fx6if0lbGsrJMTUpr9gg02O5vlFv0T-k43)
[**DEFEND THE CONSTITUTION: REJECT BIDEN’S CHOICE**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=c58ddb97217241fda5f49973fb7ad620&_e=NKk1cSRr4VLYRg3Ir0SNwZhsoNVNDhcd3rjNSroQpEP6yGMpM2URzopcMkSDgF4eAwCazidhrC3yVgPuU-4h8i7xZOJ-HXMg1y5M1MuGQvxSdtK4kYVfz3fmef2dkKtxEmXwgofrLc4wApeMW4jLiMEr2s77_JrWHmoA7EmpzwdltnKjkFtj3co_0vtLQzJxFbNsVmdl-hdt1uHxdeLSyjqX3VuUC7J0VaCKbOl-Pyli0SlJ1V7inHSZT19ZDteQcLr5arS2VzuWjrs8vMlPnUaSQz_JWYr3EPaC2-jwqWNjy04hum8uaeUqChzN1uI52R5xlE_1eCiqBeBJMALK4qOAqj4PQHNoH68uiA9A8LeFznjO-314Kxe7PoZVRhWQRSk6OW1AV_HkxZvY1cv8HoYeJDef9PleovHHPQl7z_JCsnZgrEsiVu8pGnmoGPoG5ijOb72o8vip_chundKN4eaH3ewvvWiG-Xr112dVJYrxE89eNadLHe-JqIttwLix)

name: Peter Welch
subject: What your support means to this this team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
With folks like you on our team, we can preserve our democracy and deliver progress.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=120%2E61531%2EDQ-XGo)
Hello,
I’m grateful for the folks like you who continue to power this team. I’m running for Senate because I love Vermont and the way Vermonters choose to get involved in their communities, listen to their neighbors, and work together to find solutions.
Today gives us an incredible example of Vermont’s unique approach: Town Meeting Day. A form of government that exists nowhere else in the world outside of New England, Town Meeting Day involves direct democracy in action. It’s a beautiful display of civic engagement — a government shaped by the governed — a right that we need to protect.
**It’s no secret that our country’s democracy is imperiled.**
We’re witnessing unprecedented attacks on voting rights and the peaceful transfer of power. Our government should be making it easier to exercise your right to vote, not engaging in extreme efforts to disenfranchise voters of color — but that’s what Republican legislators are focused on and working to do across the country.
**American democracy as we know it is on the ballot this November.** But I know that with you on our team, we can win this critical fight.
**So thank you once again.** I’m proud to be working with you.

Peter

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew?=
subject: SFCN Announces Justin Ouimette As Vice President of Government Affairs
body:
SFCN Announces Justin Ouimette As Vice President of Government Affairs | | | |
---
| | |
> WASHINGTON, D.C. – State Freedom Caucus Network President Andy Roth released the following statement regarding the hiring of the first Vice President of Government Affairs of the State Freedom Caucus Network:
>
> “ _We are thrilled to announce that Justin Ouimette is joining the State Freedom Caucus Network as the Vice President of Government Affairs. Justin brings a wealth of experience in government to the Network, and the wisdom that comes along with it. He’s been fighting the Swamp in DC and now he’ll be working with us to fight the various Swamps in the 50 states. I look forward to working together to expand the Network and grow the conservative movement. _
>
> _Currently, Justin serves as the Executive Director of the House Freedom Caucus. Prior to that post, he served as the Policy Director for the House Freedom Caucus and as a Legislative Director._ ”

name: Team Jasmine
subject: It’s official, Madison Cawthorn is back in NC-11
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42420478/332895698/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWJhMDhjOS04Yjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEpaRIGdjt2vQ_BKY75i0y6wq1h2_u1Wn3iZGQVXmTE=)

| | | **BREAKING: Madison Cawthorn just announced he's running for re-election in NC-11 – making him Jasmine's opponent once again. **
[**We’re 72% of the way towards reaching our Rapid Response Fund goal. Chip in $11 or whatever you can to get us over the top.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42420479/332895699/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220301_FR_ReturnOfCawthorn_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWJhMDhjOS04Yjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEpaRIGdjt2vQ_BKY75i0y6wq1h2_u1Wn3iZGQVXmTE=)
---
Peter,
Madison Cawthorn has re-entered the race in NC-11, and will once again be Jasmine’s opponent.
After abandoning the majority of his constituents to run in a district in which he does not live for the sake of political opportunism, Western North Carolina voters will have the opportunity to hold Cawthorn accountable for his lack of leadership and dangerous behavior.
We knew that Western North Carolina was ground zero for his attempted extremist takeover of our state, and this only drives home further that we need to be ready to come together and defeat Cawthorn and his toxic brand of politics.
We know we have what it takes to defeat him, but we need everyone to step up and meet the urgency of this moment with us.
[**Rush an $11 donation right now to our Rapid Response Fund to help give us the resources we need to defeat Cawthorn once and for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42420480/332895700/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220301_FR_ReturnOfCawthorn_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWJhMDhjOS04Yjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEpaRIGdjt2vQ_BKY75i0y6wq1h2_u1Wn3iZGQVXmTE=)
| | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42420481/332895701/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220301_FR_ReturnOfCawthorn_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWJhMDhjOS04Yjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dEpaRIGdjt2vQ_BKY75i0y6wq1h2_u1Wn3iZGQVXmTE=)
---
We’ve been preparing for this moment.
While Cawthorn has neglected the responsibility of representing the people of Western North Carolina in order to build his profile as a celebrity on the fringes of the far-right, Jasmine has been listening.
We have been on the road hearing from voters and connecting with folks across Western NC because the only way we’re going to pave a new path forward is by organizing everywhere.

clean_body: | = | | | BREAKING: Madison Cawthorn just announced he's running for re-election in NC-11 – making him Jasmine's opponent once again. = Peter, Madison Cawthorn has re-entered the race in NC-11, and will once again be Jasmine’s opponent. After abandoning the majority of his constituents to run in a district in which he does not live for the sake of political opportunism, Western North Carolina voters will have the opportunity to hold Cawthorn accountable for his lack of leadership and dangerous behavior. We knew that Western North Carolina was ground zero for his attempted extremist takeover of our state, and this only drives home further that we need to be ready to come together and defeat Cawthorn and his toxic brand of politics. We know we have what it takes to defeat him, but we need everyone to step up and meet the urgency of this moment with us. = | | = We’ve been preparing for this moment. While Cawthorn has neglected the responsibility of representing the people of Western North Carolina in order to build his profile as a celebrity on the fringes of the far-right, Jasmine has been listening. We have been on the road hearing from voters and connecting with folks across Western NC because the only way we’re going to pave a new path forward is by organizing everywhere. Despite the changes in our race, our message remains the same – we’re going to give Western North Carolina the representation it deserves. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s do this, Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. It's clear Biden is keeping his promises – but not everyone is on board. Biden may have the support of the majority of Democrats, but Mitch McConnell is doing everything he can to BLOCK Biden's agenda – so we need to make it CRYSTAL CLEAR where we stand. There's only one problem:Our poll is closing in just a few hours, but your response is missing! And yet, our House Democrats STILL fell short of their critical End of Month goal. This is serious: President Biden is set to deliver the BIGGEST speech of his presidency in just NINE hours... ... And as of this morning, his House Majority is closer to collapse than ever before. But luckily, we just got some AMAZING news: All-star Democrats agreed to EXTEND the 300% Match for these final hours before President Biden 's speech. name: Dan Farough
subject: A bit of news in February I hope you saw
body:
Friend,

Like you and me, Jocelyn has been following coverage of the war in Ukraine and the fight for democracy at home and abroad. Between reports coming out of Ukraine and the latest attacks on our elections here at home, global democracy is under its greatest threat in decades. But while these attacks grow in intensity, the pro-democracy coalition grows stronger. From Jocelyn’s critical work here in Michigan to the response from leaders around the world in support of Ukraine, the resolve to fight for democracy seems as alive as ever. I am taking comfort in our united response to these events, and I hope you are, too, friend.

Without further ado, here’s some news I hope you haven’t missed.

Jocelyn announced she will be joining the Truman Center’s City and State Diplomacy Task Force With the pro-democracy battle being waged across the globe, Jocelyn will be developing a series of recommendations on how to broaden diplomatic engagement across the U.S. and strengthen ties between the U.S. State Department and local governments.

In early February, a GOP candidate for the state legislature openly called for people to “show up armed” to monitor our elections. Jocelyn immediately spoke out against this horrifying behavior, labeling it as a “ crime,” during an interview with CNN.

https://twitter.com/brikeilarcnn/status/1488507398709035014 [https://twitter.com/brikeilarcnn/status/1488507398709035014]

Jocelyn is speaking out against people that are trying to spread violence and disorder in our elections. Show Jocelyn that you have her back by supporting her campaign today.

There was some good news buried in our most recent Campaign Finance filing, too. Ninety-one percent of the donations to Jocelyn’s campaign were $100 or less. The Benson Finance Team dug a bit deeper and found that our grassroots donations averaged out to $23.97.

This confirms one of the key principles of our campaign: Jocelyn doesn’t rely on large money special interests and she certainly doesn’t answer to them. Our campaign is supported by voters who believe in democracy and trust that Jocelyn is the best person to administer our elections.

Help Jocelyn sustain this grassroots campaign by contributing the average donation today >>https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=030122]

Contribute $23.97 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=030122&amount=23.97

Jocelyn continued her work leading the national conversation over how to protect our elections by co-authoring two opinion pieces in major news outlets.
Jocelyn and her California colleague, Secretary Shirley Nash Weber, penned an oped that appeared on the CNN website on how to defend our elections.

Read >> https://www.cnn.com/2022/02/18/opinions/democracy-on-the-ballot-midterms-weber-benson/index.html

Earlier in the month, Jocelyn co-authored an opinion piece for The Hill with Joanna Lydgate and Christine Todd Whitman on how we can still protect our democracy without Congressional voting rights legislation.

Read >> https://thehill.com/opinion/civil-rights/594123-congress-failed-to-pass-voting-rights-legislation-but-we-can-still-save
A few weeks ago it was learned that an unauthorized individual may have gained access to a vote tabulation machine in Roscommon County. This directly aligns with the many attempts to access our voting tabulators following the 2020 election.

Remember, in December 2020 a third party accessed voting tabulators in Antrim County and used the data to falsely claim voter fraud. Rudy Giuliani pressured a Michigan prosecutor to turn over voting machines to him. And we know Donald Trump drafted an executive order that would have allowed the U.S. Department of Defense to seize our voting machines.
Jocelyn has made it clear: no Michigander should have to worry about their vote being seized by an outside political force.

As for the Roscommon matter, Jocelyn has referred it to Attorney General Dana Nessel for investigation and sent a letter to all Michigan election clerks with guidance on how to deal with issues like this in the future.
Just another example of how crucial it is to have Jocelyn’s leadership in our state.

Help Jocelyn sustain this grassroots campaign>>https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=030122]

Sincerely,
Dan Farough
Campaign Manager

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO Box 21368
Detroit, MI 48221
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f5218fa9-9199-ec11-a507-281878b80eda/03470068-b899-ec11-a507-281878b80eda?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzQ3MDA2OC1iODk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p4i3nD6KfB4LB0rZ0Ov3Wgsw9fx9CxUf7y41R4fqPaA=&id=112210963 .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Russell=20Fry?=
subject: We stand with Ukraine 🇺🇦
body:
Today I filed multiple bills that will force South Carolina’s state investment fund to divest from Russian investments... | | | |
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Today I filed multiple bills that will force South Carolina’s state investment commission to divest from Russian investments and ban South Carolina liquor stores from selling Russian alcohol.

_Over 20 members of the State House have joined me._

If passed, these bills would add South Carolina to the growing list of nations, states, and private companies that have taken action in response to Russia’s unprovoked attack on Ukraine, a sovereign, democratic country.

**My first bill** would prohibit the investment of state funds in companies owned in whole or in part by Russia. It would further prohibit Russian-owned companies from receiving state incentives.

**My second bill** would ban liquor stores from selling alcohol that is manufactured or produced in Russia.
_ _
_**South Carolina dollars should not be subsidizing Vladimir Putin and his oligarchs.**_

Russia’s belligerent behavior in Ukraine requires an unprecedented response, and these bills will show the world that South Carolina stands for freedom.

Our hearts and prayers remain with the Ukrainian people. They inspire us all.
In Freedom,

State Rep. Russell Fry
---

subject: Putin's Secret Nuclear Super Weapons Reveals
body:
American Action News Even the US Can't Match Them...

body:
Peter, we are HERE for Jessica Mason.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42421623/332899930/1300596418?refcode=220301_FR_bte-jessicamason3_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk2ZDAzYS05MTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7pLna8iy7yxH2AwPF_KQ2aJqNqBmS47comDyYY7qq4k=)
Hi Team BTE!
After days of traveling from across the country to Dallas, knocking on doors across the district, and calling last minute undecided voters, the big day is finally here!
When the polls opened at 7am, our team, along with other campaign staffers and volunteers, were there outside the doors ready to greet voters as they head inside to make their final decisions and cast their ballots.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42421624/332899931/214728439?refcode=220301_FR_bte-jessicamason3_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk2ZDAzYS05MTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7pLna8iy7yxH2AwPF_KQ2aJqNqBmS47comDyYY7qq4k=)
We're all proud to support Jessica because we know that she's the only candidate in this race who will always put people first. And despite her opponents' claims, she's the only candidate that's brave enough to unapologetically champion Medicare For All, a Green New Deal, and other bold progressive solutions.
Jessica takes zero corporate money, and that worries her corporate-backed opponents and the establishment because that means she can't be bought. Unlike the others, Jessica came into this race without any elitist advantages to help boost her. When she came to Barrier to Entry PAC, she was barely making ends meet and couldn't afford to put money into her campaign.
_**And that's where you came in, **__**Peter.**_ You believed in Jessica, you believed in our BTE mission, _**you**_ are on our team. (We see you, Michael who gives $1 on every email!)
With grateful hearts and much nervous excitement, we stand at these polls today proudly knowing we put everything we could into breaking barriers for Jessica and proving the power of a people-first grassroots movement.
**If you haven't had a chance to chip in, it's not too late.** Our ground team could really use your help staying fueled and energized today.[** Peter, if you're still with us in this fight, can you pitch in right away to strengthen our efforts to champion Jessica at the polls today? PITCH IN NOW >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42421625/332899932/214728439?refcode=220301_FR_bte-jessicamason3_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk2ZDAzYS05MTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7pLna8iy7yxH2AwPF_KQ2aJqNqBmS47comDyYY7qq4k=)
**Here's how your immediate gift can help us out if you donate right now:**
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

**[CHIP IN $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42421626/332899933/214728439?refcode=220301_FR_bte-jessicamason3_L1&expres_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTk2ZDAzYS05MTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7pLna8iy7yxH2AwPF_KQ2aJqNqBmS47comDyYY7qq4k=)** — buys coffee, water, and snacks for a volunteer or staffer

clean_body: Peter, we are HERE for Jessica Mason. = Hi Team BTE! After days of traveling from across the country to Dallas, knocking on doors across the district, and calling last minute undecided voters, the big day is finally here! When the polls opened at 7am, our team, along with other campaign staffers and volunteers, were there outside the doors ready to greet voters as they head inside to make their final decisions and cast their ballots. = We're all proud to support Jessica because we know that she's the only candidate in this race who will always put people first. And despite her opponents' claims, she's the only candidate that's brave enough to unapologetically champion Medicare For All, a Green New Deal, and other bold progressive solutions. Jessica takes zero corporate money, and that worries her corporate-backed opponents and the establishment because that means she can't be bought. Unlike the others, Jessica came into this race without any elitist advantages to help boost her. When she came to Barrier to Entry PAC, she was barely making ends meet and couldn't afford to put money into her campaign. And that's where you came in, Peter. You believed in Jessica, you believed in our BTE mission, you are on our team. (We see you, Michael who gives $1 on every email!) With grateful hearts and much nervous excitement, we stand at these polls today proudly knowing we put everything we could into breaking barriers for Jessica and proving the power of a people-first grassroots movement. If you haven't had a chance to chip in, it's not too late. Our ground team could really use your help staying fueled and energized today.= Here's how your immediate gift can help us out if you donate right now: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = — buys coffee, water, and snacks for a volunteer or staffer = — buys lunch for a volunteer or staffer = — helps cover transportation costs across the district = — buys pizza dinner for the entire team **__= Let's do this!!! name: Ben Samuels
subject: Honored
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dear Friend,
I know that the end-of-month emails campaigns send out can be overwhelming, but I also know that my supporters are why we will win this race. As we march toward the election, I feel more and more confident with the support you continue to show me.
I know that there is so much going on in the news. In the face of all of it, your grassroots action gives me more hope than anything else. Local electoral change is more critical than ever, and I am so grateful for your continued commitment to progress and change.
One of the most significant ways to build grassroots energy is word of mouth. Voters listen to their friends and family before anyone else. As the campaign heats up, the more supporters we have the better. Please share this post on social media and help us get the word out. [https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=www.facebook.com/SamuelsforCongress/videos/361362012657964]
I am focused on people-centered solutions, and when you show up and help the campaign reach its goals it allows me to remain committed to supporting you once I get to Washington.
Kind regards,
Ben Samuels
Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area.
Support Ben's campaign for Congress by making a donation today.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ur4qllfkrfkp6r9cu79mf31ur81fp5r7ql4spg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqecp1h6hor0tr0c6om9ctledqb8sdkemqbep3kcuqmct3gehi62cjnc6pb8dhnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lgbbc70e9omct72mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5hm8pr4s9j66oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze2bbsubhq1djfc58v95fml9d32misejmq1bmq9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm9oj6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za10l1niotgff23or0qf1rrmn105cjr317j0lit0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm9oj6cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu6memunlu7lf2dmnvst13lb2ffdferd40poekm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm9oj6cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zp1fkrge7iq7sip2qheockhhkof3rubbvoij9cv8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqo2b4k91sbaqv940u7vju0iate4cgp1h4fhq7a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3chjm9oj6cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Team LBR
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
We wanted to take a quick minute to thank you for all your support of LBR last month.

We exceeded our February goal. That means we're going to be able to ramp up our digital outreach even faster, and continue to lay the groundwork for Delaware Democrats to have a successful year.

The pace of the cycle is now picking up, and we'll soon be in our first public end-of-quarter fundraising period of 2022. But because of the work we've done so far (which wouldn't be possible without you), we're already in a strong position.

So thank you again! Your support has truly paid off.

Best,

Team LBR

P.S. All of us are looking forward to watching President Biden's State of the Union address tonight, and we'll follow up soon with our thoughts about it!

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

name: Andy Levin
subject: None of this is possible without you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress
body:
The uphill battle continues on the trail to November — but I know we can do it because you’re in this fight with me.
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42423151/332906913/-1948756003?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220301_t_a_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWNhZjkzNC05Njk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUt1s4yflapo0lgf2h9gSASAV4U0VCYYlxY0Cu2g1hQ=&emci=72a6e083-9199-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=c1caf934-9699-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=22034926)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42423152/332906914/-1948756003?ms=em-header&refcode=em_20220301_t_a_ty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWNhZjkzNC05Njk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUt1s4yflapo0lgf2h9gSASAV4U0VCYYlxY0Cu2g1hQ=&emci=72a6e083-9199-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=c1caf934-9699-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=22034926)
---
| | Peter, I can’t believe another month has passed, and we are already in March! Each month, we are closer to winning Michigan’s new Eleventh District — and every moment matters. Whether you’re able to pitch in and make a donation, or attend a virtual event to show your support, I couldn’t achieve anything without you. This grassroots movement is making a difference, Peter — in February alone, I introduced legislation to allow Congressional staffers to unionize, earned endorsements from labor unions and local community leaders, and traveled across the new Eleventh District to share our progressive message. Our momentum is only getting stronger, and that’s thanks to the generous support of people like you. February was a great month, but there’s still so much work we have left to do. I’m really proud that our most common contribution is $10 instead of well-funded special interests. The uphill battle to grow this movement and never lose sight of our values continues — but I know we can do it because you’re in this fight with me. Thanks again for your continued support, Peter. With your help, we will win. Let’s go!

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42442123/332967298/-608928999?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRhMTYxYS1jMjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4JhLcXMtd4AmuY_K5SwCqKQKPbB-7ehIuajl-HUmLbc=&emci=2970ed57-a799-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=e04a161a-c299-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=16675641)
---
_Content warning: graphic mention of war_ Friend, This weekend a 73-year old stood in line to enlist to defend his country. A group of women gathered in a park to make molotov cocktails. A young soldier blew up the bridge under his own feet to stop the oncoming forces. Ukrainians are fighting for their lives, their families, and their democracy. And they need our help. As a Navy doctor who served two tours in Iraq, I know that some of the most precious resources in a war are medical supplies. **If you are able, please join me in donating to Direct Relief** — an accredited California-based international charity that is working with the government of Ukraine to get emergency supplies to the frontlines and vulnerable communities. | [DONATE TO DIRECT RELIEF](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42442124/332967317/-1437452296?refcode=fl_email_na_20220303ukraine_dkj_active_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRhMTYxYS1jMjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4JhLcXMtd4AmuY_K5SwCqKQKPbB-7ehIuajl-HUmLbc=)
---
Ukraine has specified a need for tourniquets, antibiotics, and mobile medical outreach packs. Hospitals are also running dangerously low on oxygen.
Anything you can give helps.
In gratitude,
Dr. Kermit Jones

_P.S. If you are a veteran and this brings up difficult memories, know you are not alone. The free and confidential Veterans Crisis Line is available 24/7 to all service members, veterans, and their family and friends. Call 1-800-273-8255 (then press 1), text 838255, or [connect with them online.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42442125/332967325/-273040098?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRhMTYxYS1jMjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4JhLcXMtd4AmuY_K5SwCqKQKPbB-7ehIuajl-HUmLbc=&emci=2970ed57-a799-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=e04a161a-c299-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=16675641)_

| Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District.

name: Larry Elder
subject: Americans are waking up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA
body:
Our movement is growing, but we still have a long way to go. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=96ffe000a55148b899a3f6343087530d&_e=xAuh5ETbOpTis1rXOiek-dwalZIM4fnZEThRZL7JXwaJSlbzhFoQ6d24nQkOGDylGYyO7Io3ZPkAB3KFKjbgnS6jtsBAVOPv2Szp6GJlfOgTstl_A1cmex0rP_shr5OzEl-TvjXYf-FNITGitIJ6hjOEiwbIUKzI_4tpOAhQeBNilMhjE63ZSXUnHnLk7dJENn5URHRDC4EgjHLv-4hDLBI31b5swZn7m-Qs2cTDaTCP8bZyFv00CgA1CtnvuU75ici1INcWdnk_fqY3UWVrexJxo1hXa3efDszXjE6FoOHhZ8VAYH9gNtzc2Pt99i0NGb2V2EegOlikDE7cpfkf9Eao4loKveIN2WnsGws5jm68Xy8Mi46sxiQ4pzb6_V-XsbWOwmSvjCVFTUtlVedxiiBd6aXy2XR7PMVif7gUOeuafgfU4W4cZ4pSkkYkVJ6A)

Peter,

Americans all over the country are finally standing up to radical and abusive government, and it’s happening even in the most unlikely places.

* In **San Francisco** , school board members were recalled for failing to fully reopen schools and pushing a woke racially charged agenda.

* In **Los Angeles** , liberal District Attorney George Gascón is facing a very serious recall threat for his blatant soft-on-crime and anti-law enforcement policies.

* **All over the country** , governments, school boards and private companies are lifting mask and vaccine mandates due to pressure from the public.

I started **Elder for America PAC** to continue the fight we began last year to get radical leftist ideas out of our schools, enhance public safety, and restore personal & economic freedom.

**We’re continuing this fight because America needs saving.**

Our movement is growing, _but we still have a long way to go._ Victories against the radical Left on the local level are huge, but we also need to win back Republican majorities in this year’s midterms to end the failed and destructive policies that are coming out of Washington.

**I simply can’t do this without your personal support, Peter.** I know you to be a patriot, and if you don’t support our fight, _then who will?_

[**Will you let me know you’re with us in our fight to save America from the radical Left by chipping in $25 in the next 24 hours?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=96ffe000a55148b899a3f6343087530d&_e=xAuh5ETbOpTis1rXOiek-dwalZIM4fnZEThRZL7JXwaJSlbzhFoQ6d24nQkOGDylGYyO7Io3ZPkAB3KFKjbgnS6jtsBAVOPv2Szp6GJlfOgTstl_A1cmex0rP_shr5OzEl-TvjXYf-FNITGitIJ6hjOEiwbIUKzI_4tpOAhQeBNilMhjE63ZSXUnHnLk7dJENn5URHRDC4EgjHLv-4hDLBI31b5swZn7m-Qs2cTDaTAh8R3YjWQ2n3rgnmdC5MLmvhUKjSiZpnlmJhGg5hc3NM_x_tKP3hH-oj4Ual6iLVhjNZdRabXdJyLNH5BsWDzIDEOBgT4xcRXl5lpKofbXu5ut4j_E-PrnhQ2SFzK_gNcsafjtlh2clgXys198vyAPV9d48skNvlm8vqzgoLmJ9cYMB0dsp13I-iyttlGvDgN7CPS1bMM-ZFzVOuNUmx6X)

[**We need 80 supporters to chip in so we can hit our fundraising targets and ensure we have the resources we need to jump into critical battles this cycle, the first of which we’ll be announcing very soon.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=96ffe000a55148b899a3f6343087530d&_e=xAuh5ETbOpTis1rXOiek-dwalZIM4fnZEThRZL7JXwaJSlbzhFoQ6d24nQkOGDylGYyO7Io3ZPkAB3KFKjbgnS6jtsBAVOPv2Szp6GJlfOgTstl_A1cmex0rP_shr5OzEl-TvjXYf-FNITGitIJ6hjOEiwbIUKzI_4tpOAhQeBNilMhjE63ZSXUnHnLk7dJENn5URHRDC4EgjHLv-4hDLBI31b5swZn7m-Qs2cTDaTDyE6KpMK77jLblxKeDKYNryUXnM0_h_x1nX6q-INQaZb4fqvp1uMl9JGH1JPpFSubO9OPWN7JgtEkN8EMyQF_3x4lYbj4Mp-SzfM1Y0K4qAmCW3mpcw1yAhKmT_jyB70di9IUUDYWpaARWW8T3NtqmFG3h-cPQhX2Nq_0lah-etPsTp4MKiOIZsNjdEL4JPGCwAizwgfAl0VeOSgjiRoSc)

| [**CHIP IN $25 NOW FOR LARRY**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=96ffe000a55148b899a3f6343087530d&_e=xAuh5ETbOpTis1rXOiek-dwalZIM4fnZEThRZL7JXwaJSlbzhFoQ6d24nQkOGDylGYyO7Io3ZPkAB3KFKjbgnS6jtsBAVOPv2Szp6GJlfOgTstl_A1cmex0rP_shr5OzEl-TvjXYf-FNITGitIJ6hjOEiwbIUKzI_4tpOAhQeBNilMhjE63ZSXUnHnLk7dJENn5URHRDC4EgjHLv-4hDLBI31b5swZn7m-Qs2cTDaTC_aiepSF-B8_2aqyEJAsXE-hyi9gH8Zhddo_JPFkrRaOqNBk6C7GiHx4ORoEGVHX2gQj4VaLOp_Q1i7gEf5x3sUGdjifgNTZtjxIbFBv-fsN-LfSYQ15WCip1jh4weiQlBHcH4B47Wl0buB8dJiCROZpc8Je23a1GABp7xbYpdj0bvxV_fEl6LO78-BYGJZ3oUDRh4LWGIAw3LLK-ePw0_)

For America,

Larry Elder

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Energy Independence and Russian Oil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
My legislation solves both. | |
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b23cb5d5150e45f99931928de999cf19&_e=496j6ZubXCP32y05jaCcI74c5fSuKaeL-u9JDn5UB_YA6r4j6n1kmIU3nF39vCmwZVGQaV_btfDydNOv2unt6Wanq7qTxPiFx3OnKv-x-RUD9rlol-63pdXj_DPhF3FQ_EXn2e0A07WyVEUyrWxvCuoW6moEaEwvsV2PAOeTBMKy3KFLwFNW1pK6KtL0iMldKDfrWQpFtw8sPtqWITekNyCEEYw9K3P2sjVDLbhUw5MqpcGyQYxiEZAwqumFF-493xt1hmOhGDLHA3vg5JdLShJAT0JQUrV4rGlbz_DWSIZn_1aFExO_EMxYJbCfsyJJ_M3yp6AFU8HI8mlafZv5-R6e_FOwRLVlpe06bt-NlMmiSn4z6_456wniSi3P-7Zc_oiNYsQZTaxW9kxnyBs_Vg%3D%3D)
Peter,
Joe Biden has severely weakened America, no more so than in our energy sector. _**Joe Biden killed American energy independence**_, making us rely on foreign oil, while our bountiful surplus sits in the ground.

You've certainly felt Biden's energy policy in action, each and every time you fill up at the gas pump. _**Biden has allowed Russia to get rich off of their own natural resources but forces Americans to pay more at the pump**_.

_**I'm introducing legislation to solve both problems**_ , and I talked to Tucker Carlson about it. Here is a short transcript:
_[My legislation] would reverse the Biden Administration policies that have throttled down our energy independence and __green-lighted_ _ the Russians. My bill would open up new oil and gas leases. It would say that the pipelines that Joe Biden shut down will be reopened and it would make it the policy of the United States Government to make this country energy independent and to get our energy sector producing full throttle._

_**WATCH THE WHOLE INTERVIEW BELOW**_
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=b23cb5d5150e45f99931928de999cf19&_e=496j6ZubXCP32y05jaCcI74c5fSuKaeL-u9JDn5UB_YA6r4j6n1kmIU3nF39vCmwZVGQaV_btfDydNOv2unt6Wanq7qTxPiFx3OnKv-x-RUD9rlol-63pdXj_DPhF3FQ_EXn2e0A07WyVEUyrWxvCuoW6moEaEwvsV2PAOeTBMKy3KFLwFNW1pK6KtL0iMldYUIYa6kk2QD9Igoa5_VCaITWHakFhCoSrQKBH_GuLp2Llsg_MlsPIE3z-Q1fwRjedokpBU3AtCOr1c_H_gxzA_9Bj_5u_uATGo1I_JUqLvw5pvDO-nJ9O3XTMnddB9JKaULKGqZU31HSXY4c0cuF_IwUO9D5oIfsAcw2DYh-upkzpskFqLtklmhxI6UTcGm5cSn_hbjuopUuUNm0XHKdOA%3D%3D)

clean_body: My legislation solves both. | | Peter, Joe Biden has severely weakened America, no more so than in our energy sector. Joe Biden killed American energy independence, making us rely on foreign oil, while our bountiful surplus sits in the ground. You've certainly felt Biden's energy policy in action, each and every time you fill up at the gas pump. Biden has allowed Russia to get rich off of their own natural resources but forces Americans to pay more at the pump. I'm introducing legislation to solve both problems , and I talked to Tucker Carlson about it. Here is a short transcript: [My legislation] would reverse the Biden Administration policies that have throttled down our energy independence and green-lighted the Russians. My bill would open up new oil and gas leases. It would say that the pipelines that Joe Biden shut down will be reopened and it would make it the policy of the United States Government to make this country energy independent and to get our energy sector producing full throttle. WATCH THE WHOLE INTERVIEW BELOW In Liberty Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

Hello,
I am old enough to recall when Donald Trump was first impeached for holding military aid to Ukrainian President Zelensky hostage: ‘You either begin an investigation into Joe Biden or you won’t get the Javelin missiles Congress authorized.’
I’m also old enough to remember when my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, said that Trump’s behavior was perfectly fine – and voted against his removal from office.
Thankfully, we now have a President who understands the real threat Russia poses, and American Javelin missiles are currently helping Ukrainians defend themselves against the Russian tanks pouring across their border.
**We need more leaders in the Senate who will defend democracy and put the interests of America and our allies first – not partisan political gain and the whims of a deranged demagogue. Chuck Grassley has proven that’s not him.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. But grassroots contributions keep campaigns going, and I need your help today if we’re going to win.
**We’ve set a goal of raising another $25,000 before our midnight tonight so that we can fight back against all of McConnell’s Super PAC attacks. Right now, we’re still falling short, but there’s still time to make up the gap if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**

name: Team Gallagher
subject: The state of our union is anything but strong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
But our problems can be fixed with three simple steps. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=c6d99ad883144cb0b2599a90c6b70136&_e=RCfWL304WDipgKiRDmXgDUYziRqFt1vVIGkH8GXh3eoHjsGPp3HQ1OtggHEVBo589pvAA-hDi4EZT_efaWUA2vC1m27v5R1gSRVthiT8tXnRBdA5Pp_phNUHX3BS5eU6bsKcyK8KNlt7SD057hIaeHOEKN1r_3eTS7fwkEmxuxGPJy5YybZqczLTrQ70k2RWuYhl5QPE_KzHhq34Cywaj6b3Q1DdFA_EyzmueTKLSG2b8GIzmNbjR302fKg2YJ__u-3aO1ow-lI4pxGTKu9yCd1srf2G1RZXhxkVlknnebxEzdvjDswyXPhZ0y4mUDCwZS4TyXQg-p8yDtDnIG8dENvtqhpK5vrLUquwyIxyJcgaAc9CP0qt6ub4k01DyWRocG6jy6PYJRoL-YrdqHjyCuseOi80n1_tw_8Eok87UOw%3D) Peter, President Biden will deliver his first State of the Union address tonight –– but don’t count on him to answer honestly for the failures of his administration. **The state of our union is anything**** _but_****strong right now.** After ignoring the Southern border, contributing to record inflation, and projecting weakness across the globe, Democrats have left America –– and now the world –– vulnerable, fractured, and unsafe. _But there is time to correct course. _ It requires three simple steps:
1. Restoring American leadership abroad by demonstrating strength – not weakness.
2. Securing our crime-ridden neighborhoods by enforcing laws and defending the men and women who wear the badge.
3. Ending Washington’s spending spree and allowing Americans to keep more of their hard-earned paycheck.

These steps are common sense. But we have yet to see them in Speaker Pelosi's agenda, and it's doubtful we will hear them uttered in President Biden's remarks. But we have a chance to change that this November – **and Mike is counting on your support to get the job done.** Every dollar we raise now brings our team one step closer to permanently retiring Nancy Pelosi and restoring America’s strength. clean_body: But our problems can be fixed with three simple steps. Peter, President Biden will deliver his first State of the Union address tonight –– but don’t count on him to answer honestly for the failures of his administration. The state of our union is anything butstrong right now. After ignoring the Southern border, contributing to record inflation, and projecting weakness across the globe, Democrats have left America –– and now the world –– vulnerable, fractured, and unsafe. But there is time to correct course. It requires three simple steps: 1. Restoring American leadership abroad by demonstrating strength – not weakness. 2. Securing our crime-ridden neighborhoods by enforcing laws and defending the men and women who wear the badge. 3. Ending Washington’s spending spree and allowing Americans to keep more of their hard-earned paycheck. These steps are common sense. But we have yet to see them in Speaker Pelosi's agenda, and it's doubtful we will hear them uttered in President Biden's remarks. But we have a chance to change that this November – and Mike is counting on your support to get the job done. Every dollar we raise now brings our team one step closer to permanently retiring Nancy Pelosi and restoring America’s strength. Thank you for your support, Team Gallagher | | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin. | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Did you see the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
A quick update on yesterday’s TV ad fundraising push.
#
Derek — it turns out we’re not the only ones excited about John’s first-ever campaign TV ad! (See his announcement email below.)
Yesterday, we got *so* close to our $100,000 goal to get it on the air — all thanks to folks who watched our ad + donated to make sure PA voters get to see it, too.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44993?refcode=em20220301-4797&t=1&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)
But we still need to raise **$22,779** if we’re going to afford the PA media markets in an election year.
**[If you can, will you donate your very first $5 or more to help us finish what we started + air John’s TV ad?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44993?refcode=em20220301-4797&t=2&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)**
Thanks for stepping up!
—Team Fetterman
_\--------Forwarded message--------
__Sender: John Fetterman
_ _Date: Monday, February 28, 2022
_ _Subject: Omg._
Omg, Derek.
I’m ridiculously excited about this. 🤩
**Today, our campaign is *officially* releasing our very first television ad of the 2022 election cycle.**
There are a lot of places in Pennsylvania that feel like their community’s best days were a generation ago or more. **But we can’t take any person, place, or vote for granted.**
That’s what our first TV ad is all about. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate.
**And so, I wanted you to be among the very first to view our new TV ad for yourself. Will you watch**** _No Place for Granted_****now? 👇**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44993?refcode=em20220301-4797&t=3&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)
**[Watch Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44993?amount=5&refcode=em20220301-4797&t=4&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)**
I’m proud to have filmed with *actual* Pennsylvanians from townships + boroughs + cities all across the state. **A little over a year after we first launched our campaign, it’s incredible that we *finally* reached this milestone.**
Look, producing ads like ours is no easy feat for any campaign — let alone one like ours that isn’t funded by billionaires and super PACs. From using the right cameras, to placing ads + buying inventory in the PA media markets, it’s a costly and labor-intensive component of our campaign.
All that said, well, I think it was worth it. Not to get too emotional, but the first time I watched it was an unreal experience for me. The movement we have built together is truly inspiring, and I am beyond honored to have your support.
Okay, back to the ad: **[We want as many Pennsylvanians as possible to see our first ad, and we need your help to do that. Can you please make a $5 donation right now to help us raise $100,000 to get this ad on the air?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44993?refcode=em20220301-4797&t=5&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)**
Since this is our first TV ad, it’s going to be our first impression for a lot of folks, especially the unlikely voters that our campaign is trying to reach and mobilize. But we also know our GOP opponents are pouring millions into the TV markets in PA — so it’s not going to be cheap to get our ad up. That’s why every single dollar we raise is going to be crucial to helping our campaign and its message reach every single community in PA.
**[What do you say, Derek? Can you chip in to help us hit that $100,000 goal and get this ad on the air? Getting our campaign’s message on the air could be exactly what we need to jump even further ahead of our opponents ahead of the May primary.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44993?refcode=em20220301-4797&t=6&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44993?amount=5&refcode=em20220301-4797&t=25&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)**
__
Whether you can chip in today or not, I hope you felt at least a little inspired by this ad. If you can help us spread it far and wide, it would mean so much to me and our whole Fetterman HQ team. 🙏
More soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220301-4797-footer&t=26&refcode2=4797_434096_JDUbxM&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=27&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=4797%2E434096%2EJDUbxM)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: It’s time to take foreign policy seriously again
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/joekentforcongress/its-time-to-take-foreign-policy-seriously-again?e=00856e661d)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,

# It’s time to take foreign policy seriously again
The situation in Ukraine has thrown us into a complicated predicament because we are weak—and not just because of Joe Biden’s image. **Our leverage in dealing with foreign powers has been completely dismantled by this administration.**

Biden and his cronies in Congress destroyed our energy advantage and decimated our economy with COVID policies. Now, all we have left is the threat of force.

It wasn’t like this under President Trump. He [recognized](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=1546635d3c&e=00856e661d) that NATO’s reliance on Russian oil and gas was a national security threat, and he fought for the strategic advantage of American energy independence. Under President Trump, America had leverage behind our diplomacy with Putin.

Now, under Biden and our weak Congress, the only tools we have are sanctions and military force. Sanctions can be a useful and painful tool to keep Putin at the negotiation table—but unless we have leverage, that’s about all we can do before resorting to force. When it comes down to it, we aren’t serious or going to be taken seriously unless we **stop buying Russian oil.**

I have fought as a soldier for over two decades. I have had to negotiate ceasefires during my time. **And I know the cost of war and the tolls it’s had on my family.** We can't afford to be weak on the world stage. We need **pragmatic leaders** who are looking out for the US national interest, and can think independently—unlike my opponents. **Neither Jaime Herrera Beutler nor Heidi St. John have any experience in foreign policy—despite it being one of the constitutionally appointed duties of Congress. **

It’s time to bring leadership back to Washington and make our country serious again.
---
| [ ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4823b40dae&e=00856e661d)
---
|
---
|
## Why is the establishment scared of me?

Fellow Conservative,

I’m so grateful to every one of our supporters for making February a great month for our campaign. We’re entering March with strong momentum behind us. **But we can’t let up – not even for one moment.**** ****On March 31st, we’re facing a big test for our campaign: The FEC End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline.** You can bet that the Democrats are eagerly awaiting any sign of weakness in our FEC fundraising report. That’s why we must DOUBLE DOWN on our momentum and put up the strongest number possible.
[**Today, I’m asking you to be one of the first to contribute to this critical effort with a donation of $10, $25, $50, $100, or more. >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/a49c5234925e90b2/37b1bfb7128e9e78c3d6b838967d376c/37373)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Hoping for a lot of responses here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Team –

I wanted to take a moment to thank you. As you know, we asked a lot of you ahead of our end-of-month deadline — and I'm excited to share that we reached our fundraising goal! I’m so grateful to everyone who helped make it happen.

This week, I’ll be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the next couple of months. Before we meet, it's important to me that I get your feedback.

A lot of politicians will pretend to listen, but everything goes in one ear and out the other. That’s not how I was raised. Growing up, my mom always told me, “God gave you two ears and one mouth for a reason — to do more listening and less talking.”

My top priority in this campaign is to make sure I'm fighting for you and your interests, which is why I send these brief surveys around. Look, I wish we could sit down and grab a coffee (or tea!) so I could hear about your concerns. But the next-best way for me to know what's on your mind is by asking you directly over email.

[**Will you take a minute (two, tops!) to let me know what issues matter most to you right now? Your input will help shape our campaign agenda moving forward. I hope you'll take the time to fill out this quick survey.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42442715/332979052/37006170?ms=em22_220301_eomty_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220301_eomty_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220301_eomty_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220301_eomty_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=rRHlsJGDjTSGMkMvhf3q04gNvu1lly893oeIjOed%2BUmRLwTw7OKhVnBthpXO81T6DUKEUKOdNohG%2BaIS3HfN7CdwSUdBy0HMZfvukiG7zz5xamsvyUHlEl1rEBWN04ONsMaQoMDkuEpals3KtDC4eVfODgx%2FKFqq2SMOV38dKAA%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWRjODA5Ni1jNzk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-TToVQtsgc8cm0ZD2d125fvhBx2WeYDgW9fvz-m5WY=&emci=5fdc8096-c799-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=61dc8096-c799-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=18659593)

---

Wisconsinites deserve a U.S. Senator who will put their interests first by fighting for lower prescription drug costs, affordable child care, guaranteed paid leave, a real strategy to take on the climate crisis, and more. Someone who’s willing to be scrappy when they need to be and put in a little elbow grease to get the job done for working families.

I’m running to be that Senator, especially during challenging times like this — and you deserve nothing less than someone who will show up, listen to what you have to say, be your voice at the decision-making table, and deliver real results. That’s what I have done as Wisconsin’s State Treasurer, and it’s what I intend to do as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator.

Now more than ever, we need to build a winning campaign to replace Ron Johnson and give Wisconsinites a leader they can trust to do what's right. There is an incredible amount of work ahead of us, and the path forward will not be easy. But the only way we'll win is if we set our priorities and follow through on them together, which is why your feedback is so important.

[**Can you take my brief survey? It's important to me that I get your feedback to help guide our campaign priorities. We’ll be tracking responses at this link.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42442717/332979054/37006170?ms=em22_220301_eomty_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220301_eomty_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220301_eomty_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220301_eomty_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=rRHlsJGDjTSGMkMvhf3q04gNvu1lly893oeIjOed%2BUmRLwTw7OKhVnBthpXO81T6DUKEUKOdNohG%2BaIS3HfN7CdwSUdBy0HMZfvukiG7zz5xamsvyUHlEl1rEBWN04ONsMaQoMDkuEpals3KtDC4eVfODgx%2FKFqq2SMOV38dKAA%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWRjODA5Ni1jNzk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-TToVQtsgc8cm0ZD2d125fvhBx2WeYDgW9fvz-m5WY=&emci=5fdc8096-c799-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&emdi=61dc8096-c799-ec11-a507-281878b80eda&ceid=18659593)

I can't wait to hear from you.

— Sarah Godlewski

P.S. Feel free to forward this email to your friends or family members and let’s see if we can reach a few more people!

clean_body: Team – I wanted to take a moment to thank you. As you know, we asked a lot of you ahead of our end-of-month deadline — and I'm excited to share that we reached our fundraising goal! I’m so grateful to everyone who helped make it happen. This week, I’ll be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the next couple of months. Before we meet, it's important to me that I get your feedback. A lot of politicians will pretend to listen, but everything goes in one ear and out the other. That’s not how I was raised. Growing up, my mom always told me, “God gave you two ears and one mouth for a reason — to do more listening and less talking.” My top priority in this campaign is to make sure I'm fighting for you and your interests, which is why I send these brief surveys around. Look, I wish we could sit down and grab a coffee (or tea!) so I could hear about your concerns. But the next-best way for me to know what's on your mind is by asking you directly over email. | Wisconsinites deserve a U.S. Senator who will put their interests first by fighting for lower prescription drug costs, affordable child care, guaranteed paid leave, a real strategy to take on the climate crisis, and more. Someone who’s willing to be scrappy when they need to be and put in a little elbow grease to get the job done for working families. I’m running to be that Senator, especially during challenging times like this — and you deserve nothing less than someone who will show up, listen to what you have to say, be your voice at the decision-making table, and deliver real results. That’s what I have done as Wisconsin’s State Treasurer, and it’s what I intend to do as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator. Now more than ever, we need to build a winning campaign to replace Ron Johnson and give Wisconsinites a leader they can trust to do what's right. There is an incredible amount of work ahead of us, and the path forward will not be easy. But the only way we'll win is if we set our priorities and follow through on them together, which is why your feedback is so important. I can't wait to hear from you. — Sarah Godlewski P.S. name: Bill Posey Campaign
subject: Watching Biden’s state of disunion tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
body:
( https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-26-48-69-107830fade-ia8db170d2 )

Dear friend,

As Biden campaigned from his basement, he promised
to unify the country...instead, he’s made things far worse. With a
nation now more divided than ever, tonight’s State of the Union
address will downplay several crises – of Biden’s own making –
that threaten our nation.

* Less Stable World: A year ago Biden reversed
Trump’s policy and gave Putin the green light to build the Nord
Stream II pipeline and make Europe more dependent on Russian
energy. Biden actively worked to defeat tougher Russian sanctions
pushed by the GOP in Congress. That signaled weakness and Putin
took advantage of this by attacking Ukraine in an unjust war of
aggression.

* Energy Crisis: HE shut down our country’s domestic energy
production, reversing our energy independence and setting us up
to import record amounts of Russian oil this year. Biden’s
misguided policies undermined US energy independence and drove
the price of gas from under $2 a gallon under Trump to over $3.50
a gallon.

* Border Crisis: More than 2 million illegal border crossings
took place last year, with no signs of relenting. Open borders
and secret flights relocating illegal immigrants — it’s time the
Biden administration gets out of the way and lets Republicans
address the crisis at our Southern border!

* Economic Crisis: With the highest inflation in decades, empty
store shelves, and wages that fail to keep up with rising prices,
Biden and Pelosi’s reckless spending, COVID mandates, and
misplaced priorities have only made our economic crisis worse.

A few crafted sentences can’t hide how Biden’s
leadership – and his policies designed to restructure America
from the inside out – has created chaos. We only need a handful
of seats to retake the majority in Congress. Together, we can
take the gavel away from Pelosi and put an end to the destructive
policies of Biden and Harris.

I hope you will join me as I fight to PUT AMERICA
FIRST ( https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-26-48-70-b8e2b204ba-ia8db170d2 )!

Sincerely,

Bill Posey

P.S. If you are able to contribute a small donation
of $10, $25 or $30 ( https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-26-48-71-fdd09faa8d-ia8db170d2 )
to our campaign, you can help us get the word out and win back
the Congressional majority to put America first and stop
destructive Biden-Harris policies.

Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey

P.O. Box 411486, Melbourne, FL 32941-1486

Don't like these emails? Unsubscribe (
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-163077-5-26-48-b6bb9428e2e6387-ia8db170d2 )

subject: Report - Arizona's Signature Audit
