During her tenure in the state legislature, Ward established a proven track record of working hand in hand with all Republicans to pass legislation that increased freedom, opportunity and prosperity for all Arizonans. Kelli Ward cares deeply about the people of the great state of Arizona and demonstrates this everyday as the Chairman of the Republican Party of Arizona.

It's unthinkable that a sitting member of the United States Congress would attend an event like this. But when you factor in that her boss is Kevin McCarthy, it starts to make sense. As GOP Leader, he’s done _nothing_ but give the far-right a free pass. We don't expect any formal sanction from the GOP.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42442795/332980363/-217444029?refcode=em-3.1.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjMzYjVmNS1jODk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rEzBL1B4KtnmdlE4ULxN1TlSglCgneeTcGzX4_4ZIpM=)

**McCarthy is actively backing the primary opponent of Rep. Liz Cheney because she supported the January 6th investigation. Apparently being a white supremacists isn't as bad as challenging his authority.**

name: Josh Harder
subject: thoughts on the State of The Union?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Nf1JVSTvZAyHe-E5qdoPzV2B9-8z19eJMPCPtctFVc=/Dk6GFDgH8feelW47SXXCpDuYLJ0AHgh4OoRqmjeT7So=) | Hi Peter, Are you planning on watching President Biden's State of the Union address tonight? I've been fortunate enough to attend two State of the Union addresses so far and both times I've left incredibly humbled to hold this job. This year's speech comes at a very difficult time for our country. First off, the Capitol is back to being encircled by a massive fence, a reminder that January 6th wasn't too long ago. And secondly, President Biden will address the country as we watch the terrifying images in Ukraine. I'm hopeful President Biden will give a clear vision for our country's role in combating Russian aggression and that he'll also spend some time laying out a plan for our economy and getting prices down. [**I 'm interested in hearing from you: What do you want to hear from President Biden tonight in his State of the Union address?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Nf1JVSTvZAyHe-E5qdoPzV2B9-8z19eJMPCPtctFVc=/Dk6GFDgH8feelW47SXXCpDuYLJ0AHgh4OoRqmjeT7So=) [SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Nf1JVSTvZAyHe-E5qdoPzV2B9-8z19eJMPCPtctFVc=/Dk6GFDgH8feelW47SXXCpDuYLJ0AHgh4OoRqmjeT7So=) Thanks for sharing - looking forward to watching tonight. \- Josh
---

name: Charles Booker
subject: Tonight’s address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

President Biden is scheduled to give his first State of the Union address
tonight.

Now, I don’t know what he’s about to say, and I look forward to listening.
But going into tonight, I do know one thing: the State of our current
Union isn’t working for everyone. It’s not working for most, in fact.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220301?refcode=em20220301-1616&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1616_346206_fCZXmY&akid=1616%2E346206%2EfCZXmY ]That’s the main reason I’m running to represent my Commonwealth in the
U.S. Senate. Will you please chip in $5 to our movement and
help us replace Rand Paul with a working-class champion in the Senate?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220301?refcode=em20220301-1616&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1616_346206_fCZXmY&akid=1616%2E346206%2EfCZXmY ]Contribute $5

Just imagine what President Biden could be saying if we didn’t have
politicians like Rand Paul representing us.

We could be talking about how we passed the Emmett Till Anti-Lynching Act
and finally made lynching a federal hate crime — legislation that Rand
Paul previously singlehandedly voted down.

We could be talking about how we were able to pass the John Lewis Voting
Rights bill in the Senate, which would have protected voting rights and
access, particularly in marginalized, gerrymandered communities.

We could be talking about how we passed Build Back Better, the Women’s
Health Protection Act, climate action, and so much more.

But politicians like Rand Paul have made it clear that they’ll use the Jim
Crow filibuster to block everything, and that they couldn't care less
about our needs.

Peter,
tonight’s State of the Union address
isn’t going to talk about how we’ve done all these things, because we
haven’t — yet.

But you better believe there is momentum on the ground for our movement.
And when I say we are building a movement from the hood to the holler, I
absolutely mean it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220301?refcode=em20220301-1616&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1616_346206_fCZXmY&akid=1616%2E346206%2EfCZXmY ]Join our movement today,
Peter. Can I count on you to
chip in $5 or whatever you can to our grassroots powered
campaign? It’s going to take a huge surge of people power for us to
replace Rand Paul and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220301?refcode=em20220301-1616&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1616_346206_fCZXmY&akid=1616%2E346206%2EfCZXmY ]Contribute $5

Thank you,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220301-1616-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1616_346206_fCZXmY&akid=1616%2E346206%2EfCZXmY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1616%2E346206%2EfCZXmY

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: Kevin Dellicker's Congressional Campaign Is in Full Swing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
But Lisa Scheller Still Is in Denial | | | |
---
| | |
# **Why is Lisa Scheller _Still_ Dodging Debates?**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Last Saturday at the annual Lincoln Day Breakfast, the Lehigh County Republican Committee recognized the two declared Republican candidates for PA-07: Lisa Scheller and Kevin Dellicker. On stage, the host asked each of us to explain what differentiates us from the other. My answer: **authenticity**.

I write my own material. I don't avoid public forums. And I don't waste time courting establishment politicians from outside the district for their endorsements. These aren't the things Lehigh Valley voters care about anyway. I'm focusing on the voters of Carbon, Lehigh, Monroe, and Northampton counties, which is exactly what a congressional candidate should be doing."

We are less than three months from the primary election and Lisa Scheller still pretends that she's the only candidate. It's becoming a farce.

Europe is at war, inflation is out of control, the borders are wide open, crime is rampant, and our freedoms are under assault. Lisa Scheller and I have real differences in our national security policies, promoting domestic manufacturing, and protecting unborn children, among other things. Yet, Lisa Scheller refuses to discuss the issues with me in a public forum.

What is she hiding from?

We shall soon find out. She cannot hide forever.

In the meantime, please join me for a Town Hall where I will take questions from the voters, with or without Lisa Scheller.

**Where: Villa Lentini Ristorante (2700 Balliet Street, Coplay PA 18037)
When: Wednesday, March 2nd. Doors open at 6:00 p.m. Program begins at 7:00 p.m. **

Please RSVP to [kevin@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com?subject=Town%20Hall%20RSVP&body=I%20will%20attend%20the%20town%20hall%20on%20March%202%20at%206%20p.m.%20at%20Villa%20Lentini%20in%20Coplay.%20%0A%0ANumber%20of%20people%3A%20%0ANames%3A). The forum is free and open to the public. The restaurant will be open if you'd like to buy dinner.

KEEP AMERICA FREE!

Sincerely,

| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
| My youngest son Eli finished his wrestling career at Northwestern Lehigh last weekend. He's been wrestling since he was in kindergarten.

I wrestled in high school, coached the youth program at Northwestern Lehigh for many years, and watched all three of my sons wrestle for the Tigers. I figure that I've spent about 280 days of my life on the mat or in a gym. I love it.

Wrestling is one of the three sports mentioned in the Bible. Jacob wrestled with God and earned His blessing ([Genesis 32:22-32](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=672df91b7f&e=1090c5c412)). Its a wonderful sport that helps build wonderful men. It's been a blessing experiencing this with you Eli. I'm really going to miss watching you compete. Love you Eli.- Dad.
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
|
---
| Last Friday, yet another indicator of inflation climbed to the highest level in 50 years ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c8dc3d409e&e=1090c5c412)). Things already were bad before Russia invaded Ukraine. Now the war is driving up energy costs worldwide as families struggle to pay for gas, groceries and other necessities. People have lost confidence in the Democrats ability to manage the economy. It's imperative that we send a commonsense conservative to Washington to get federal spending and inflation under control.
---
|
---
| **Safe Communities**
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=13ce16b32f&e=1090c5c412)
---
| **Update on Ukraine**

Vladimir Putin has been telling us for years that he wanted to restore the glory of the old Soviet Empire. When autocrats tell us their plans, it is wise to listen.

Putin's hold on power may be more tenuous than most people think. The oligarchs who enable his autocratic rule like their fancy homes and luxury yachts, so sanctions will have a real effect. Meanwhile, the slow progress of his military advance combined with serious protests in Russia undermine Putin's authority. He has overplayed his hand. The US and its allies must be prepared to ratchet up sanctions to include more banks and the energy industry, which would cripple Russia's economy. We must degrade Putin's ongoing ability to fight and punish him for this abhorrent attack on a sovereign nation.
---

|

clean_body: But Lisa Scheller Still Is in Denial | | | | | | | Why is Lisa Scheller Still Dodging Debates? Dear Friends and Neighbors, Last Saturday at the annual Lincoln Day Breakfast, the Lehigh County Republican Committee recognized the two declared Republican candidates for PA-07: Lisa Scheller and Kevin Dellicker. On stage, the host asked each of us to explain what differentiates us from the other. My answer: authenticity. I write my own material. I don't avoid public forums. And I don't waste time courting establishment politicians from outside the district for their endorsements. These aren't the things Lehigh Valley voters care about anyway. I'm focusing on the voters of Carbon, Lehigh, Monroe, and Northampton counties, which is exactly what a congressional candidate should be doing." We are less than three months from the primary election and Lisa Scheller still pretends that she's the only candidate. It's becoming a farce. Europe is at war, inflation is out of control, the borders are wide open, crime is rampant, and our freedoms are under assault. Lisa Scheller and I have real differences in our national security policies, promoting domestic manufacturing, and protecting unborn children, among other things. Yet, Lisa Scheller refuses to discuss the issues with me in a public forum. What is she hiding from? We shall soon find out. She cannot hide forever. In the meantime, please join me for a Town Hall where I will take questions from the voters, with or without Lisa Scheller. Where: Villa Lentini Ristorante (2700 Balliet Street, Coplay PA 18037) When: Wednesday, March 2nd. Doors open at 6:00 p.m. Program begins at 7:00 p.m. Please RSVP to mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com?subject=Town%20Hall%20RSVP&body=I%20will%20attend%20the%20town%20hall%20on%20March%202%20at%206%20p.m.%20at%20Villa%20Lentini%20in%20Coplay.%20%0A%0ANumber%20of%20people%3A%20%0ANames%3A. The forum is free and open to the public. The restaurant will be open if you'd like to buy dinner. KEEP AMERICA FREE! | Team, it’s unbelievable to us that it’s 2022 and _we still don’t have equal pay for equal work!_

**Our AZ Dems in Congress have been championing this issue for years,** but continue to be blocked by Republicans. As we kick off Women’s History Month, we wanted to put this important issue back to the forefront and push back against the GOP’s efforts to block the bill.

This shouldn’t be a controversial issue. Help us send a message to the AZ GOP members – and other Republicans in Congress – **that it's time to pass Paycheck Fairness and give women equal pay for equal work!******

**[Team, we’re looking for 300 people to sign our petition TODAY telling the GOP to stop blocking equal pay for equal work! Add your name to our petition now >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDunHUnFfCqyE3Cy33zJiQOhCaTYGJVrx87_6TNpxSCaiPo1YHRoGPNaj8FT5YwjYmHakfGNhdGtL48_PlqZHXFKo_GH0yuHp4GqH_fLLRZTFnbY5mTXtEy8Nfca31mLvmagQD930VBbH-mmbnuVTR37-6OgSMijeUVo3XanS42WHDnuWpGLIcVbQoOBmGg6Cy_QvjLGsLiTpLN_FRsggDmzbciOuzcg_WvBP7t4lpKSdIyQLpRBunTc-EJ4kDSfz7fRGRZADZeDFRfU_5tZMjgxIE7PnaV1t38BrwAm20PwWaRlEvgdic1Z4_F5VcHxcn5DB_5XvINB3iK458SscyAbTofUBHqVhNcahXI-pyu08xVuNhF67I0RqJlWVJvwOy6PS-p8ljoAHWZjOGhpAzi-n1V-dhp9NaJqGy61q5zl2zNwAuaXBPmZeFoGsr_iV7g/3jz/A70_gY_4RrGu4HJeYr2I7Q/h1/6bwbvtwyh6Ws4B740tDnEDSXfxHFQIUFMCeOjI67hXY)** [

| | | Fellow Conservative,

This is Governor Kim Reynolds.

I’m giving the Republican Rebuttal to Biden’s State of the Union speech TONIGHT.

If you are TIRED of the direction our country is headed. If you are EXHAUSTED from the unending inflation, the rampant crime, and unsecure borders, then I need your help.

I need the support of EVERY Republican Patriot reading this.

Can you give $5 before I speak? $5 makes ALL the difference.

---
| | [GIVE $5](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3lp80-20unz-4qqlpo7/)
---
| | [STAND WITH KIM REYNOLDS](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3lp80-20uo0-4qqlpo4/)
---
Don’t think your support doesn’t matter, because it does. It means EVERYTHING.

Can I count on you to stand with me before I give my speech?

Thank you,
Kim Reynolds

_Want to FIRE Pelosi? Text McCarthy to 64080 to help House Republicans take back Congress._

**A note from Kevin:**

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- **[ EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3lp80-20uo2-4qqlpo6/ "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>")**

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy

name: Team Kaptur
subject: SOTU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Tonight, President Biden will lay out the progress we’ve achieved together. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBsKMbA8V6vaIRWuzxkgP9aWSOIW7oQfAhpQ4veudg5MTcyTE0mzVHMZyo4TQ1g_q5em-dsVSGUtgfZnFzLGMSOScCMCLZsjY2FayfmIyOO6hiPZuT-UQ_D-WCCysQdXLcRSYXWP4IO1SVIvXClkAXAdf1nMC5p7n4r22hrSZ0j3SJAp8JRwItwuzyY8Hv8gaXSJo7hslh39Qm8p707vjJgSZnrp-kP7l_B7yLrqMHyxzIbAuOXH-O7m_VvsibSy0uYUjWXfBoHyInUboRQjqT1VVb64RrEZqxrsjptYFCzmx/3jz/yedaRN5cQZaJcSlF-A17xA/h0/utqiFLXo4482PoJKTNck52u0tvU2smCl6Hj4_va_aKU)
| | Team,

While Marcy gets ready to attend tonight’s **State of the Union address,** we wanted to drop you a line about what to expect.

President Biden will address the nation about **all the progress we have made _together._**

So far, Democrats have achieved:
* **COVID-19** relief delivered
* **6.6 million** jobs created
* **Bipartisan** infrastructure package that brings billions of dollars to Ohio

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: re: tonight's address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Until we expand our 50-50 majority, Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell will still have a stranglehold on our democracy.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42444590/332987307/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk728-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDk0NTNlZS1kNzk5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PZ5egTcTrV_g8uePo3HhGCvrW-D28UnihDH5t_UeT_w=)
Peter, I just finished watching President Biden's State of the Union address. There is SO much that we must accomplish for American families, but as I think about the makeup of the Senate – 50 Democrats and 50 Republicans – I'm reminded of just how critical it is that we defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) this November. **[If you're with me to expand Senate control and deliver on progress for the American people, will you make a donation of $5 now to flip Iowa's Senate seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42444591/332987308/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk728-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDk0NTNlZS1kNzk5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PZ5egTcTrV_g8uePo3HhGCvrW-D28UnihDH5t_UeT_w=)**
You see, during my time in Congress, I fought for many of the issues that President Biden talked about tonight – affordable health care, lower prescription drug prices, accessible child care and so much more. With some hard work and tough conversations, I'm proud to say that I helped pass legislation through the House in the middle of a _government shutdown._ I'm still the youngest woman to have done so.
But with the likes of Sens. Grassley and Mitch McConnell wielding the filibuster, we kept on hitting brick walls. Critical legislation that would make life better for Americans – like a bill that would lower prescription drug costs – would be dead on arrival. **The truth is, our Senate is _still_ broken. Until we expand our 50-50 majority, Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell will still have a stranglehold on our democracy.**
That's where Iowa comes in: Voters here know that Sen. Grassley has changed during his 47 years in Washington and they're ready to show him the door. He's facing record-low approval ratings, and nearly two-thirds of likely voters don't want to send him back to Washington for an _eighth term_.
**Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable, and if we defeat him, Democrats will be _virtually guaranteed_ to expand our majority. **This is the only way that we'll be able to fix our Senate and truly deliver for the American people.
But the GOP is already mobilizing to defeat me and defend Sen. Grassley. To compete with the full force of the Republican establishment, I need you with me. **[So please, can you rush a donation of $5 right now to help me defeat Sen. clean_body: Until we expand our 50-50 majority, Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell will still have a stranglehold on our democracy. | | | = Peter, I just finished watching President Biden's State of the Union address. There is SO much that we must accomplish for American families, but as I think about the makeup of the Senate – 50 Democrats and 50 Republicans – I'm reminded of just how critical it is that we defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) this November. = You see, during my time in Congress, I fought for many of the issues that President Biden talked about tonight – affordable health care, lower prescription drug prices, accessible child care and so much more. With some hard work and tough conversations, I'm proud to say that I helped pass legislation through the House in the middle of a government shutdown. I'm still the youngest woman to have done so. But with the likes of Sens. Grassley and Mitch McConnell wielding the filibuster, we kept on hitting brick walls. Critical legislation that would make life better for Americans – like a bill that would lower prescription drug costs – would be dead on arrival. The truth is, our Senate is still broken. Until we expand our 50-50 majority, Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell will still have a stranglehold on our democracy. That's where Iowa comes in: Voters here know that Sen. Grassley has changed during his 47 years in Washington and they're ready to show him the door. He's facing record-low approval ratings, and nearly two-thirds of likely voters don't want to send him back to Washington for an eighth term. Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable, and if we defeat him, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to expand our majority. This is the only way that we'll be able to fix our Senate and truly deliver for the American people. But the GOP is already mobilizing to defeat me and defend Sen. Grassley. To compete with the full force of the Republican establishment, I need you with me. = | | = Thank you, Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. name: Greg Casar
subject: The power of people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94297/images/greg%20email%20header.png]
Peter,
I launched this campaign four months ago because I knew working families in Texas’s 35th District needed a champion in Congress who will put them first. I knew that together, we could achieve a better Texas for all.
Tonight I’m incredibly honored and thankful to be the next Democratic nominee for Texas’s 35th Congressional District.
With tonight’s victory, we showed that our campaign has built a movement of working people, from San Antonio to Austin, who are ready to fight. Thanks to you, we’re currently ahead by more than 40 points and avoiding a runoff election.
Tonight’s results are thanks to you and the movement for working people that you helped build. With your support, we’re now one step closer to taking our fight to the halls of Congress – to deliver on Medicare for All, protections for reproductive rights, a working power grid, and good jobs with better pay. But first, we need to win in November .
Our team is gearing up for the November general election to take on our Republican opponent. Can you chip in $35 tonight to help us win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=03.01_electionnight]
Help us WIN our general election! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=03.01_electionnight]
You joined this team because you know how much is at-stake. Standing up to corporate special interests, creating good union jobs, protections for reproductive rights and voting rights, passing paid sick leave for every family—these are all on the ballot in this race.
These progressive policies are popular policies—and we’re going to pass them for working people in our state. But we can only do that if our movement remains strong through Election Day in November . Chip in $35 to help us win in TX-35. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=03.01_electionnight]
Together we will build a better Texas for all.
Thank you,
-Greg

name: Team AOC
subject: What we can do for Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Here’s four things you can do to support Ukrainian relief efforts.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220301-2834-header&t=1&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy)
A lot of you have been asking how you can help support Ukrainians who are facing a horrific and devastating attack by Russia’s President Putin.
Our team compiled a few crucial actions that you can take:
1. If you’re able to, [**please consider donating to vetted Ukrainian relief organizations here**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220301?refcode=em20220301-2834-P_FND_CHA_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2834_2526796_CscEZy&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy). Our team has compiled a list of verified, trustworthy organizations that you can split a donation to at the link above. The organizations include:

> **CARE** , an international humanitarian organization that has set up an emergency Ukrainian Crisis Fund with the goal of providing immediate support for 4 million people. Donations will go toward providing Ukrainians with water, food, supplies, hygiene kits, immediate support and aid, and cash.
>
> **Razom for Ukraine** , a Ukrainian-American nonprofit working to not only support emergency response to the war, but also to provide a whole host of resources for people looking to help, including a round-up of [rallies and events](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10422?t=3&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy) for people interested in showing their support for the #StandWithUkraine movement.
>
> **Nova Ukraine** , a 501(c)3 registered non-profit organization dedicated to providing humanitarian aid to Ukraine and raising awareness about Ukraine in the US and throughout the world.
>
> **The Ukrainian Congress Committee of America** (UCCA), which has launched a nationwide fundraising campaign to provide vital humanitarian aid to this population, as well as to the front-line defenders. Together with partners, they have secured warehouses in several regions where humanitarian aid supplies can be securely stored.

2. **Contact your members of Congress** and ask them to support raising the refugee cap. Alexandria and other officials are calling on the U.S. to raise our refugee cap to allow Ukrainians, along with other victims of war such as Afghans, to resettle in the U.S. We should do our part to accept families, not turn them away.

3. **Support anti-war demonstrations** and your local Ukrainian community organizations. The people’s will matters and we are seeing that anti-war demonstrations in Russia and beyond are making a political impact. Do not think your presence and voice don’t matter. They do.

4. **Only share verified information.** In rapidly developing situations such as these, misinformation and propaganda can spread easily even by those with good intentions. If you are going to share something, ask yourself if it’s a verified, trustworthy source.

Lastly, if you have a prayer, meditation, or contemplation practice, it can be helpful to focus the mind and allow us to keep putting one foot in front of the other for the day ahead.
Together we will continue to condemn any and all violence and stand in solidarity with all communities who are facing the threats of violence and war.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC 💙💛
**[Donate to relief efforts →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220301?refcode=em20220301-2834-P_FND_CHA_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=2834_2526796_CscEZy&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220301?refcode=em20220301-2834-P_FND_CHA_GRM&t=5&refcode2=2834_2526796_CscEZy&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220301-2834-P_FND_CHA_GRM&t=6&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2834%2E2526796%2ECscEZy)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:

| | | | Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to reach out before Joe Biden delivers his State of the Union address because when it comes to the true state of our nation, there’s no way he’s going to acknowledge his real accomplishments...but I will.

In his first year in office, Biden has:
* Ballooned inflation to a 40 year high
* Withdrawn from Afghanistan, destabilized the country, and eviscerated 20 years of progress
* Created an open-borders immigration crisis
* Abandoned law enforcement and allowed crime to run rampant
* Threatened states’ rights and election integrity
* Shut down states, not the virus

---
| | | [STOP BIDEN](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3lpjb-20uz2-4qqlpo7/ "STOP BIDEN")
---
| These are just some of the many disasters Joe Biden has sponsored, and we’re facing three more years of his dangerous incompetence. The good news is, we have the chance to do something about it.

**[GOP state allies are both the first _and_ last line of defense against Biden’s agenda, and we have a chance to elect more Republicans this year. Election day is still months away, but the work to defeat Biden’s state cronies starts now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3lpjb-20uz3-4qqlpo8/ "GOP state allies are both the first and last line of defense against Biden’s agenda, and we have a chance to elect more Republicans this year. Election day is still months away, but the work to defeat Biden’s state cronies starts now.")**
---
| | | [STOP BIDEN](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3lpjb-20uz4-4qqlpo9/ "STOP BIDEN")
---
| By electing more GOP leaders at the state level, we can grow our majority and our opposition to the Biden policies that are running our country into the ground and spurring a mass exodus from blue states. People shouldn’t have to cross state lines just to retain their rights to leave their house, make a living, have a say in their child’s education, or participate in society without a vaccine passport.

When Biden gives his SOTU address, you can be sure he’ll conveniently forget to mention the unconstitutional policies and international crises he’s caused, but **[GOP state allies will not forget.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3lpjb-20uz5-4qqlpo0/ "GOP state allies will not forget.")**
---
| | | [STOP BIDEN](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3lpjb-20uz6-4qqlpo1/ "STOP BIDEN")
---
| This year is our best chance to dismantle Biden’s agenda before he does irreparable damage. State GOP’s efforts to protect Americans from Biden’s policies confirm that expanding conservative state-level majorities has never been more important.

**[In order to fully neutralize Biden, we need 5,000 grassroots patriots to step up before his address. What we do now will directly impact November’s elections, so please, help State GOP grow our ranks and our momentum today.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3lpjb-20uz7-4qqlpo2/ "In order to fully neutralize Biden, we need 5,000 grassroots patriots to step up before his address. What we do now will directly impact November’s elections, so please, help State GOP grow our ranks and our momentum today.")**

Sincerely,
Dee Duncan
President, State GOP HQ

| |

State Republicans currently hold:** **62 of 99 state legislative chambers** **26 of 45 lieutenant governor seats** **27 of 50 secretary of state offices** **11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials** **Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.**

name: Beto HQ
subject: Today is Election Day in Texas — and a turning point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
It’s going to take every single one of us.
#
Today is Election Day in Texas. **[Here’s how a donation from you today will help Beto become the state’s next governor.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53600?refcode=ema20220301-178487&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=178487%2E444211%2Ej5d8Oz)**
One month ago, with voter suppression at an all-time high in Texas under Greg Abbott, we set a historic goal to contact 2 million voters before the primary election.**We ended up contacting over 4.5 million voters instead.**
It’s a testament to the volunteers and grassroots donors that are working tirelessly to elect Beto. Everyone on our team understands that we need to turn out a historic number of Texans if we’re going to defeat Greg Abbott and his extreme, anti-democratic voter restrictions.
But the truth is, as soon as the primary is over, our job is going to get harder.
Thanks to his corporate mega-donors and a massive head start, Greg Abbott has $50 million in the bank — more than seven times the resources we have right now.
Once Beto officially becomes the Democratic nominee for Governor, we expect Abbott to unleash millions of dollars of attack ads on the Texas air waves, filled with misleading and divisive messages that distract from Beto’s positive vision for Texas.
**The fact that we just reached 4.5 million Texas voters in 28 days shows that we have the sheer grassroots power to fight back against Abbott’s massive, corporate-backed campaign operation.** But it’s going to be one of the closest elections in Texas history — and it’s going to take every single one of us to win.
**[Today is a turning point in our race. Please, can you donate your first $3 before polls close in Texas to ensure Beto is ready to fight back as soon as he becomes the official Democratic nominee against Greg Abbott?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53600?refcode=ema20220301-178487&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=178487%2E444211%2Ej5d8Oz)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53600?refcode=ema20220301-178487&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=178487%2E444211%2Ej5d8Oz)**
**All eyes are on our campaign to see if Beto has what it takes to become Texas’ first Democratic governor in decades**. Thank you in advance for donating today to show Texans, our opponents, the media, and potential new supporters that we’re ready for whatever Greg Abbott throws our way.
With gratitude,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220301-178487-footer&t=22&refcode2=178487_444211_j5d8Oz&akid=178487%2E444211%2Ej5d8Oz)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=178487%2E444211%2Ej5d8Oz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=178487%2E444211%2Ej5d8Oz)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

clean_body: Unsurprisingly, the left is out-of-touch. | | Unsurprisingly, the left is out-of-touch. Americans understand how bad the last year has been, and they cannot continue to run from their agenda. The left won’t fix their mess. I will. Donate TODAY to get the right leaders in office. | | | Despite what someone penned on Joe Biden’s teleprompter, his first year has been a disaster. There have been almost too many crises to keep track of–and this is only one year in! His foreign policy weakness has invited conflict; his policy at home has made you poorer. Americans didn’t forget that. The left won’t fix their mess if they can’t even acknowledge it. Someone needs to fix it. It starts with beating Michael Bennet, flipping Colorado’s Senate seat, and sending me to Washington to be your Senator. | We are past political rhetoric. Joe Biden’s America is unsustainable. Let’s fix that in November. Signed, Eli Bremer Air Force Academy Graduate, Olympian, Veteran Republican Candidate - U.S. Senate, CO | | | | Paid For By Eli For Colorado Eli For Colorado, 13395 Voyager Parkway Ste 130-Box 3, Colorado Springs, CO 80921

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Can you PLEASE take 2 minutes to complete Mark Kelly’s State of the Union Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
In just a few hours, President Biden will give the annual State of the Union Address.
#

Friends —
In just a few hours, President Biden will give the annual State of the Union Address.
As is required by the Constitution, he’ll “give Congress information of the State of the Union, and recommend to their consideration such measures as he shall judge necessary and expedient.”
But while the nation waits to hear from him, Mark Kelly wants to hear from YOU.
We’ve put together a short survey to see how YOU feel about the state of the Union. Can you take two minutes to complete it here:
[**Use this link to take Mark Kelly’s two-minute State of the Union survey. Tell him how you feel things are going for YOU.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-sotu-survey-mar22?source=em220301-2-7&refcode2=2235.6688874.McsF2c&t=1&akid=2235%2E6688874%2EMcsF2c)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-sotu-survey-mar22?source=em220301-2-7&refcode2=2235.6688874.McsF2c&t=2&akid=2235%2E6688874%2EMcsF2c)**
Thank you for sounding off. We’ll review the results after the speech is over.
All our best,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2235%2E6688874%2EMcsF2c).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Donna Imam
subject: A personal note.
body:
Everything we accomplished is because of your support for our campaign — focused on working families in Austin, across Texas and our country. Thank you. |

It’s because all of you — the Austin community, our supporters, our volunteers, friends, family, and thousands of grassroots donors — didn’t give up on our focus to make lives better for working families. **Together, our work will continue no matter what. ** **Everything over the past 3 years has led up to today. Donna Imam.

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Just wanna say thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Together, we are proving every day that we have what it takes to win this race.
#

I just wanted to reach out to say thank you.
We’ve officially closed the books on February, and I’m proud to say this team stepped up in an incredible way to help us finish strong and reach our goal.
Curt, Thomas, Matthew, and I — and everyone here at Team Beasley HQ — are filled with gratitude for your support. Campaigns like this are not easy, but together, we are proving every day that we have what it takes to win this race.
My mom raised me in a house steeped in faith and hard work, and I know she’d be proud to see that we are living those values in this campaign. Because that’s really what it will take to pull this off — faith in ourselves and each other and a whole lot of hard work.
I’m committed to doing the hard work – and I have nothing but faith in what we can accomplish if we work together.
Thank you again, and let’s keep it up. We all know how high the stakes are this year, and we must do everything we can to flip this seat in November.
\- Cheri
If you didn’t have a chance to contribute last month, will you chip in today to help us start this month strong? We have an official FEC deadline at the end of this month, so this is important.
**[Please consider making a donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina today. After this month’s FEC deadline, we’ll have to report our fundraising numbers publicly, and we need our strongest showing yet.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220301-1-t1&refcode2=480.357359.kqYHpw&t=2&akid=480%2E357359%2EkqYHpw)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220301-1-t1&refcode2=480.357359.kqYHpw&t=3&akid=480%2E357359%2EkqYHpw)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=480%2E357359%2EkqYHpw). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=480%2E357359%2EkqYHpw). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=480_357359_kqYHpw&akid=480%2E357359%2EkqYHpw) today to help us make history.

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Mil gracias!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42439307/332942252/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220301thankyou_gv_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE2ZTE0ZS1iNTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--qJSVw3OmqnH4R5oV_FZ-8BsUxoSwtm8-PZM7zS6tQ=)
---
Thank you, friend. Thanks to supporters like you, we not only reached our February fundraising goal: we surpassed it once again! This people-powered movement never ceases to amaze me. From volunteers helping to collect over two thousand petition signatures across the 2nd District, to folks chipping in whatever they can to fund our campaign, I am so grateful to each and every one of you. February was a milestone month for us, _but March is going to be even bigger._ **This Saturday, Democratic Party delegates from across New Mexico will gather for the Pre-Primary Meeting and Convention** and then cast their votes for their preferred candidate to take on Republican Yvette Herrell in November. Soon, we will officially be on the ballot, and then our top priority will be reaching voters from every corner of the district! **It’s also the last month of the first financial quarter of 2022, which means we face our next FEC fundraising deadline on March 31.** This will be a crucial test to measure just how much energy is behind our campaign to flip NM-02 blue. I know with hard work and determination, we’re on the path to victory. Let’s keep up our momentum during this critical month, and do whatever we can to bring real change to New Mexico’s 2nd District. Mil gracias! Gabe PS — Recurring donations are a huge source of sustainable financial support for our campaign. Pitching in $5 or $10 every month goes such a long way, and will fuel us to the general election in November. [**Will you become a recurring donor today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42439308/332942253/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220301thankyou_gv_60da_xx_l1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGE2ZTE0ZS1iNTk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--qJSVw3OmqnH4R5oV_FZ-8BsUxoSwtm8-PZM7zS6tQ=) | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico.
---

clean_body: | = Thank you, friend. Thanks to supporters like you, we not only reached our February fundraising goal: we surpassed it once again! This people-powered movement never ceases to amaze me. From volunteers helping to collect over two thousand petition signatures across the 2nd District, to folks chipping in whatever they can to fund our campaign, I am so grateful to each and every one of you. February was a milestone month for us, but March is going to be even bigger. This Saturday, Democratic Party delegates from across New Mexico will gather for the Pre-Primary Meeting and Convention and then cast their votes for their preferred candidate to take on Republican Yvette Herrell in November. Soon, we will officially be on the ballot, and then our top priority will be reaching voters from every corner of the district! It’s also the last month of the first financial quarter of 2022, which means we face our next FEC fundraising deadline on March 31. This will be a crucial test to measure just how much energy is behind our campaign to flip NM-02 blue. I know with hard work and determination, we’re on the path to victory. Let’s keep up our momentum during this critical month, and do whatever we can to bring real change to New Mexico’s 2nd District. Mil gracias! Gabe PS — Recurring donations are a huge source of sustainable financial support for our campaign. Pitching in $5 or $10 every month goes such a long way, and will fuel us to the general election in November. = | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Letitia James
subject: MAJOR announcement (I have a Republican opponent)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42439533/332943172/265476937?refcode=jtk388-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDUwNTcxZi1iNjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W20eNHMav2FHXbLDUCHMoH8y-lcYWhmbnA2hGWpKotQ=)

**Peter, the GOP is desperate to remove me from office, which is why they officially nominated a Republican to run against me.**
It makes sense why. For generations, the powerful, wealthy, and corrupt got away with whatever they desired in New York. Housing and prescription drug prices skyrocketed, Wall Street misconduct flourished, and corrupt elected officials reaped the rewards.
And then I came along. I vowed to never let myself be bought or intimidated by the powerful forces that ruled New York. I vowed to root out corruption and hold every person involved accountable. Now, Republicans are nervous.

**Peter, New York Republicans’ pick for attorney general is going to do everything he can to defeat me. That’s why I need to raise at least $20,000 before midnight on Thursday to ensure that my campaign has better resources than my GOP opponent.**
[**I refuse to let New York fall into a Republican’s hands. Will you rush in $5 or whatever you can spare to help me defend New York and DEFEAT my new opponent?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42439534/332943173/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk388-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDUwNTcxZi1iNjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W20eNHMav2FHXbLDUCHMoH8y-lcYWhmbnA2hGWpKotQ=)
My opponent is attempting to fearmonger his way into the attorney general’s office. He thinks that he can throw words like “death” and “destruction” around to scare New Yorkers into voting for him, but he seems to have forgotten one crucial thing.

I vow that I will do _everything_ in my power to keep serving as this great state’s attorney general – but elections aren’t won by just one person. [**So please, will you rush $5 or more right now to help keep my campaign for attorney general better funded and better staffed than my GOP opponent’s?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42439535/332943174/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk388-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDUwNTcxZi1iNjk5LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODBlZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W20eNHMav2FHXbLDUCHMoH8y-lcYWhmbnA2hGWpKotQ=)

name: Toby Anderson
subject: Thoughts from tonight's State of the Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Toby Anderson for Congress Inc
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/6f6541cda7044999/69d34f6a28b7196bc3d6b838967d376c/38863)
---
Peter, Tonight, Joe Biden failed to be honest with the American people about his policies that have made us less wealthy, less safe, and less free. Under Joe Biden and Mikie Sherrill we have lost our energy independence and emboldened dictators like Vladimir Putin. Under Joe Biden and Mikie Sherrill spending has grown further out of control, inflation is skyrocketing, and New Jersey families are struggling to make ends meet. Under Joe Biden and Mikie Sherrill dissenting voices are being silenced and parents are losing control over what goes into their kids minds and bodies. When leftists dominate our government, tyranny rules at home and abroad. Now more than ever it is abundantly clear that we must defeat Mikie Sherrill, retire Nancy Pelosi, and get our nation headed back in the right direction. -Toby Anderson

Under Joe Biden and Mikie Sherrill we have lost our energy independence and emboldened dictators like Vladimir Putin. Under Joe Biden and Mikie Sherrill spending has grown further out of control, inflation is skyrocketing, and New Jersey families are struggling to make ends meet. Under Joe Biden and Mikie Sherrill dissenting voices are being silenced and parents are losing control over what goes into their kids minds and bodies. When leftists dominate our government, tyranny rules at home and abroad. Now more than ever it is abundantly clear that we must defeat Mikie Sherrill, retire Nancy Pelosi, and get our nation headed back in the right direction. -Toby Anderson | | ---|--- | | Paid for by Toby Anderson for Congress Inc. | | id:2022-03-01-20:14:21:483t

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten=20for=20Oregon?=
subject: Down the rabbit role...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7f9a5249199b/were-off-and-running-6761922?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
# Oregon feels like a trip into 'Alice in Wonderland'
Last night, I saw alleged conservatives applauding Kate Brown and OLCC for ordering already-paid-for, Russian-sourced booze off the shelves. This sends a message to Putin how exactly? This is just bad business, and a clear example of why we need a business owner like myself in the governor’s seat, not another establishment politician. (Yes, I do have an international relations degree, but I sure didn’t need it for this one.) Oregon has slipped into a place of constant virtue signaling and symbolism over substance.

How can a person compromise when there's no sane middle ground left? Every once in a while during an event, someone will pose the question, “But what will you do to get along with the far left? You’re going to have to work together and compromise.” I received that same question yesterday at a Salem conference.

I always wonder to myself why the person asking thinks this narrative is true. Who led them to believe that getting along with your oppressors is somehow virtuous? Wouldn’t that make a person complicit in the loss of his or her own rights?

JFK and Reagan Democrats are re-registering Republican to come my way. Nonaffiliateds are reregistering to come my way. They all say the fringe left that has taken over their Democrat party has left them behind. They’re correct. And they’re looking for someone to stem that tide, just as much as conservative Republicans are looking for it.

Then I wonder in practice what “getting along with” looks like to the people asking that question. Is it failing to veto a few new tax bills because it will make the opposition happy? Is it stacking boards and commissions with fee- and mandate-loving members half the time just so I can say I have reached across the aisle?

I don’t think so.

It’s time for people to clear their brains of the media-fed narrative that forced compromise and socialist incrementalism are acceptable. The governor’s seat is a check and balance system - a counterbalance; it is not a “go along to get along” position.

When was the last time you saw Tina Kotek care if she made Republicans feel warm and fuzzy?

Please help me fight for our freedoms! # # #
**_We have TWO BIG FUNDRAISERS happening._ Get your tickets and more info on my web site at ****[Shop | Kerry McQuisten](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=3c74dcc5a5&e=ae2345792a)****.** First is a beef raffle for Jake the Crazy Steer. Second, is an evening with me and President Trump's First Lady of Election Integrity, Kelli Ward. You won't want to miss this event in Oregon City!
_**Please join my fight to save Oregon today! **_ **Your dollars will be effectively spent.** I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you.

Yours,
_Kerry_

name: Morgan Harper
subject: A slap in the face
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220301-734-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Morgan Harper

BREAKING: Conservatives in the Senate just blocked the passage of the
Women’s Health Protection Act

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28728?t=1003&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Can you rush a donation of $5 to the Morgan Harper
campaign to help elect a progressive to the U.S. Senate who HAS and WILL
continue to fight for reproductive justice?

Donate Now »

Let me be
very clear: Abortion is health care, and health care is a human right.

Reproductive rights are under attack as we speak. Yesterday, the Senate
failed to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, a critical piece of
legislation that would protect and codify Roe v. Wade. Currently, states
across the country are introducing legislation to limit the right to
choose, and the Supreme Court is poised to rule on cases that could even
overturn Roe as early as this summer.

This is a slap in the face and I’m completely frustrated with the lack of
progress on protecting reproductive rights.

We have a razor-thin Democratic majority, and that allowed for Republicans
to filibuster and stop the Women’s Health Protection Act from
progressing.

We MUST abolish the filibuster AND elect more Democrats to the Senate. But
not just any Democrats — we need real leaders who will fight for the best
interests of their constituents. And, that’s not Joe Manchin (who voted against
the Women’s Health Protection Act yesterday) and it’s not Tim Ryan.

Let me break down JUST A LITTLE of Tim Ryan’s record on reproductive
rights right now:

❌ 2009: Ryan voted for [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28729?t=1004&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Stupak Amendment, which blocked funding for
abortions.

❌ 2009: Ryan [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28730?t=1005&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]published an op-ed for US News defending his "pro-life"
credentials, standing by his anti-choice votes, and stating that
healthcare reform should not allow funding for abortions: “I am a pro-life
member of Congress. I have voted in favor of parental notification laws,
for the Unborn Child Pain Awareness Act, against abortion in federally
funded military medical facilities, for the Unborn Victims of Violence
Act, against partial-birth abortion, and against human cloning. I stand by
all those votes.”

❌ [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28731?t=1006&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]2009: Ryan scored just a 50% on the NARAL scorecard.

❌ [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28732?t=1007&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Until 2009: Ryan served on the board of "Democrats for Life."

❌ 2015: Ryan [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28733?t=1008&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]announced his change in position on abortion rights.

Tim Ryan cannot be trusted to stand up for the people of Ohio, protect our
rights, or advance reproductive justice. He's an opportunist, period.
Ohioans deserve better.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28728?t=1009&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Please, can you donate
$5 right now to support our campaign for Senate? I’m the
only major candidate in this race who has never wavered on abortion and
reproductive rights.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28739?refcode=em20220301-734&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1028&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Morgan

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28728?t=1029&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ][IMG]

Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

P.S. Here’s a full breakdown of Tim Ryan’s reproductive rights record
since 2002 and spoiler alert, it’s not pretty:

* 2002: Ryan first ran for Congress as an [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29094?t=1030&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]opponent of abortion
rights.
* 2003: Ryan voted twice for the "[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29095?t=1031&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Partial Birth Abortion Ban Act,"
which became law and which contains no exception for a woman's health.
* 2003: Ryan [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29096?t=1032&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]voted to ban therapeutic cloning, which [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29097?t=1033&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]researchers
believed could have been used to create treatments for Alzheimer's,
Parkinsons, diabetes, and other debilitating diseases. Anti-choice
activists objected to the practice because of the destruction of human
embryos.
* [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29098?t=1034&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]2003: Ryan scored a 10% on the NARAL scorecard.
* 2003: Ryan [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29099?t=1035&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]voted to continue a ban on military personnel and their
dependents from obtaining abortions at overseas military hospitals,
even using their own funds.
* [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29100?t=1036&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]2004: Ryan scored a 35% on the NARAL scorecard.
* 2004: Ryan voted for the "[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29101?t=1037&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Unborn Victims of Violence Act," which
opponents viewed as an effort to undermine Roe v. Wade.
* 2004: Ryan [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29102?t=1038&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]again voted to continue the ban on military personnel
and their dependents from obtaining abortions at overseas military
hospitals, even using their own funds.
* [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29103?t=1039&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]2005: Ryan scored a 15% on the NARAL scorecard.
* 2005: Ryan, for a [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29104?t=1040&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]third time, voted to continue the ban on
military personnel and their dependents from obtaining abortions at
overseas military hospitals, even using their own funds.
* 2005: Ryan voted for the "[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29105?t=1041&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Child Interstate Abortion Notification
Act," which would have created a national parental notification law.
* 2006: Ryan voted for the "[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29106?t=1042&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Unborn Child Pain Awareness Act," which
would have forced doctors to inform women seeking abortions that their
fetuses could feel pain.
* 2006: Ryan, for a [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29107?t=1043&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]fourth time, voted to continue the ban on
military personnel and their dependents from obtaining abortions at
overseas military hospitals, even using their own funds.
* 2006: Ryan [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29108?t=1044&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]again voted for the "Child Interstate Abortion
Notification Act"
* 2006: Ryan scored 0% on the NARAL scorecard.
* 2009: Ryan [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28730?t=1045&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]published an op-ed for US News defending his "pro-life"
credentials, standing by his anti-choice votes, and stating that
healthcare reform should not allow funding for abortions: “I am a
pro-life member of Congress. I have voted in favor of parental
notification laws, for the Unborn Child Pain Awareness Act, against
abortion in federally funded military medical facilities, for the
Unborn Victims of Violence Act, against partial-birth abortion, and
against human cloning. I stand by all those votes and, in addition, I
have explained to Speaker Pelosi my position that healthcare reform
should prohibit public funds from paying for abortions (a provision
which the House Energy and Commerce Committee added to the bill).”
* 2009: Ryan [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/29109?t=1046&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]published a letter to the editor in the Vindicator
defending his "pro-life" credentials: "I believe that for elected
leaders like myself who oppose abortion, it’s not enough to say what
we’re against; we must say what we are for. That is why I introduced
the “Preventing Unintended Pregnancies, Reducing the Need for Abortion
and Supporting Parents Act,” which offers common-ground policy
solutions to reduce abortions by addressing the root causes."
* 2009: Ryan voted for [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28729?t=1047&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Stupak Amendment, which blocked funding for
abortions.
* [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28731?t=1048&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]2009: Ryan scored a 50% on the NARAL scorecard.
* Until 2009: Ryan served on the board of "[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28732?t=1049&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]Democrats for Life."
* 2015: Ryan [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/28733?t=1050&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig ]announced his change in position on abortion rights.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1051&akid=734%2E90090%2EHW0mig

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

subject: Are you going to watch?

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: LOL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is a liiittle embarrassing for Dr. Oz.
#
**LOL, Derek.**
Dr. Oz is starting to realize that money can’t buy on-the-ground support in PA.
**We’re guessing that’s why he just “challenged” John to a one-on-one debate on Twitter (with Sean Hannity as a moderator).**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45001?refcode=em20220301-4799&t=1&akid=4799%2E434096%2EilRHwV)
To which we say...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45001?refcode=em20220301-4799&t=2&akid=4799%2E434096%2EilRHwV)
Dr. Oz is _sooooooo_ desperate to share a stage with John, because he knows John is the Democratic candidate Pennsylvanians actually know, trust, and like.
**[We’re humbly asking: Can you rush a donation today so that we can make sure our people-powered campaign isn’t drowned out by Republicans like Dr. Oz? He might be acting desperate, but we can’t take our momentum for granted with the fate of Pennsylvania on the line.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45001?refcode=em20220301-4799&t=3&akid=4799%2E434096%2EilRHwV)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45001?amount=5&refcode=em20220301-4799&t=22&akid=4799%2E434096%2EilRHwV)**
__
**Every single dollar you donate to this campaign makes a world of difference, Derek.** If we’re going to keep up with the millionaires + their super PACs, we need to increase our momentum NOW and carry it through Election Day.
Whether you can give today or not, thank you, thank you for being on our team. 🙏
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220301-4799-footer&t=23&refcode2=4799_434096_ilRHwV&akid=4799%2E434096%2EilRHwV)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: This is a liiittle embarrassing for Dr. Oz. LOL, Derek. Dr. Oz is starting to realize that money can’t buy on-the-ground support in PA. We’re guessing that’s why he just “challenged” John to a one-on-one debate on Twitter (with Sean Hannity as a moderator). To which we say... Dr. Oz is sooooooo desperate to share a stage with John, because he knows John is the Democratic candidate Pennsylvanians actually know, trust, and like. Every single dollar you donate to this campaign makes a world of difference, Derek. If we’re going to keep up with the millionaires + their super PACs, we need to increase our momentum NOW and carry it through Election Day. Whether you can give today or not, thank you, thank you for being on our team. 🙏 — Team Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
